t: Wakana yamuru ahlahu bialssalati waalzzakati wakana AAinda rabbihi mardiyyan
u: Woh apne ghar walon ko namaz aur zakat ka hukum deta tha aur apne Rubb ke nazdeek ek pasandeeda Insaan tha

t: Waothkur fee alkitabi idreesa innahu kana siddeeqan nabiyyan
u: Aur is kitaab mein Idris ka zikr karo, woh ek raast-baaz (righteous) Insaan aur ek Nabi tha

t: WarafaAAnahu makanan AAaliyyan
u: Aur usey humne buland muqaam par uthaya tha

t: Olaika allatheena anAAama Allahu AAalayhim mina alnnabiyyeena min thurriyyati adama wamimman hamalna maAAa noohin wamin thurriyyati ibraheema waisraeela wamimman hadayna waijtabayna itha tutla AAalayhim ayatu alrrahmani kharroo sujjadan wabukiyyan
u: Yeh woh paigambar hain jinpar Allah ne inaam farmaya Adam ki aulad mein se, aur un logon ki nasal se jinhein humne Nooh ke saath kashti par sawaar kiya tha, aur Ibrahim ki nasal se aur Israel ki nasal se aur yeh un logon mein se thay jinko humne hidayat bakshi aur barguzida kiya.Inka haal yeh tha ke jab rehman ki aayat unko sunayi jati to rotey huey sajde mein gir jatey thay

t: Fakhalafa min baAAdihim khalfun adaAAoo alssalata waittabaAAoo alshshahawati fasawfa yalqawna ghayyan
u: Phir inke baad woh nakhalf (degenerate) log inke jaansaheen (sucessors) huey jinhon ne namaz ko zaya kiya aur khwahishat e nafs ki pairwi ki. Pas qareeb hai ke woh gumraahi ke anjaam se do-char hon

t: Illa man taba waamana waAAamila salihan faolaika yadkhuloona aljannata wala yuthlamoona shayan
u: Albatta jo tawba karlein aur iman le aayein aur neik amali ikhtiyar karlein woh jannat mein dakhil hongey aur unki zarra barabar haqq talafi na hogi

t: Jannati AAadnin allatee waAAada alrrahmanu AAibadahu bialghaybi innahu kana waAAduhu matiyyan
u: Inke liye hamesha rehne wali jannatein hain jinka rehman ne apne bandon se dar-purda wada kar rakkha hai aur yaqeenan yeh wada poora hokar rehna hai

t: La yasmaAAoona feeha laghwan illa salaman walahum rizquhum feeha bukratan waAAashiyyan
u: Wahan woh koi behuda baat na sunenge , jo kuch bhi sunenge theek hi sunenge aur unka rizq unhein paiham subh-o-shaam milta rahega

t: Tilka aljannatu allatee noorithu min AAibadina man kana taqiyyan
u: Yeh hai woh jannat jiska waris hum apne bandon mein se usko banayenge jo parheizgaar raha hai

t: Wama natanazzalu illa biamri rabbika lahu ma bayna aydeena wama khalfana wama bayna thalika wama kana rabbuka nasiyyan
u: (Aey Muhammad), hum tumhare Rubb ke hukum ke bagair nahin utra karte, jo kuch hamare aage hai aur jo kuch peechey hai aur jo kuch iske darmiyan mein hai har cheez ka maalik wahi hai aur tumhara Rubb bhoolne wala nahin hai

t: Rabbu alssamawati waalardi wama baynahuma faoAAbudhu waistabir liAAibadatihi hal taAAlamu lahu samiyyan
u: Woh Rubb hai aasmano ka aur zameen ka aur un saari cheezon ka jo aasman o zameen ke darmiyan hain, pas tum uski bandagi karo aur usi ki bangadi par sabit qadam raho. Kya hai koi hasti tumhare ilm mein iski hum paya (equal in rank to him)

t: Wayaqoolu alinsanu aitha ma mittu lasawfa okhraju hayyan
u: Insaan kehta hai kya waqai jab main mar chukunga to phir zinda karke nikal laya jaunga

t: Awala yathkuru alinsanu anna khalaqnahu min qablu walam yaku shayan
u: Kya Insaan ko yaad nahin aata ke hum pehle usko paida kar chuke hain jabke woh kuch bhi na tha

t: Fawarabbika lanahshurannahum waalshshayateena thumma lanuhdirannahum hawla jahannama jithiyyan
u: Tere Rubb ki kasam , hum zaroor un sab ko aur unke saath shayateen ko bhi gher layenge, phir jahannum ke gird laa kar inhein ghutno (knees) ke bal gira denge

t: Thumma lananziAAanna min kulli sheeAAatin ayyuhum ashaddu AAala alrrahmani AAitiyyan
u: Phir har giroh mein se har us shaks ko chaant lenge (pick out) jo rehman ke muqable mein zyada sarkash bana hua tha

t: Thumma lanahnu aAAlamu biallatheena hum awla biha siliyyan
u: Phir hum yeh jaante hain ke in mein se kaun sabse badhkar jahannum mein jhonke janey ka mustahiq hai

t: Wain minkum illa wariduha kana AAala rabbika hatman maqdiyyan
u: Tum mein se koi nahin hai jo jahannum par warid na ho,yeh to ek tai shuda baat hai jisey pura karna tere Rubb ka zimma hai

t: Thumma nunajjee allatheena ittaqaw wanatharu alththalimeena feeha jithiyyan
u: Phir hum un logon ko bacha lenge jo (duniya mein ) muttaqi thay aur zalimon ko usi mein gira hua chodh denge

t: Waitha tutla AAalayhim ayatuna bayyinatin qala allatheena kafaroo lillatheena amanoo ayyu alfareeqayni khayrun maqaman waahsanu nadiyyan
u: In logon ko jab hamari khuli khuli aayat sunayi jati hain to inkar karne waley iman laney walon se kehte hain “batao, hum dono girohon mein se kaun behtar halat mein hai aur kiski majlisein zyada shandaar hai?”

t: Wakam ahlakna qablahum min qarnin hum ahsanu athathan wariyan
u: Halanke insey pehle hum kitni hi aisi qaumo ko halaak kar chuke hain jo insey zyada sar-o-samaan rakhti thin aur zahiri shaan o shaukat mein insey badi hui thi

t: Qul man kana fee alddalalati falyamdud lahu alrrahmanu maddan hatta itha raaw ma yooAAadoona imma alAAathaba waimma alssaAAata fasayaAAlamoona man huwa sharrun makanan waadAAafu jundan
u: Insey kaho, jo shaks gumraahi mein mubtila hota hai usey Rehman dheel diya karta hai, yahan tak ke jab aisey log woh cheez dekh letay hain jiska unse wada kiya gaya hai khwa woh azaab e ilahi ho ya qayamat ki ghadi tab unhein maloom ho jata hai ke kiska haal kharab hai aur kiska jattha (party) kamzor

t: Wayazeedu Allahu allatheena ihtadaw hudan waalbaqiyatu alssalihatu khayrun AAinda rabbika thawaban wakhayrun maraddan
u: Iske baraks jo logo raah e raast ikhtiyar karte hain Allah unko raast-rawi mein taraqqi ata farmata hai aur baaqi reh janey wali nekiyan hi tere Rubb ke nazdeek jaza aur anjaam ke aitbaar se behtar hain

t: Afaraayta allathee kafara biayatina waqala laootayanna malan wawaladan
u: Phir tu nay dekha us shaks ko jo hamari aayat ko manney se inkar karta hai aur kehta hai ke main to maal aur aulad se nawaza hi jata rahunga

t: AttalaAAa alghayba ami ittakhatha AAinda alrrahmani AAahdan
u: Kya usey gaib ka pata chal gaya hai ya usne rehman se koi ahad le rakkha hai

t: Kalla sanaktubu ma yaqoolu wanamuddu lahu mina alAAathabi maddan
u: Hargiz nahin, jo kuch yeh bakhta (boasts of) hai isey hum likh lengey aur iske liye saza mein aur zyada izafa karenge

t: Wanarithuhu ma yaqoolu wayateena fardan
u: Jis sar-o-samaan aur laao lashkar ka yeh zikr kar raha hai woh sab hamare paas reh jayega aur yeh akela hamare saamne hazir hoga

t: Waittakhathoo min dooni Allahi alihatan liyakoonoo lahum AAizzan
u: In logon ne Allah ko chodh kar apne kuch khuda bana rakkhey hain taa-ke woh inke pushtebaan (supporters) hon

t: Kalla sayakfuroona biAAibadatihim wayakoonoona AAalayhim diddan
u: Koi pushtebaan na hoga, woh sab inki ibadat ka inkar karenge aur ultey inke mukhalif ban jayenge

t: Alam tara anna arsalna alshshayateena AAala alkafireena taozzuhum azzan
u: Kya tum dekhte nahin ho ke humne in munkireen e haqq par shayateen chodh rakkhey hain jo inhein khoob khoob (mukhalifat e haqq par) uksa rahey hain

t: Fala taAAjal AAalayhim innama naAAuddu lahum AAaddan
u: Accha, to ab inpar nuzul e azaab ke liye betaab na ho, hum inke din gin rahey hain

t: Yawma nahshuru almuttaqeena ila alrrahmani wafdan
u: Woh din aane wala hai jab muttaqi logon ko hum mehmaano ki tarah rehman ke huzur pesh karenge

t: Wanasooqu almujrimeena ila jahannama wirdan
u: Aur mujreemon ko pyase jaanwaron ki tarah jahannum ki taraf haank le jayenge

t: La yamlikoona alshshafaAAata illa mani ittakhatha AAinda alrrahmani AAahdan
u: Us waqt log koi sifarish laney par qaadir na honge bajuz uske jisne Rehman ke huzur se parwana hasil karliya ho

t: Waqaloo ittakhatha alrrahmanu waladan
u: Woh kehte hain ke rehman ne kisi ko beta bana liya hai

t: Laqad jitum shayan iddan
u: Sakht behuda baat hai jo tum log ghadh laye ho

t: Takadu alssamawatu yatafattarna minhu watanshaqqu alardu watakhirru aljibalu haddan
u: Qareeb hai ke aasmaan phatt padein, zameen shaqq ho jaye (split asunder) aur pahad gir jayein

t: An daAAaw lilrrahmani waladan
u: Is baat par ke logon ne Rehman ke liye aulad honay ka dawa kiya

t: Wama yanbaghee lilrrahmani an yattakhitha waladan
u: Rehman ki yeh shaan nahin hai ke woh kisi ko beta banaye

t: In kullu man fee alssamawati waalardi illa atee alrrahmani AAabdan
u: Zameen aur aasmaano ke andar jo bhi hain sab uske huzoor bandon ki haisiyat se pesh honay waley hain

t: Laqad ahsahum waAAaddahum AAaddan
u: Sab par woh muheet (encircled) hai aur usne unko shumaar kar rakkha hai

t: Wakulluhum ateehi yawma alqiyamati fardan
u: Sab qayamat ke roz fardan fardan (akele akele) uske saamne hazir hongey

t: Inna allatheena amanoo waAAamiloo alssalihati sayajAAalu lahumu alrrahmanu wuddan
u: Yaqeenan jo log iman le aaye hain aur amal e saleh kar rahey hain anqareeb Rehman unke liye dilon mein muhabbat paida kardega

t: Fainnama yassarnahu bilisanika litubashshira bihi almuttaqeena watunthira bihi qawman luddan
u: Pas (aey Muhammad) , is kalam ko humne aasaan karke tumhari zubaan mein isi liye nazil kiya hai ke tum parheizgaron ko khush khabri dedo aur hat-dharm (jhagdalu/obdurate) logon ko dara do

t: Wakam ahlakna qablahum min qarnin hal tuhissu minhum min ahadin aw tasmaAAu lahum rikzan
u: Insey pehle hum kitni hi qaumon ko halaak kar chuke hain, phir aaj kahin tum unka nishaan patey ho, ya unki bhanak bhi kahin sunayi deti hai

t: Taha
u: Ta ha

t: Ma anzalna AAalayka alqurana litashqa
u: Humne yeh Quran tumpar is liye nazil nahin kiya hai ke tum museebat mein padh jao

t: Illa tathkiratan liman yakhsha
u: Yeh to ek yaad dihani hai har us shaks ke liye jo darey

t: Tanzeelan mimman khalaqa alarda waalssamawati alAAula
u: Nazil kiya gaya hai us zaat ki taraf se jisne paida kiya hai zameen ko aur buland aasmano ko

t: Alrrahmanu AAala alAAarshi istawa
u: Woh Rehman (qayanaat ke) takht e sultanat par jalwa farma hai

t: Lahu ma fee alssamawati wama fee alardi wama baynahuma wama tahta alththara
u: Maalik hai un sab cheezon ka jo aasmano aur zameen mein hain aur jo zameen o aasmaan ke darmiyan mein hain aur jo mitti ke nichey hain

t: Wain tajhar bialqawli fainnahu yaAAlamu alssirra waakhfa
u: Tum chahe apni baat pukar kar kaho, woh to chupke se kahi hui baat balke issey makhfi-tar (most secret) baat bhi jaanta hai

t: Allahu la ilaha illa huwa lahu alasmao alhusna
u: Woh Allah hai, uske siwa koi khuda nahin, uske liye behtareen naam hain

t: Wahal ataka hadeethu moosa
u: Aur tumhein kuch Moosa ki khabar bhi pahunchi hai

t: Ith raa naran faqala liahlihi omkuthoo innee anastu naran laAAallee ateekum minha biqabasin aw ajidu AAala alnnari hudan
u: Jabke usne ek aag dekhi aur apne ghar walon se kaha ke “ zara thehro, maine ek aag dekhi hai, shayad ke tumhare liye ek-aad angara le aaon, ya is aag par mujhey (raaste ke mutaalik) koi rehnumayi (guidance) mil jaye”

t: Falamma ataha noodiya ya moosa
u: Wahan pahuncha to pukara gaya “Aey Moosa

t: Innee ana rabbuka faikhlaAA naAAlayka innaka bialwadi almuqaddasi tuwan
u: Main hi tera Rubb hoon, jutiyan (shoes) utaar de, tu waadi e muqaddas Tuwa mein hai

t: Waana ikhtartuka faistamiAA lima yooha
u: Aur maine tujhko chun liya hai, sun jo kuch wahee kiya jata hai

t: Innanee ana Allahu la ilaha illa ana faoAAbudnee waaqimi alssalata lithikree
u: Main hi Allah hoon, mere siwa koi khuda nahin hai, pas tu meri bandagi kar aur meri yaad ke liye namaz qayam kar

t: Inna alssaAAata atiyatun akadu okhfeeha litujza kullu nafsin bima tasAAa
u: Qayamat ki ghadi zaroor aane wali hai, main uska waqt makhfi rakhna chahta hoon, taa-ke har mutanaffis apni saii(labours/koshish) ke mutabik badla paye

t: Fala yasuddannaka AAanha man la yuminu biha waittabaAAa hawahu fatarda
u: Pas koi aisa shaks jo uspar iman nahin laata aur apni khwahish e nafs ka banda ban gaya hai tujhko us ghadi ki fikr se na roak de, warna tu halakat mein padh jayega

t: Wama tilka biyameenika ya moosa
u: Aur aey Moosa, yeh tere haath mein kya hai?”

t: Qala hiya AAasaya atawakkao AAalayha waahushshu biha AAala ghanamee waliya feeha maaribu okhra
u: Moosa ne jawab diya “yeh meri laathi hai, ispar taik laga kar chalta hoon, issey apni bakriyon ke liye pattey jhadta hoon, aur bhi bahut se kaam hain jo issey leta hoon”

t: Qala alqiha ya moosa
u: Farmaya “phenk de isko Moosa”

t: Faalqaha faitha hiya hayyatun tasAAa
u: Usne phenk diya aur yakayak woh ek saanp (snake) thi jo daud raha tha

t: Qala khuthha wala takhaf sanuAAeeduha seerataha aloola
u: Farmaya “pakad le isko aur darr nahin, hum isey phir waisa hi kardenge jaisi yeh thi

t: Waodmum yadaka ila janahika takhruj baydaa min ghayri sooin ayatan okhra
u: Aur zara apna haath apni bagal mein daba, chamakta hua niklega bagair kisi takleef ke, yeh dusri nishani hai

t: Linuriyaka min ayatina alkubra
u: Is liye ke hum tujhey apni badi nishniyan dikane waley hain

t: Ithhab ila firAAawna innahu tagha
u: Ab tu Firoun ke paas jaa, woh sarkash ho gaya hai”

t: Qala rabbi ishrah lee sadree
u: Moosa ne arz kiya “ parwardigar, mera seena khol de

t: Wayassir lee amree
u: Aur mere kaam ko mere liye aasaan karde

t: Waohlul AAuqdatan min lisanee
u: Aur meri zubaan ki girah suljha de

t: Yafqahoo qawlee
u: Taa-ke log meri baat samajh sakein

t: WaijAAal lee wazeeran min ahlee
u: Aur mere liye mere apne kumbe (my own family) se ek wazir muqarrar karde

t: Haroona akhee
u: Haroon, jo mera bhai hai

t: Oshdud bihi azree
u: Uske zariye se mera haath mazboot kar

t: Waashrikhu fee amree
u: Aur usko mere kaam mein shareek karde

t: Kay nusabbihaka katheeran
u: Hum khoob teri paaki bayan karein

t: Wanathkuraka katheeran
u: Aur khoob tera charcha karein

t: Innaka kunta bina baseeran
u: Tu hamesha hamare haal par nigraan raha hai”

t: Qala qad ooteeta sulaka ya moosa
u: Farmaya “ diya gaya jo tu nay maanga aey Moosa

t: Walaqad mananna AAalayka marratan okhra
u: Humne phir ek martaba tujhpar ehsan kiya

t: Ith awhayna ila ommika ma yooha
u: Yaad karo woh waqt jabke humne teri Maa ko ishara kiya, aisa ishara jo wahee ke zariye kiya jaata hai

t: Ani iqthifeehi fee alttabooti faiqthifeehi fee alyammi falyulqihi alyammu bialssahili yakhuthhu AAaduwwun lee waAAaduwwun lahu waalqaytu AAalayka mahabbatan minnee walitusnaAAa AAala AAaynee
u: Ke is bacchey ko sandook (box) mein rakh de aur sandook ko dariya mein chodh de, dariya isey saahil par phenk dega aur isey mera dushman aur is bacchey ka dushman utha lega. Maine apni taraf se tujhpar mohabbat taari kardi aur aisa intizam kiya ke tu meri nigrani mein paala jaye

t: Ith tamshee okhtuka fataqoolu hal adullukum AAala man yakfuluhu farajaAAnaka ila ommika kay taqarra AAaynuha wala tahzana waqatalta nafsan fanajjaynaka mina alghammi wafatannaka futoonan falabithta sineena fee ahli madyana thumma jita AAala qadarin ya moosa
u: Yaad kar jabke teri behan chal rahi thi, phir jaa kar kehti hai, “main tumhein uska pata doon jo is bacchey ki parwarish acchi tarah karey?” Is tarah humne tujhey phir teri Maa ke paas pahuncha diya taa-ke uski aankh thandi rahey aur woh ranjeeda na ho. Aur (yeh bhi yaad kar ke) tu nay ek shaks ko qatal kardiya tha, humne tujhey is phanday se nikala aur tujhey mukhtalif aazmaaishon se guzara aur tu Madiyan ke logon mein kai saal thehra raha. Phir ab theek apne waqt par tu aa gaya hai aey Moosa

t: WaistanaAAtuka linafsee
u: Maine tujhey apne kaam ka bana liya hai

t: Ithhab anta waakhooka biayatee wala taniya fee thikree
u: Ja, tu aur tera bhai meri nishaniyon ke saath, aur dekho tum meri yaad mein taqseer (susti /negligence) na karna

t: Ithhaba ila firAAawna innahu tagha
u: Jao tum dono Firoun ke paas ke woh sarkash ho gaya hai

t: Faqoola lahu qawlan layyinan laAAallahu yatathakkaru aw yakhsha
u: Ussey narmi ke saath baat karna, shayad ke woh naseehat qabool karey ya darr jaaye”

t: Qala rabbana innana nakhafu an yafruta AAalayna aw an yatgha
u: Dono ne arz kiya “ parwardigar, humein andesha hai ke woh humpar zyadati karega ya pil padega(treat us cruelly)”

t: Qala la takhafa innanee maAAakuma asmaAAu waara
u: Farmaya” daro mat, main tumhare saath hoon, sab kuch sun raha hoon aur dekh raha hoon

t: Fatiyahu faqoola inna rasoola rabbika faarsil maAAana banee israeela wala tuAAaththibhum qad jinaka biayatin min rabbika waalssalamu AAala mani ittabaAAa alhuda
u: Jao uske paas aur kaho ke hum tere Rubb ke faristaade (messengers) hain, bani Israel ko hamare saath janey ke liye chodh de aur unko takleef na de. Hum tere paas tere Rubb ki nishani lekar aaye hain aur salamati hai uske liye jo raah-e-raast ki pairwi karey

t: Inna qad oohiya ilayna anna alAAathaba AAala man kaththaba watawalla
u: Humko wahee (revelation) se bataya gaya hai ke azaab hai uske liye jo jhutlaye aur mooh moadey.”

t: Qala faman rabbukuma ya moosa
u: Firoun ne kaha “accha, to phir tum dono ka Rubb kaun hai aey Moosa?”

t: Qala rabbuna allathee aAAta kulla shayin khalqahu thumma hada
u: Moosa ne jawab diya “hamara Rubb woh hai jisne har cheez ko uski saakht bakshi(given distinctive form), phir usko raasta bataya”

t: Qala fama balu alqurooni aloola
u: Firoun bola “aur pehle jo nasalein (generations) guzar chuki hain unki phir kya halat thi?”

t: Qala AAilmuha AAinda rabbee fee kitabin la yadillu rabbee wala yansa
u: Moosa ne kaha “uska ilam mere Rubb ke paas ek nawishte (record) mein mehfooz hai, mera Rub na chukta hai na bhoolta hai”

t: Allathee jaAAala lakumu alarda mahdan wasalaka lakum feeha subulan waanzala mina alssamai maan faakhrajna bihi azwajan min nabatin shatta
u: Wahi jisne tumhare liye zameen ka farsh bichaya, aur usmein tumhare chalne ko raaste banaye, aur upar se pani barsaya, phir uske zariye se mukhtalif aqsam ki paidawaar nikali

t: Kuloo wairAAaw anAAamakum inna fee thalika laayatin liolee alnnuha
u: Khao aur apne jaanwaron ko bhi charao, yaqeenan is mein bahut si nishaniyan hain aqal rakhne walon ke liye

t: Minha khalaqnakum wafeeha nuAAeedukum waminha nukhrijukum taratan okhra
u: Isi zameen se humne tumko paida kiya hai, isi mein hum tumhein wapas le jayenge aur isi se tumko dobara nikalenge

t: Walaqad araynahu ayatina kullaha fakaththaba waaba
u: Humne Firoun ko apni sabhi nishaniyan dikayi magar woh jhutlaye chala gaya aur na maana

t: Qala ajitana litukhrijana min ardina bisihrika ya moosa
u: Kehne laga “aey Moosa, kya tu hamare paas is liye aaya hai ke apne jaadu ke zoar se humko hamare mulk se nikal bahar karey

t: Falanatiyannaka bisihrin mithlihi faijAAal baynana wabaynaka mawAAidan la nukhlifuhu nahnu wala anta makanan suwan
u: Accha, hum bhi tere muqable mein waisa hi jaadu latey hain, tai karle kab aur kahan muqaabla karna hai, na hum is qarardaad se phirenge na tu Phiriyo , khule maidan mein saamne aaja”

t: Qala mawAAidukum yawmu alzzeenati waan yuhshara alnnasu duhan
u: Moosa ne kaha “jashn ka din tai hua, aur din chadhey log jama hon”

t: Fatawalla firAAawnu fajamaAAa kaydahu thumma ata
u: Firoun ne palat kar apne saare hathkande jama kiye aur muqaable mein aa gaya

t: Qala lahum moosa waylakum la taftaroo AAala Allahi kathiban fayushitakum biAAathabin waqad khaba mani iftara
u: Moosa ne ( ain mauqe par giroh muqabil ko mukhatib karke) kaha “shamat ke maaron, na jhooti tohmatein (invent falsehood) baandho Allah par, warna woh ek sakht azaab se tumhara sattyanaas kardega, jhoot jisne bhi ghada woh na-murad hua”

t: FatanazaAAoo amrahum baynahum waasarroo alnnajwa
u: Yeh sunkar unke darmiyan ikhtilaf e raai ho gaya aur woh chupke chupke baham mashwarey karne lagey

t: Qaloo in hathani lasahirani yureedani an yukhrijakum min ardikum bisihrihima wayathhaba bitareeqatikumu almuthla
u: Aakhir-e-kaar kuch logon ne kaha ke “yeh dono to mehaz jaadugar hain.Inka maqsad yeh hai ke apne jaadu ke zoar se tumko tumhari zameen se be-dakhal kardein aur tumhare misaali (ideal) tareeq-e-zindagi ka khatma kardein

t: FaajmiAAoo kaydakum thumma itoo saffan waqad aflaha alyawma mani istaAAla
u: Apni saari tadberein aaj ikatthi karlo aur eka karke maidan mein aao. Bas yeh samajhlo ke aaj jo gaalib raha wahi jeet gaya.”

t: Qaloo ya moosa imma an tulqiya waimma an nakoona awwala man alqa
u: Jaadugar bole “Moosa, tum phenkte ho ya pehle hum phenkein?”

t: Qala bal alqoo faitha hibaluhum waAAisiyyuhum yukhayyalu ilayhi min sihrihim annaha tasAAa
u: Moosa ne kaha “nahin, tumhi phenko” yakayak unki rassiyan aur unki laathiyan unke jaadu ke zoar se Moosa ko daudti hui mehsoos hone lagi

t: Faawjasa fee nafsihi kheefatan moosa
u: Aur moosa apne dil mein darr gaya

t: Qulna la takhaf innaka anta alaAAla
u: Humne kaha “mat darr, tu hi galib rahega

t: Waalqi ma fee yameenika talqaf ma sanaAAoo innama sanaAAoo kaydu sahirin wala yuflihu alssahiru haythu ata
u: Phenk jo kuch tere haath mein hai, abhi inki saari banawati cheezon ko ningle (swallow) jata hai, yeh jo kuch bana kar laye hain yeh to jaadugar ka fareb hai, aur jaadugar kabhi kamiyab nahin ho sakta, khwah kisi shaan se woh aaye”

t: Faolqiya alssaharatu sujjadan qaloo amanna birabbi haroona wamoosa
u: Aakhir ko yahi hua ke saarey jaadugar sajde mein gira diye gaye aur pukar utthey “ maan liya humne Haroon aur Moosa ke Rubb ko”

t: Qala amantum lahu qabla an athana lakum innahu lakabeerukumu allathee AAallamakumu alssihra falaoqattiAAanna aydiyakum waarjulakum min khilafin walaosallibannakum fee juthooAAi alnnakhli walataAAlamunna ayyuna ashaddu AAathaban waabqa
u: Firoun ne kaha “tum iman le aaye qabl iske ke main tumhein iski ijazat deta? Maloom ho gaya ke yeh tumhara guru hai jisne tumhein jaadugari sikhayi thi. Accha ab main tumhare haath paon mukhalif simton (alternate sides ) se katwata hoon aur khajoor ke tano(trunks) par tumko sooli deta hoon, phir tumhein pata chal jayega ke hum dono mein se kiska azaab zyada sakht aur dair pa hai” (yani main tumhein zyada sakht saza de sakta hoon ya Moosa)

t: Qaloo lan nuthiraka AAala ma jaana mina albayyinati waallathee fatarana faiqdi ma anta qadin innama taqdee hathihi alhayata alddunya
u: Jaadugaron (magicians) ne jawab diya “qasam hai us zaat ki jisne humein paida kiya hai, yeh hargiz nahin ho sakta ke hum roshan nishaniyan samne aa janey ke baad bhi (sadaqat par) tujhey tarjeeh dein. Tu jo kuch karna chahey karle, tu zyada se zyada bas isi duniya ki zindagi ka faisla kar sakta hai

t: Inna amanna birabbina liyaghfira lana khatayana wama akrahtana AAalayhi mina alssihri waAllahu khayrun waabqa
u: Hum to apne Rubb par iman le aaye taa-ke woh hamari khatayein maaf karde, aur is jaadugari se jispar tu nay humein majboor kiya tha darguzar farmaye. Allah hi accha hai aur wahi baaqi rehne waala hai”

t: Innahu man yati rabbahu mujriman fainna lahu jahannama la yamootu feeha wala yahya
u: Haqeeqat yeh hai ke jo mujrin bankar apne Rubb ke huzoor haazir hoga uske liye jahannum hai jismein woh na jiyega na marega

t: Waman yatihi muminan qad AAamila alssalihati faolaika lahumu alddarajatu alAAula
u: Aur jo uske huzoor momin ki haisiyat se haazir hoga, jisne neik amal kiye hongey, aisey sab logon ke liye buland darje hain

t: Jannatu AAadnin tajree min tahtiha alanharu khalideena feeha wathalika jazao man tazakka
u: Sada bahaar baagh (gardens) hain jinke nichey nehrein beh rahi hongi Un mein woh hamesha rahenge.yeh jaza hai us shaks ki jo pakeezgi ikhtiyar karey

t: Walaqad awhayna ila moosa an asri biAAibadee faidrib lahum tareeqan fee albahri yabasan la takhafu darakan wala takhsha
u: Humne Moosa par wahee ki ke ab raat-o-raat mere bandon ko lekar chal padh, aur unke liye samandar mein sukhi sadak (dry path) bana le, tujhe kisi ke taaqub ka zara khauf na ho aur na (samandar ke beech se guzarte huey) darr lagey

t: FaatbaAAahum firAAawnu bijunoodihi faghashiyahum mina alyammi ma ghashiyahum
u: Peechey se Frioun apne laskhar lekar pahucha aur phir samandar unpar chaa gaya jaisa ke chaa jaane ka haqq tha

t: Waadalla firAAawnu qawmahu wama hada
u: Firoun ne apni qaum ko gumraah hi kiya tha, koi saheeh rehnumayi nahin ki thi

t: Ya banee israeela qad anjaynakum min AAaduwwikum wawaAAadnakum janiba alttoori alaymana wanazzalna AAalaykumu almanna waalssalwa
u: Aey bani Israel, humne tumko tumhare dushman se najaat di, aur Tur ke dayein jaanib tumhari haazri ke liye waqt muqarrar kiya aur tumpar manna o salwa (quails) utara

t: Kuloo min tayyibati ma razaqnakum wala tatghaw feehi fayahilla AAalaykum ghadabee waman yahlil AAalayhi ghadabee faqad hawa
u: Khao hamara diya hua paak rizq aur isey kha kar sarkashi na karo warna tumpar mera gazab toot padega. Aur jispar mera gazab toota woh phir gir kar hi raha

t: Wainnee laghaffarun liman taba waamana waAAamila salihan thumma ihtada
u: Albatta jo tawba karle aur iman laye aur neik amal karey, phir seedha chalta rahey, uske liye main bahut darguzar karne wala hoon

t: Wama aAAjalaka AAan qawmika ya moosa
u: Aur kya cheez tumhein apni qaum se pehle le aayi Moosa

t: Qala hum olai AAala atharee waAAajiltu ilayka rabbi litarda
u: Usne arz kiya “woh bas mere peechey aa hi rahey hain. Main jaldi karke tere huzoor aa gaya hoon aey mere Rubb, taa-ke tu mujhse khush ho jaye”

t: Qala fainna qad fatanna qawmaka min baAAdika waadallahumu alssamiriyyu
u: Farmaya “accha, to suno, humne tumhare peechey tumhari qaum ko aazmaish mein daal diya aur Saamri ne unhein gumraah kar dala”

t: FarajaAAa moosa ila qawmihi ghadbana asifan qala ya qawmi alam yaAAidkum rabbukum waAAdan hasanan afatala AAalaykumu alAAahdu am aradtum an yahilla AAalaykum ghadabun min rabbikum faakhlaftum mawAAidee
u: Moosa sakht gussey aur ranjj ki halat mein apni qaum ki taraf palta. Jaakar usne kaha “aey meri qaum ke logon, kya tumhare Rubb ne tumse acchey wadey nahin kiye thay? Kya tumhein din lag gaye hain? Ya tum apne Rubb ka gazab hi apne upar lana chahte thay ke tumne mujhse wada khilafi ki?”

t: Qaloo ma akhlafna mawAAidaka bimalkina walakinna hummilna awzaran min zeenati alqawmi faqathafnaha fakathalika alqa alssamiriyyu
u: Unhon ne jawab diya “humne aap se wada khilafi kuch apne ikhtiyar se nahin ki. Maamla yeh hua ke logon ke zewarat ke bojh se hum ladh gaye thay aur humne bas unko phenk diya tha” phir isi tarah Saamri ne bhi kuch dala

t: Faakhraja lahum AAijlan jasadan lahu khuwarun faqaloo hatha ilahukum wailahu moosa fanasiya
u: Aur unke liye ek bachde (shape of a calf) ki murat banakar nikal laya jissey bail (ox) ki si aawaz nikalti thi. Log pukar utthey “yahi hai tumhara khuda aur Moosa ka khuda, Moosa isey bhool gaya”

t: Afala yarawna alla yarjiAAu ilayhim qawlan wala yamliku lahum darran wala nafAAan
u: Kya woh dekhte na thay ke na woh unki baat ka jawab deta hai aur na unke nafa o nuksan ka kuch ikhtiyar rakhta hai

t: Walaqad qala lahum haroonu min qablu ya qawmi innama futintum bihi wainna rabbakumu alrrahmanu faittabiAAoonee waateeAAoo amree
u: Haroon (Moosa ke aane se ) pehle hi unse keh chuka tha ke “Logon, tum iski wajah se fitne (trial) mein padh gaye ho, tumhara Rubb to Rehman hai, pas tum meri pairwi karo aur meri baat maano.”

t: Qaloo lan nabraha AAalayhi AAakifeena hatta yarjiAAa ilayna moosa
u: Unhon ne ussey kehdiya ke “hum isi ki parastish karte rahenge jab tak ke Moosa wapas na aa jaaye”

t: Qala ya haroonu ma manaAAaka ith raaytahum dalloo
u: Moosa (qaum ko daatne ke baad Haroon ki taraf palta aur ) bola “ Haroon, tumne jab dekha tha ke yeh gumraah ho rahey hain

t: Alla tattabiAAani afaAAasayta amree
u: To kis cheez ne tumhara haath pakda tha ke mere tareeqe par amal na karo? Kya tumne mere hukum ki khilaf-warzi ki

t: Qala ya bna omma la takhuth bilihyatee wala birasee innee khasheetu an taqoola farraqta bayna banee israeela walam tarqub qawlee
u: Haroon ne jawab diya “ aey meri Maa ke bete , meri daadi (beard) na pakad, na mere sar ke baal khench, mujhey is baat ka darr tha ke tu aa kar kahega tumne bani Israel mein phoot daal di aur meri baat ka paas na kiya”

t: Qala fama khatbuka ya samiriyyu
u: Moosa ne kaha “Aur Saamri, tera kya maamla hai?”

t: Qala basurtu bima lam yabsuroo bihi faqabadtu qabdatan min athari alrrasooli fanabathtuha wakathalika sawwalat lee nafsee
u: Usne jawab diya “ maine woh cheez dekhi jo in logon ko nazar na aayi, pas maine Rasool ke nakshe qadam se ek mutthi utha li aur usko daal diya, mere nafs ne mujhey kuch aisa hi sujhaya”

t: Qala faithhab fainna laka fee alhayati an taqoola la misasa wainna laka mawAAidan lan tukhlafahu waonthur ila ilahika allathee thalta AAalayhi AAakifan lanuharriqannahu thumma lanansifannahu fee alyammi nasfan
u: Moosa ne kaha, “accha to jaa, ab zindagi bhar tujhey yahi pukarte rehna hai ke mujhey na choona aur tere liye baaz-purs ka ek waqt muqarrar hai jo tujhse hargiz na taleyga aur dekh apne is khuda ko jispar tu richa (cherished so much) hua tha, ab hum usey jala daalenge aur reza reza karke dariya mein baha denge

t: Innama ilahukumu Allahu allathee la ilaha illa huwa wasiAAa kulla shayin AAilman
u: Logon, tumhara khuda to bas ek hi Allah hai jiske siwa koi aur khuda nahin hai, har cheez par uska ilm haawi hai”

t: Kathalika naqussu AAalayka min anbai ma qad sabaqa waqad ataynaka min ladunna thikran
u: (Aey Muhammad), is tarah hum pichle guzre huey haalaat ki khabrein tumko sunate hain, aur humne khaas apne haan se tumko ek “zikr” (dars e naseehat) ata kiya hai

t: Man aAArada AAanhu fainnahu yahmilu yawma alqiyamati wizran
u: Jo koi issey moah moadega woh qayamat ke din sakht baar e gunaah uthayega

t: Khalideena feehi wasaa lahum yawma alqiyamati himlan
u: Aur aise sab log hamesha iske wabal mein giraftar rahenge, aur qayamat ke din unke liye (is jurm ki zimmedari ka bojh) bada takleef-de bojh hoga

t: Yawma yunfakhu fee alssoori wanahshuru almujrimeena yawmaithin zurqan
u: Us din jabke soor (trumphet) phoonka jayega aur hum mujrimo ko is haal mein gher layenge ke unki aankhein (dehshat ke marey) pathrayi hui hongi

t: Yatakhafatoona baynahum in labithtum illa AAashran
u: Aapas mein chupke chupke kahenge ke duniya mein mushkil hi se tumne koi dus(ten) din guzare honge

t: Nahnu aAAlamu bima yaqooloona ith yaqoolu amthaluhum tareeqatan in labithtum illa yawman
u: Humein khoob maloom hai ke woh kya baatein kar rahey hongey, (hum yeh bhi jaante hain ke) us waqt unmein se jo zyada se zyada mohtaat andaza lagane wala hoga woh kahega ke nahin, tumhari duniya ki zindagi bas ek din ki zindagi thi

t: Wayasaloonaka AAani aljibali faqul yansifuha rabbee nasfan
u: Yeh log tumse poochte hain ke aakhir us din yeh pahad kahan chale jayenge? Kaho ke mera Rubb unko dhool banakar uda dega

t: Fayatharuha qaAAan safsafan
u: Aur zameen ko aisa humwar chatiyal maidan bana dega (empty level plain)

t: La tara feeha AAiwajan wala amtan
u: Ke ismein tum koi bal aur salwat (neither curve nor crease) na dekhoge

t: Yawmaithin yattabiAAoona alddaAAiya la AAiwaja lahu wakhashaAAati alaswatu lilrrahmani fala tasmaAAu illa hamsan
u: Us roz sab log munadi (summoner /pukarne waley) ki pukar par seedhey chaley aayenge, koi zara akad na dikha sakega aur aawazein rehman ke aagey dub jayengi , ek sar-sarahat ke siwa tum kuch na sunoge

t: Yawmaithin la tanfaAAu alshshafaAAatu illa man athina lahu alrrahmanu waradiya lahu qawlan
u: Us roz shafaat (intercession) kaargar na hogi, illa yeh ke kisi ko rehman iski ijazat de aur uski baat sunna pasand karey

t: YaAAlamu ma bayna aydeehim wama khalfahum wala yuheetoona bihi AAilman
u: Woh logon ka agla pichla sub haal jaanta hai aur dusron ko iska poora ilm nahin hai

t: WaAAanati alwujoohu lilhayyi alqayyoomi waqad khaba man hamala thulman
u: Logon ke sar us hayyul qayyum (zinda aur qayam) ke aagey jhuk jayenge. Na-murad hoga jo us waqt kisi zulm ka baar (bojh)-e-gunaah uthaye huey ho

t: Waman yaAAmal mina alssalihati wahuwa muminun fala yakhafu thulman wala hadman
u: Aur kisi zulm ya haqq talafi ka khatra na hoga us shaks ko jo neik amal karey aur iske saath woh momin bhi ho

t: Wakathalika anzalnahu quranan AAarabiyyan wasarrafna feehi mina alwaAAeedi laAAallahum yattaqoona aw yuhdithu lahum thikran
u: Aur (aey Muhammad) isi tarah humne isey Quran e arabi bana kar nazil kiya hai aur ismein tarah tarah se tambihaat (warnings) ki hain shayad ke yeh log kajhrawi (perverseness) se bachein ya in mein kuch hosh ke aasaar is ki badaulat paida hon

t: FataAAala Allahu almaliku alhaqqu wala taAAjal bialqurani min qabli an yuqda ilayka wahyuhu waqul rabbi zidnee AAilman
u: Pas baala o bartar hai Allah, baadshah e haqiqi. Aur dekho, Quran padhne mein jaldi na kiya karo jabtak ke tumhari taraf uski wahee takmeel ko na pahunch jaye, aur dua karo ke aey parwardigar mujhey mazeed ilm ata kar

t: Walaqad AAahidna ila adama min qablu fanasiya walam najid lahu AAazman
u: Humne issey pehle Adam ko ek hukum diya tha, magar woh bhool gaya aur humne us mein azm (determination/firm resolve) na paya

t: Waith qulna lilmalaikati osjudoo liadama fasajadoo illa ibleesa aba
u: Yaad karo woh waqt jabke humne Farishton se kaha tha ke Adam ko sajda karo, woh sab to sajda kar gaye, magar ek iblis tha ke inkar kar baitha

t: Faqulna ya adamu inna hatha AAaduwwun laka walizawjika fala yukhrijannakuma mina aljannati fatashqa
u: Ispar humne Adam se kaha ke “dekho, yeh tumhara aur tumhari biwi ka dushman hai, aisa na ho ke yeh tumhein jannat se nikalwa de aur tum museebat mein padh jao

t: Inna laka alla tajooAAa feeha wala taAAra
u: Yahan to tumhein yeh aasaishein (facilities) hasil hain ke na bhuke nange rehte ho

t: Waannaka la tathmao feeha wala tadha
u: Na pyas aur dhoop tumhein satati hai”

t: Fawaswasa ilayhi alshshaytanu qala ya adamu hal adulluka AAala shajarati alkhuldi wamulkin la yabla
u: Lekin shaytan ne usko phuslaya, kehne laga “Adam, bataun tumhein woh darakht jissey abadi zindagi aur la-zawal (everlasting) sultanat hasil hoti hai?”

t: Faakala minha fabadat lahuma sawatuhuma watafiqa yakhsifani AAalayhima min waraqi aljannati waAAasa adamu rabbahu faghawa
u: Aakhir e kaar woh dono (miyan biwi) us darakht ka phal kha gaye, natija ye hua ke fawran hi unke satr (nakedness) ek dusre ke aagey khul gaye aur lagey dono apne aap ko jannat ke patton se dhankne. Adam ne apne Rubb ki nafarmani ki aur raah-e-raast se bhatak gaya

t: Thumma ijtabahu rabbuhu fataba AAalayhi wahada
u: Phir uske Rubb ne usey barguzida kiya aur uski tawba qabool karli aur usey hidayat bakshi

t: Qala ihbita minha jameeAAan baAAdukum libaAAdin AAaduwwun faimma yatiyannakum minnee hudan famani ittabaAAa hudaya fala yadillu wala yashqa
u: Aur farmaya “tum dono (fareeq, yaani Insaan aur shaytan) yahan se utar jao, tum ek dusre ke dushman rahogey. Ab agar meri taraf se tumhein koi hidayat pahunche to jo koi meri us hidayat ki pairwi karega woh na bhatkega na badbakhti mein mubtala hoga

t: Waman aAArada AAan thikree fainna lahu maAAeeshatan dankan wanahshuruhu yawma alqiyamati aAAman
u: Aur jo mere “zikr” (dars e naseehat) se mooh moadega uske liye duniya mein tangg zindagi hogi aur qayamat ke roz hum usey andha utayenge”

t: Qala rabbi lima hashartanee aAAma waqad kuntu baseeran
u: Woh kahega “parwardigar, duniya mein to main ankhon wala tha, yahan mujhey andha kyun uthaya?”

t: Qala kathalika atatka ayatuna fanaseetaha wakathalika alyawma tunsa
u: Allah taala farmayega “haan, isi tarah tu hamari aayat ko, jabke woh tere paas aayi thi, tu nay bhula diya tha usi tarah aaj tu bhulaya jaa raha hai”

t: Wakathalika najzee man asrafa walam yumin biayati rabbihi walaAAathabu alakhirati ashaddu waabqa
u: Is tarah hum hadd se guzarne waley aur apne Rubb ki aayat na maanne waley ko (duniya mein ) badla dete hain aur aakhirat ka azaab zyada sakht aur zyada dair pa hai (more lasting)

t: Afalam yahdi lahum kam ahlakna qablahum mina alqurooni yamshoona fee masakinihim inna fee thalika laayatin liolee alnnuha
u: Phir kya in logon ko (tareekh ke is sabaq se) koi hidayat na mili ke insey pehle kitni hi qaumon ko hum halaak kar chuke hain jinki (barbaad shuda) bastiyon mein aaj yeh chalte phirte hain? Dar haqeeqat ismein bahut si nishaniyan hain un logon ke liye jo aqal e saleem rakhne walay hain

t: Walawla kalimatun sabaqat min rabbika lakana lizaman waajalun musamman
u: Agar tere Rubb ki taraf se pehle ek baat tai na kardi gayi hoti aur mohlat ki ek muddat muqarrar na ki jaa chuki hoti to zaroor inka bhi faisla chuka diya jata

t: Faisbir AAala ma yaqooloona wasabbih bihamdi rabbika qabla tulooAAi alshshamsi waqabla ghuroobiha wamin anai allayli fasabbih waatrafa alnnahari laAAallaka tarda
u: Pas (aey Muhammad), jo baatein yeh log banate hain unpar sabr karo, aur apne Rubb ki hamd o sana ke saath uski tasbeeh karo Suraj nikalne se pehle aur guroob honay se pehle, aur raat ke auqat mein bhi tasbeeh karo aur din ke kinaron par bhi, shayad ke tum raazi ho jao

t: Wala tamuddanna AAaynayka ila ma mattaAAna bihi azwajan minhum zahrata alhayati alddunya linaftinahum feehi warizqu rabbika khayrun waabqa
u: Aur nigah utha kar bhi na dekho duniyavi zindagi ki us shaan o shaukat ko jo humne in mein se mukhtalif kism ke logon ko de rakkhi hai, woh to humne unhein aazmaish mein daalne ke liye di hai, aur tere Rubb ka diya hua rizq e halal hi behtar aur paaindatar (more lasting) hai

t: Wamur ahlaka bialssalati waistabir AAalayha la nasaluka rizqan nahnu narzuquka waalAAaqibatu lilttaqwa
u: Apne ehal o ayal (member of your family) ko namaz ki talkeen karo aur khud bhi iske paband raho, hum tumse koi rizq nahin chahte, rizq to hum hi tumhein de rahey hain aur anjaam ki bhalayi taqwa hi ke liye hai

t: Waqaloo lawla yateena biayatin min rabbihi awalam tatihim bayyinatu ma fee alssuhufi aloola
u: Woh kehte hain ke yeh shaks apne Rubb ki taraf se koi nishani (mojaza) kyun nahin laata? Aur kya inke paas agle saheefon ki tamaam taleemat ka bayan e wazeh nahin aa gaya

t: Walaw anna ahlaknahum biAAathabin min qablihi laqaloo rabbana lawla arsalta ilayna rasoolan fanattabiAAa ayatika min qabli an nathilla wanakhza
u: Agar hum uske aane se pehle inko kisi azaab se halaak kardete to phir yahi log kehte ke aey hamare parwardigar, tu nay hamare paas koi Rasool kyun na bheja ke zaleel o ruswa honay se pehle hi hum teri aayat ki pairwi ikhtiyar kar letay

t: Qul kullun mutarabbisun fatarabbasoo fasataAAlamoona man ashabu alssirati alssawiyyi wamani ihtada
u: (Aey Muhammad) insey kaho, har ek anjaam e kaar ke intezar mein hai, pas ab muntazir raho, anqareeb tumhein maloom ho jayega ke kaun seedhi raah chalne waley hain aur kaun hidayat-yafta (rightly guided) hain

t: Iqtaraba lilnnasi hisabuhum wahum fee ghaflatin muAAridoona
u: Qareeb aa gaya hai logon ke hisaab ka waqt, aur woh hain ke gaflat mein mooh moadey huey hain

t: Ma yateehim min thikrin min rabbihim muhdathin illa istamaAAoohu wahum yalAAaboona
u: Unke paas jo taaza naseehat bhi unke Rubb ki taraf se aati hai usko be-takalluf sunte hain aur khel mein padey rehte hain

t: Lahiyatan quloobuhum waasarroo alnnajwa allatheena thalamoo hal hatha illa basharun mithlukum afatatoona alssihra waantum tubsiroona
u: Dil unke (dusri hi fikron mein) munhamik hain aur zalim aapas mein sargoshiyan(whisper) karte hain ke “yeh shaks aakhir tum jaisa ek bashar (Insaan) hi to hai, phir kya tum aankhon dekhte jaadu ke phanday mein phas jaogey?”

t: Qala rabbee yaAAlamu alqawla fee alssamai waalardi wahuwa alssameeAAu alAAaleemu
u: Rasool ne kaha, mera Rubb har us baat ko jaanta hai jo aasman aur zameen mein ki jaye, woh sami(sunne wala) aur aleem (jaanne wala) hai

t: Bal qaloo adghathu ahlamin bali iftarahu bal huwa shaAAirun falyatina biayatin kama orsila alawwaloona
u: Woh kehte hain “balke yeh paraganda (incoherent) khwab hai , balke yeh iski mann-ghadath hai, balke yeh shaks shayar hai warna yeh laye koi nishani jis tarah purane zamane ke Rasool nishaniyon ke saath bheje gaye thay”

t: Ma amanat qablahum min qaryatin ahlaknaha afahum yuminoona
u: Halaanke inse pehle koi basti bhi, jisey humne halaak kiya, iman na layi, ab kya yeh iman layenge

t: Wama arsalna qablaka illa rijalan noohee ilayhim faisaloo ahla alththikri in kuntum la taAAlamoona
u: Aur (aey Muhammad), tumse pehle bhi humne Insaano hi ko Rasool bana kar bheja tha jinpar hum wahee (revelation) kiya karte thay, Tum log agar ilm nahin rakhte to ehle kitaab se pooch lo

t: Wama jaAAalnahum jasadan la yakuloona alttaAAama wama kanoo khalideena
u: Un Rasoolon ko humne koi aisa jism nahin diya tha ke woh khate na hon, aur na woh sadaa (hamesha) jeenay waley thay

t: Thumma sadaqnahumu alwaAAda faanjaynahum waman nashao waahlakna almusrifeena
u: Phir dekhlo ke aakhir e kaar humne unke saath apne wadey poorey kiye, aur unhein aur jis jis ko humne chaha bacha liya, aur hadd se guzar janey walon ko halaak kardiya

t: Laqad anzalna ilaykum kitaban feehi thikrukum afala taAAqiloona
u: Logon, humne tumhari taraf ek aisi kitaab bheji hai jismein tumhara hi zikr hai, kya tum samajhte nahin ho

t: Wakam qasamna min qaryatin kanat thalimatan waanshana baAAdaha qawman akhareena
u: Kitni hi zalim bastiyan hain jinko humne pees kar rakh diya aur unke baad dusri kisi qaum ko uthaya

t: Falamma ahassoo basana itha hum minha yarkudoona
u: Jab unko hamara azaab mehsoos hua to lagey wahan se bhaagne

t: La tarkudoo wairjiAAoo ila ma otriftum feehi wamasakinikum laAAallakum tusaloona
u: (kaha gaya) “bhaago nahin, jao apne unhi gharon mein aur aesh ke samaano mein jinke andar tum chain kar rahey thay, shayad ke tumse poocha jaye”

t: Qaloo ya waylana inna kunna thalimeena
u: Kehne lagey “haye hamari kambakhti, beshak hum khatawaar thay”

t: Fama zalat tilka daAAwahum hatta jaAAalnahum haseedan khamideena
u: Aur woh yahi pukarte rahey yahan tak ke humne unko khalyan (threshed/field that is reaped) kardiya , zindagi ka ek sharara tak unmein na raha (leaving no spark of life in them)

t: Wama khalaqna alssamaa waalarda wama baynahuma laAAibeena
u: Humne is aasman aur zameen ko aur jo kuch bhi inmein hai kuch khel ke taur par nahin banaya hai

t: Law aradna an nattakhitha lahwan laittakhathnahu min ladunna in kunna faAAileena
u: Agar hum koi khilona banan chahte aur bas yahi kuch humein karna hota to apne hi paas se kar letey

t: Bal naqthifu bialhaqqi AAala albatili fayadmaghuhu faitha huwa zahiqun walakumu alwaylu mimma tasifoona
u: Magar hum to baatil par haqq ki chot lagate hain jo uska sar todh deti hai aur woh dekhte dekhte mitt jata hai, aur tumhare liye tabahi hai un baaton ki wajah se jo tum banate ho

t: Walahu man fee alssamawati waalardi waman AAindahu la yastakbiroona AAan AAibadatihi wala yastahsiroona
u: Zameen aur aasmano mein jo makhlooq bhi hai Allah ki hai aur jo (Farishtey) uske paas hain woh na apne aap ko bada samajh kar uski bandagi se sartabi karte hain aur na malool (weary /tire) hotey hain

t: Yusabbihoona allayla waalnnahara la yafturoona
u: Shab-o-roz uski tasbeeh karte rehte hain, dum nahin letey

t: Ami ittakhathoo alihatan mina alardi hum yunshiroona
u: Kya in logon ke banaye huey arzi khuda aisey hain ke (be-jaan ko jaan baksh kar) utha khada karte hon

t: Law kana feehima alihatun illa Allahu lafasadata fasubhana Allahi rabbi alAAarshi AAamma yasifoona
u: Agar aasman o zameen mein ek Allah ke siwa dusre khuda bhi hotey to (zameen aur aasman) dono ka nizam bigad jata. Pas paak hai Allah Rabbul arsh un baaton se jo yeh log bana rahey hain

t: La yusalu AAamma yafAAalu wahum yusaloona
u: Woh apne kaamon ke liye (kisi ke aagey) jawab-de nahin hai aur sab jawab-de hain

t: Ami ittakhathoo min doonihi alihatan qul hatoo burhanakum hatha thikru man maAAiya wathikru man qablee bal aktharuhum la yaAAlamoona alhaqqa fahum muAAridoona
u: Kya usey chodh kar inhon ne dusre khuda bana liye hain? (Aey Muhammad) inse kaho ke “lao apni daleel,yeh kitaab bhi maujood hai jismein mere daur ke logon ke liye naseehat hai aur woh kitaabein bhi maujood hain jin mein mujhse pehle logon ke liye naseehat thi” magar un mein se aksar log haqeeqat se bekhabar hain, is liye mooh moadey huey hain

t: Wama arsalna min qablika min rasoolin illa noohee ilayhi annahu la ilaha illa ana faoAAbudooni
u: Humne tumse pehle jo Rasool bhi bheja hai usko yahi wahee ki hai ke mere siwa koi khuda nahin hai, pas tumlog meri hi bandagi karo

t: Waqaloo ittakhatha alrrahmanu waladan subhanahu bal AAibadun mukramoona
u: Yeh kehte hain “rehman aulad rakhta hai” SubhanAllah , woh to banday hain jinhein izzat di gayi hai

t: La yasbiqoonahu bialqawli wahum biamrihi yaAAmaloona
u: Uske huzoor badh kar nahin bolte aur bas uske hukum par amal karte hain

t: YaAAlamu ma bayna aydeehim wama khalfahum wala yashfaAAoona illa limani irtada wahum min khashyatihi mushfiqoona
u: Jo kuch unke saamne hai usey bhi woh jaanta hai aur jo kuch unse ojhal hai ussey bhi woh bakhabar hai, woh kisi ki sifarish nahin karte bajuz uske jiske haqq mein sifarish sunne par Allah raazi ho, aur woh uske khauf se darey rehte hain

t: Waman yaqul minhum innee ilahun min doonihi fathalika najzeehi jahannama kathalika najzee alththalimeena
u: Aur jo unmein se koi kehde ke Allah ke siwa main bhi ek khuda hoon, to usey hum jahannum ki saza dein, hamare haan zaalimon ka yahi badla hai

t: Awalam yara allatheena kafaroo anna alssamawati waalarda kanata ratqan fafataqnahuma wajaAAalna mina almai kulla shayin hayyin afala yuminoona
u: Kya yeh log jinhon ne (Nabi ki baat maanney se) inkar kardiya hai gaur nahin karte ke yeh sab aasman aur zameen baham miley huey thay, phir humne inhein juda kiya, aur pani se har zinda cheez paida ki, kya woh (hamari is khallaqi ko) nahin maante

t: WajaAAalna fee alardi rawasiya an tameeda bihim wajaAAalna feeha fijajan subulan laAAallahum yahtadoona
u: Aur humne zameen mein pahad jamaa diye taa-ke woh unhein lekar dhulak na jaye, aur ismein kushada raahein bana di, shayad ke log apna raasta maloom karlein

t: WajaAAalna alssamaa saqfan mahfoothan wahum AAan ayatiha muAAridoona
u: Aur humne aasman ko ek mehfooz chatt bana diya, magar ye hain ke iski nishaniyon ki taraf tawajju hi nahin karte

t: Wahuwa allathee khalaqa allayla waalnnahara waalshshamsa waalqamara kullun fee falakin yasbahoona
u: Aur woh Allah hi hai jisne raat aur din banaye aur Suraj aur Chand ko paida kiya, sab ek ek falak mein tair rahey hain

t: Wama jaAAalna libasharin min qablika alkhulda afain mitta fahumu alkhalidoona
u: Aur (aey Muhammad), hameshgi(eternity) to humne tumse pehle bhi kisi Insaan ke liye nahin rakkhi hai agar tum mar gaye to kya yeh log hamesha jeetay rahenge

t: Kullu nafsin thaiqatu almawti wanablookum bialshsharri waalkhayri fitnatan wailayna turjaAAoona
u: Har jaandaar ko maut ka maza chakhna hai, aur hum acchey aur burey halaat mein daal kar tum sabki aazmaish kar rahey hain, aakhir-e-kaar tumhein hamari hi taraf palatna hai

t: Waitha raaka allatheena kafaroo in yattakhithoonaka illa huzuwan ahatha allathee yathkuru alihatakum wahum bithikri alrrahmani hum kafiroona
u: Yeh munkireen e haqq jab tumhein dekhte hain to tumhara mazaaq bana letey hain. Kehte hain “kya yeh hai woh shaks jo tumhare khudaon ka zikr kiya karta hai?” aur inka apna haal yeh hai ke rehman ke zikr se munkir hain

t: Khuliqa alinsanu min AAajalin saoreekum ayatee fala tastaAAjiloona
u: Insaan jald baaz makhlooq hai, abhi main tumko apni nishaniyan dikhaye deta hoon, jaldi na machao

t: Wayaqooloona mata hatha alwaAAdu in kuntum sadiqeena
u: Yeh log kehte hain “aakhir yeh dhamki poori kab hogi agar tum sacchey ho”

t: Law yaAAlamu allatheena kafaroo heena la yakuffoona AAan wujoohihimu alnnara wala AAan thuhoorihim wala hum yunsaroona
u: Kaash in kaafiron ko us waqt ka kuch ilam hota jabke yeh na apne mooh aag se bacha sakenge na apni peethein, aur na inko kahin se madad pahunchegi

t: Bal tateehim baghtatan fatabhatuhum fala yastateeAAoona raddaha wala hum yuntharoona
u: Woh balaa (catastrophe) achanak aayegi aur inhein is tarah yaklakht (suddenly) daboch legi ke yeh na usko dafaa kar sakenge aur na inko lamha bhar mohlat hi mil sakegi

t: Walaqadi istuhzia birusulin min qablika fahaqa biallatheena sakhiroo minhum ma kanoo bihi yastahzioona
u: Mazaaq tumse pehle bhi Rasoolon ka udaya jaa chuka hai, magar unka mazaaq udane waley usi cheez ke pher mein aa kar rahey jiska woh mazaaq udatey thay

t: Qul man yaklaokum biallayli waalnnahari mina alrrahmani bal hum AAan thikri rabbihim muAAridoona
u: (Aey Muhammad), insey kaho, “kaun hai jo raat ko ya din ko tumhein rehman se bacha sakta ho?” magar yeh apne Rubb ki naseehat se mooh moad rahey hain

t: Am lahum alihatun tamnaAAuhum min doonina la yastateeAAoona nasra anfusihim wala hum minna yushaboona
u: Kya yeh kuch aise khuda rakhte hain jo hamare muqable mein inki himayat karein? Woh na to khud apni madad kar sakte hain aur na hamari hi taaeed unko haasil hai

t: Bal mattaAAna haolai waabaahum hatta tala AAalayhimu alAAumuru afala yarawna anna natee alarda nanqusuha min atrafiha afahumu alghaliboona
u: Asal baat yeh hai ke in logon ko aur inke aabaa o ajdaad (fore-fathers) ko hum zindagi ka sar o saamaan diye chale gaye yahan tak ke inko din lag gaye (until the period grew too long for them). Magar kya inhein nazar nahin aata ke hum zameen ko mukhtalif simton se ghataye chale aa rahey hain (shrinking its boundaries)? Phir kya yeh gaalib aa jayenge

t: Qul innama onthirukum bialwahyi wala yasmaAAu alssummu aldduAAaa itha ma yuntharoona
u: Inse kehdo ke “main to wahee (revelation) ki bina par tumhein mutanabbeh (warn) kar raha hoon”. Magar behre pukaar ko nahin suna karte jabke unhein khabardaar kiya jaye

t: Walain massathum nafhatun min AAathabi rabbika layaqoolunna ya waylana inna kunna thalimeena
u: Aur agar tere Rubb ka azaab zara sa inhein choo jaye to abhi cheekh utthein ke haaye hamari kambakhti, beshak hum khatawaar thay

t: WanadaAAu almawazeena alqista liyawmi alqiyamati fala tuthlamu nafsun shayan wain kana mithqala habbatin min khardalin atayna biha wakafa bina hasibeena
u: Qayamat ke roz hum theek theek toalne waley tarazu rakh dengey, phir kisi shaks par zarra barabar zulm na hoga. Jiska rai (mustard seed) ke daane ke barabar bhi kuch kiya dhara hoga woh hum saamne le aayenge aur hisaab lagane ke liye hum kafi hain

t: Walaqad atayna moosa waharoona alfurqana wadiyaan wathikran lilmuttaqeena
u: Pehle hum Moosa aur Haroon ko furqan(criteria) aur roshni aur “zikr” ata kar chuke hain un muttaqi logon ki bhalayi ke liye

t: Allatheena yakhshawna rabbahum bialghaybi wahum mina alssaAAati mushfiqoona
u: Jo bay-dekhe (bagair dekhe) apne Rubb se darein aur jinko (hisaab ki) us ghadi ka khatka laga hua hai

t: Wahatha thikrun mubarakun anzalnahu afaantum lahu munkiroona
u: Aur ab yeh ba-barakat “zikr” humne (tumhare liye) nazil kiya hai phir kya tum isko qabool karne se inkaari ho

t: Walaqad atayna ibraheema rushdahu min qablu wakunna bihi AAalimeena
u: Ussey bhi pehle humne Ibrahim ko uski hosh-mandi bakshi thi aur hum usko khoob jantey thay

t: Ith qala liabeehi waqawmihi ma hathihi alttamatheelu allatee antum laha AAakifoona
u: Yaad karo woh mauqa ke usne apne baap aur apni qaum se kaha tha ke “yeh muratein (images) kaisi hain jinke tumlog girwida (devoted) ho rahey ho?”

t: Qaloo wajadna abaana laha AAabideena
u: Unhon ne jawab diya “humne apne baap dada ko inki ibadat karte paya hai”

t: Qala laqad kuntum antum waabaokum fee dalalin mubeenin
u: Usne kaha “tum bhi gumraah ho aur tumhare baap dada bhi sareeh gumaraahi mein paday huey thay?”

t: Qaloo ajitana bialhaqqi am anta mina allaAAibeena
u: Unhon ne kaha “kya tu hamare samne apne asli khayalaat pesh kar raha hai ya mazaaq karta hai?”

t: Qala bal rabbukum rabbu alssamawati waalardi allathee fatarahunna waana AAala thalikum mina alshshahideena
u: Usne jawab diya “nahin, balke fil waqey tumhara Rubb wahi hai jo zameen aur aasmano ka Rubb aur unka paida karne wala hai, ispar main tumhare samne gawahi deta hoon

t: WataAllahi laakeedanna asnamakum baAAda an tuwalloo mudbireena
u: Aur khuda ki kasam main tumhari gair maujoodgi mein zaroor tumhare buthon (idols/murtiyon) ki khabar lunga”

t: FajaAAalahum juthathan illa kabeeran lahum laAAallahum ilayhi yarjiAAoona
u: Chunanchey usne unko tukde tukde kardiya aur sirf unke baday ko chodh diya taa-ke shayad woh iski taraf rujoo karein

t: Qaloo man faAAala hatha bialihatina innahu lamina alththalimeena
u: Unhon ne aakar buthon[idols] ka yeh haal dekha to) kehne lagey “hamare khudaon ka yeh haal kisne kardiya? Bada hi koi zalim tha woh”

t: Qaloo samiAAna fatan yathkuruhum yuqalu lahu ibraheemu
u: (baaz log) boley “ humne ek nawjawan ko inka zikr karte suna tha jiska naam Ibrahim hai”

t: Qaloo fatoo bihi AAala aAAyuni alnnasi laAAallahum yashhadoona
u: Unhon ne kaha “ to pakad lao usey sabke samne taa-ke log dekh lein (uski kaisi khabar li jati hai)”

t: Qaloo aanta faAAalta hatha bialihatina ya ibraheemu
u: (Ibrahim ke aane par) unhon ne pucha “kyun Ibrahim, tu nay hamare khudaon ke saath yeh harakat ki hai

t: Qala bal faAAalahu kabeeruhum hatha faisaloohum in kanoo yantiqoona
u: Usne jawab diya “balke yeh sab kuch inke is sardar ne kiya hai, inhi se pooch lo agar yeh bolte hon”

t: FarajaAAoo ila anfusihim faqaloo innakum antumu alththalimoona
u: Yeh sunkar woh log apne zameer ki taraf palte aur (apne dilon mein) kehne lagey “waqayi tum khud hi zalim ho”

t: Thumma nukisoo AAala ruoosihim laqad AAalimta ma haolai yantiqoona
u: Magar phir unki math palat gayi(minds became perverse) aur boley “ tu jaanta hai ke yeh bolte nahin hain”

t: Qala afataAAbudoona min dooni Allahi ma la yanfaAAukum shayan wala yadurrukum
u: Ibrahim ne kaha “phir kya tum Allah ko chodh kar un cheezon ko poojh rahey ho jo na tumhein nafaa pahunchane par qadir hain na nuqsan

t: Offin lakum walima taAAbudoona min dooni Allahi afala taAAqiloona
u: Tuff (Fie) hai tumpar aur tumhare in maboodon par jinki tum Allah ko chodh kar pooja kar rahey ho, kya tum kuch bhi aqal nahin rakhte?”

t: Qaloo harriqoohu waonsuroo alihatakum in kuntum faAAileena
u: Unhon ne kaha “jala daalo isko aur himayat karo apne khudaon ki agar tumhein kuch karna hai”

t: Qulna ya naru koonee bardan wasalaman AAala ibraheema
u: Humne kaha “Aey aag, thandi ho jaa aur salamati ban jaa Ibrahim par”

t: Waaradoo bihi kaydan fajaAAalnahumu alakhsareena
u: Woh chahte thay ke Ibrahim ke saath burayi karein magar humne unko buri tarah nakaam kardiya

t: Wanajjaynahu walootan ila alardi allatee barakna feeha lilAAalameena
u: Aur hum usey aur Lut ko bacha kar us sar-zameen ki taraf nikal le gaye jismein humne duniya walon ke liye barkatein rakkhi hain

t: Wawahabna lahu ishaqa wayaAAqooba nafilatan wakullan jaAAalna saliheena
u: Aur humne usey Ishaq ata kiya aur Yakoob uspar mazeed, aur har ek ko saleh (righteous) banaya

t: WajaAAalnahum aimmatan yahdoona biamrina waawhayna ilayhim fiAAla alkhayrati waiqama alssalati waeetaa alzzakati wakanoo lana AAabideena
u: Aur humne unko imam bana diya jo hamare hukum se rehnumayi karte thay aur humne unhein wahee (revelation) ke zariye neik kaamon ki aur namaz qayam karne ki aur zakat dene ki hidayat ki, aur woh hamare ibadat guzaar thay

t: Walootan ataynahu hukman waAAilman wanajjaynahu mina alqaryati allatee kanat taAAmalu alkhabaitha innahum kanoo qawma sawin fasiqeena
u: Aur Lut ko humne hukum aur ilm baksha aur usey us basti se bacha kar nikal diya jo badkariyan karti thi. Dar haqeeqat woh badi hi buri, fasiq qaum thi

t: Waadkhalnahu fee rahmatina innahu mina alssaliheena
u: Aur Lut ko humne apni rehmat mein dakhil kiya, woh saleh logon mein se tha

t: Wanoohan ith nada min qablu faistajabna lahu fanajjaynahu waahlahu mina alkarbi alAAatheemi
u: Aur yahi niyamat humne Nooh ko di, yaad karo jabke in sab se pehle usne humein pukara tha, humne uski dua qabool ki aur usey aur uske ghar walon ko karb-e-azeem (great calamity) se najaat di

t: Wanasarnahu mina alqawmi allatheena kaththaboo biayatina innahum kanoo qawma sawin faaghraqnahum ajmaAAeena
u: Aur us qaum ke muqaable mein uski madad ki jisne hamari aayat ko jhutla diya tha. Woh baday burey log thay, pas humne un sabko garq (drown) kardiya

t: Wadawooda wasulaymana ith yahkumani fee alharthi ith nafashat feehi ghanamu alqawmi wakunna lihukmihim shahideena
u: Aur isi niyamat se humne Dawood aur Suleiman ko sarfaraz kiya. Yaad karo woh mauqa jabke woh dono ek khet (field) ke muqaddame mein faisla kar rahey thay jismein raat ke waqt dusre logon ki bakriyan(goats) phayl gayi thin (strayed at night),aur hum unki adalat khud dekh rahey thay

t: Fafahhamnaha sulaymana wakullan atayna hukman waAAilman wasakhkharna maAAa dawooda aljibala yusabbihna waalttayra wakunna faAAileena
u: Us waqt humne sahih faisla Sulaiman ko samjha diya, halaanke hukum aur ilm humne dono hi ko ata kiya tha. Dawood ke saath humne pahadon aur parindon ko musakkhar kardiya tha jo tasbeeh karte thay, is fail (kaam) ke karne waley hum hi thay

t: WaAAallamnahu sanAAata laboosin lakum lituhsinakum min basikum fahal antum shakiroona
u: Aur humne usko tumhare faiyde ke liye zira (coats of armor) banane ki sanat (craft) sikha di thi, taa-ke tumko ek dusre ki maar se bachaye, phir kya tum shukar guzar ho

t: Walisulaymana alrreeha AAasifatan tajree biamrihi ila alardi allatee barakna feeha wakunna bikulli shayin AAalimeena
u: Aur Sulaiman ke liye humne teiz hawa ko musakkhar kardiya tha jo uske hukum se us sar-zameen ki taraf chalti thi jismein humne barkatein rakkhi hain. Hum har cheez ka ilm rakhne waley thay

t: Wamina alshshayateeni man yaghoosoona lahu wayaAAmaloona AAamalan doona thalika wakunna lahum hafitheena
u: Aur shayateen mein se humne aisey bahutson (many) ko uska tabey bana diya tha jo uske liye ghotey (diving) lagate aur iske siwa dusre kaam karte thay, in sab ke nigraan hum hi thay

t: Waayyooba ith nada rabbahu annee massaniya alddurru waanta arhamu alrrahimeena
u: Aur yahi (hosh-mandi aur hukum o ilm ki niyamat) humne Ayub ko di thi. Yaad karo jabke usne apne Rubb ko pukara ke “mujhey bimaari lag gayi hai aur tu arham ur rahimeen (sab se badhkar reham karne wala) hai.”

t: Faistajabna lahu fakashafna ma bihi min durrin waataynahu ahlahu wamithlahum maAAahum rahmatan min AAindina wathikra lilAAabideena
u: Humne uski dua qabool ki aur jo takleef usey thi usko door kardiya, aur sirf uske ehl-o-ayal hi usko nahin diye balke unke saath utne hi aur bhi diye, apni khaas rehmat ke taur par, aur isliye ke yeh ek sabaq ho ibadat guzaaron keliye

t: WaismaAAeela waidreesa watha alkifli kullun mina alssabireena
u: Aur yahi niyamat Ismail aur Idris(Enoch) aur Dhul-Kifl (Isaiah) ko di, ke yeh sab saabir log (practised fortitude) thay

t: Waadkhalnahum fee rahmatina innahum mina alssaliheena
u: Aur unko humne apni rehmat mein dakhil kiya ke woh salihon (righteous people) mein se thay

t: Watha alnnooni ith thahaba mughadiban fathanna an lan naqdira AAalayhi fanada fee alththulumati an la ilaha illa anta subhanaka innee kuntu mina alththalimeena
u: Aur machli waley(yunus) ko bhi humne nawaza, yaad karo jabke woh bigad kar chala gaya tha aur samjha tha ke hum uspar giraft na karenge. Aakhir ko usne tareekiyon(darkness) mein pukara “nahin hai koi khuda magar tu, paak hai teri zaat, beshak maine kasoor kiya”

t: Faistajabna lahu wanajjaynahu mina alghammi wakathalika nunjee almumineena
u: Tab humne uski dua qabool ki aur ghum se usko najaat bakshi, aur isi taraah hum momino ko bacha liya karte hain

t: Wazakariyya ith nada rabbahu rabbi la tatharnee fardan waanta khayru alwaritheena
u: Aur zakariya ko, jabke usne apne Rubb ko pukara ke “aey parwardigar, mujhey akela na chodh, aur behtareen waris to tu hi hai”

t: Faistajabna lahu wawahabna lahu yahya waaslahna lahu zawjahu innahum kanoo yusariAAoona fee alkhayrati wayadAAoonana raghaban warahaban wakanoo lana khashiAAeena
u: Pas humne uski dua qabool ki aur usey Yahya ata kiya aur uski biwi ko uske liye durust kardiya, yeh log neki ke kaamon mein daud-dhoop karte thay aur humein ragbat (with love) aur khauf ke saath pukarte thay, aur hamare aagey jhuke huey thay

t: Waallatee ahsanat farjaha fanafakhna feeha min roohina wajaAAalnaha waibnaha ayatan lilAAalameena
u: Aur woh khaatun jisne apni ismat (chastity) ki hifazat ki thi, humne uske andar apni rooh se phoonka aur usey aur uske bete ko duniya bhar ke liye nishani bana diya

t: Inna hathihi ommatukum ommatan wahidatan waana rabbukum faoAAbudooni
u: Yeh tumhari ummat haqeeqat mein ek hi ummat hai aur main tumhara Rubb hoon, pas tum meri ibadat karo

t: WataqattaAAoo amrahum baynahum kullun ilayna rajiAAoona
u: Magar (yeh logon ki karastani hai ke) inhon ne aapas mein deen ko tukde tukde kar dala, sabko hamari taraf palatna hai

t: Faman yaAAmal mina alssalihati wahuwa muminun fala kufrana lisaAAyihi wainna lahu katiboona
u: Phir jo neik amal karega, is haal mein ke woh momin ho, to uske kaam ki na-qadri na hogi, aur usey hum likh rahey hain

t: Waharamun AAala qaryatin ahlaknaha annahum la yarjiAAoona
u: Aur mumkin nahin hai ke jis basti ko humne halaak kardiya ho woh phir palat sakey

t: Hatta itha futihat yajooju wamajooju wahum min kulli hadabin yansiloona
u: Yahaan tak ke jab yajooj majooj khol diye jayenge aur har bulandi se woh nikal padenge

t: Waiqtaraba alwaAAdu alhaqqu faitha hiya shakhisatun absaru allatheena kafaroo ya waylana qad kunna fee ghaflatin min hatha bal kunna thalimeena
u: Aur wada bar haqq ke poora hone ka waqt qareeb aa lagega to yakayak un logon ke deedhey phatey ke phatey reh jayenge (fixedly stare in horror), jinhon ne kufr kiya tha. Kahenge “haaye hamari kambakhti, hum is cheez ki taraf se gaflat mein padey huey thay, balke hum khatakaar thay.”

t: Innakum wama taAAbudoona min dooni Allahi hasabu jahannama antum laha waridoona
u: Beshak tum aur tumhare woh mabood jinhein tum poojhte ho, jahannum ka indhan (fuel) hain, wahin tumko jana hai

t: Law kana haolai alihatan ma waradooha wakullun feeha khalidoona
u: Agar yeh waqayi khuda hotey to wahan na jatey, ab sabko hamesha usi mein rehna hai.”

t: Lahum feeha zafeerun wahum feeha la yasmaAAoona
u: Wahaan woh phunkare maarenge (groan/roar) aur haal yeh hoga ke usmein kaan padi aawaaz na sunayi degi

t: Inna allatheena sabaqat lahum minna alhusna olaika AAanha mubAAadoona
u: Rahey woh log jinke liye hamari taraf se bhalayi ka pehle hi faisla ho chuka hoga, to woh yaqeenan ussey door rakkhey jayenge

t: La yasmaAAoona haseesaha wahum fee ma ishtahat anfusuhum khalidoona
u: Uski sarsarahat tak na sunenge aur woh hamesha hamesha apni mann bhati cheezon ke darmiyan rahenge

t: La yahzunuhumu alfazaAAu alakbaru watatalaqqahumu almalaikatu hatha yawmukumu allathee kuntum tooAAadoona
u: Woh intihayi ghabrahat ka waqt unko zara pareshan na karega, aur malaika badh kar unko haathon haath lenge ke “yeh tumhara wahi din hai jiska tumse waada kiya jaata tha”

t: Yawma natwee alssamaa katayyi alssijlli lilkutubi kama badana awwala khalqin nuAAeeduhu waAAdan AAalayna inna kunna faAAileena
u: Woh din jabke aasman ko hum yun lapeit kar rakh denge jaise tumar mein awraaq lapeit diye jatey hain (leaves of paper are rolled up in a written scroll) jis tarah pehle humne takhleeq ki ibtida ki thi usi tarah hum phir uska iaada (originate) karenge. Yeh ek wada hai hamare zimme, aur yeh kaam humein bahr-haal karna hai

t: Walaqad katabna fee alzzaboori min baAAdi alththikri anna alarda yarithuha AAibadiya alssalihoona
u: Aur Zaboor mein hum naseehat ke baad yeh likh chuke hain ke zameen ke waris hamare neik banday hongey

t: Inna fee hatha labalaghan liqawmin AAabideena
u: Is mein ek badi khabar hai ibadat guzar logon ke liye

t: Wama arsalnaka illa rahmatan lilAAalameena
u: (Aey Muhammad), humne jo tumko bheja hai to yeh dar-asal duniya walon ke haqq mein hamari rehmat hai

t: Qul innama yooha ilayya annama ilahukum ilahun wahidun fahal antum muslimoona
u: Insey kaho, “mere paas jo wahee aati hai woh yeh hai ke tumhara khuda sirf ek khuda hai, phir kya tum sar-e-itaat jhukate ho?”

t: Fain tawallaw faqul athantukum AAala sawain wain adree aqareebun am baAAeedun ma tooAAadoona
u: Agar woh mooh pherein to kehdo “maine alal-ailaan (openly) tumko khabardaar kardiya hai. Ab yeh main nahin jaanta ke woh cheez jiska tumse wada kiya jaa raha hai qareeb hai ya door

t: Innahu yaAAlamu aljahra mina alqawli wayaAAlamu ma taktumoona
u: Allah woh baatein bhi jaanta hai jo ba-awaaz buland kahi jati hain aur woh bhi jo tum chupa kar karte ho

t: Wain adree laAAallahu fitnatun lakum wamataAAun ila heenin
u: Main to yeh samajhta hoon ke shayad yeh (dair/delay) tumhare liye ek fitna hai aur tumhein ek waqt e khaas tak ke liye mazay karne ka mauqa diya jaa raha hai”

t: Qala rabbi ohkum bialhaqqi warabbuna alrrahmanu almustaAAanu AAala ma tasifoona
u: (aakhi-e-kaar) Rasool ne kaha “aey mere Rubb, haqq ke saath faisla karde, aur logon, tum jo baatein banate ho unke muqable mein hamara Rubb-e-Rehman hi hamare liye madad ka sahara hai.”

t: Ya ayyuha alnnasu ittaqoo rabbakum inna zalzalata alssaAAati shayon AAatheemun
u: Logon, apne Rubb ke gazab se bacho, haqeeqat yeh hai ke qayamat ka zalzala badi (haulnaak) cheez hai

t: Yawma tarawnaha tathhalu kullu murdiAAatin AAamma ardaAAat watadaAAu kullu thati hamlin hamlaha watara alnnasa sukara wama hum bisukara walakinna AAathaba Allahi shadeedun
u: Jis roz tum usey dekhoge, haal yeh hoga ke har doodh pilane wali apne doodh peetay bacchey se gaafil ho jayegi, har haamila (pregnant) ka hamal gir jayega, aur log tumko madhosh nazar aayenge, halanke woh nashey mein na hongey, balke Allah ka azaab hi kuch aisa sakht hoga

t: Wamina alnnasi man yujadilu fee Allahi bighayri AAilmin wayattabiAAu kulla shaytanin mareedin
u: Baaz log aisey hain jo ilm ke bagair Allah ke barey mein bahas karte hain aur har shaytaan e sarkash ki pairwi karne lagte hain

t: Kutiba AAalayhi annahu man tawallahu faannahu yudilluhu wayahdeehi ila AAathabi alssaAAeeri
u: Halanke uske to naseeb hi mein yeh likha hai ke jo usko dost banayega usey woh gumraah karke chodega aur azaab e jahannum ka raasta dikhayega

t: Ya ayyuha alnnasu in kuntum fee raybin mina albaAAthi fainna khalaqnakum min turabin thumma min nutfatin thumma min AAalaqatin thumma min mudghatin mukhallaqatin waghayri mukhallaqatin linubayyina lakum wanuqirru fee alarhami ma nashao ila ajalin musamman thumma nukhrijukum tiflan thumma litablughoo ashuddakum waminkum man yutawaffa waminkum man yuraddu ila arthali alAAumuri likayla yaAAlama min baAAdi AAilmin shayan watara alarda hamidatan faitha anzalna AAalayha almaa ihtazzat warabat waanbatat min kulli zawjin baheejin
u: Logon, agar tumhein zindagi baad e maut ke barey mein kuch shakk hai to tumhein maloom ho ke humne tumko mitti se paida kiya hai, phir nutfe se,phir khoon ke lothdey se, phir gosht ki boti se jo shakal waali bhi hoti hai aur be shakal bhi ( yeh hum isliye bata rahey hain) taa-ke tumpar haqeeqat wazeh kardein, hum jis (nutfe) ko chahte hain ek khaas waqt tak rehemo (wombs) mein thehraye rakhte hain, phir tumko ek bacchey ki surat mein nikal latey hain, (phir tumhein parwarish karte hain) taa-ke tum apni poori jawani ko pahuncho aur tum mein se koi pehle hi wapas bula liya jata hai aur koi badhtareen umar ki taraf pher diya jata hai, taa-ke sab kuch jaanney ke baad phir kuch na janey. Aur tum dekhte ho ke zameen sukhi padi hai, phir jahan humne uspar meh barsaya ke yakayak woh phabak uthi aur phool gayi aur usne har qisam ki khush manzar nabataat(vegetation) ugalni shuri kardi

t: Thalika bianna Allaha huwa alhaqqu waannahu yuhyee almawta waannahu AAala kulli shayin qadeerun
u: Ye sab kuch is wajah se hai ke Allah hi haqq hai, aur woh murdon ko zinda karta hai, aur woh har cheez par qadir hai

t: Waanna alssaAAata atiyatun la rayba feeha waanna Allaha yabAAathu man fee alquboori
u: Aur yeh (is baat ki daleel hai) ke qayamat ki ghadi aakar rahegi, is mein kisi shakk ki gunjaish nahin, aur Allah zaroor un logon ko uthayega jo qabaron mein jaa chuke hain

t: Wamina alnnasi man yujadilu fee Allahi bighayri AAilmin wala hudan wala kitabin muneerin
u: Baaz log aisey hain jo kisi ilm aur hidayat aur roshni bakshne wali kitaab ke bagair, gardan akdaye huey

t: Thaniya AAitfihi liyudilla AAan sabeeli Allahi lahu fee alddunya khizyun wanutheequhu yawma alqiyamati AAathaba alhareeqi
u: Khuda ke barey mein jhagadte hain, taa-ke logon ko raah e khuda se bhatka dein. Aisey shaks ke liye duniya mein ruswayi hai aur qayamat ke roz usko hum aag ke azaab ka maza chakkhayenge

t: Thalika bima qaddamat yadaka waanna Allaha laysa bithallamin lilAAabeedi
u: Yeh hai tera woh mustaqbil (future) jo tere apne haathon ne tere liye tayyar kiya hai, warna Allah apne bandon par zulm karne wala nahin hai

t: Wamina alnnasi man yaAAbudu Allaha AAala harfin fain asabahu khayrun itmaanna bihi wain asabathu fitnatun inqalaba AAala wajhihi khasira alddunya waalakhirata thalika huwa alkhusranu almubeenu
u: Aur logon mein koi aisa hai jo kinare par reh kar Allah ki bandagi karta hai, agar faiyda hua to mutmaeen hogaya aur jo koi museebat aa gayi to ulta phir gaya. Uski duniya bhi gayi aur aakhirat bhi, yeh hai sareeh khasara (loss/nuksaan)

t: YadAAoo min dooni Allahi ma la yadurruhu wama la yanfaAAuhu thalika huwa alddalalu albaAAeedu
u: Phir woh Allah ko chodh kar unko pukarta hai jo na usko nuqsaan pahuncha sakte hain na faiyda, yeh hai gumrahi ki inteha

t: YadAAoo laman darruhu aqrabu min nafAAihi labisa almawla walabisa alAAasheeru
u: Woh unko pukarta hai jinka nuqsaan unke nafey (faiyda) se qareeb tar hai, badhtareen hai us ka maula (guardian) aur badtareen hai uska rafeeq(companion)

t: Inna Allaha yudkhilu allatheena amanoo waAAamiloo alssalihati jannatin tajree min tahtiha alanharu inna Allaha yafAAalu ma yureedu
u: (iske baraks) Allah un logon ko jo iman laye aur jinon ne neik amal kiye, yaqeenan aisi jannaton mein dakhil karega jinke nichey nehrein beh rahi hongi. Allah karta hai jo kuch chahta hai

t: Man kana yathunnu an lan yansurahu Allahu fee alddunya waalakhirati falyamdud bisababin ila alssamai thumma liyaqtaAA falyanthur hal yuthhibanna kayduhu ma yagheethu
u: Jo shaks yeh gumaan rakhta ho ke Allah duniya aur aakhirat mein uski koi madad na karega usey chahiye ke ek rassi (rope) ke zariye aasmaan tak pahunch kar shigaf lagaye(cut a hole into it), phir dekh le ke aaya uski tadbeer kisi aisi cheez ko radd kar sakti hai jo usko nagawar hai

t: Wakathalika anzalnahu ayatin bayyinatin waanna Allaha yahdee man yureedu
u: Aisi hi khuli khuli baaton ke saath humne is Quran ko nazil kiya hai, aur hidayat Allah jisey chahta hai deta hai

t: Inna allatheena amanoo waallatheena hadoo waalssabieena waalnnasara waalmajoosa waallatheena ashrakoo inna Allaha yafsilu baynahum yawma alqiyamati inna Allaha AAala kulli shayin shaheedun
u: Jo log iman laye, aur jo yahudi huey, aur sabayi (Sabaeans), aur nasara ,aur majoos, aur jin logon ne shirk kiya, un sab ke darmiyan Allah qayamat ke roz faisla kardega. Har cheez Allah ki nazar mein hai

t: Alam tara anna Allaha yasjudu lahu man fee alssamawati waman fee alardi waalshshamsu waalqamaru waalnnujoomu waaljibalu waalshshajaru waalddawabbu wakatheerun mina alnnasi wakatheerun haqqa AAalayhi alAAathabu waman yuhini Allahu fama lahu min mukrimin inna Allaha yafAAalu ma yashao
u: Kya tum dekhte nahin ho ke Allah ke aagey sar-ba-sujood hain woh sab jo aasmano mein hain aur jo zameen mein hain, Suraj aur chand aur taarey aur pahad aur darakht aur jaanwar aur bahut se Insaan aur bahut se woh log bhi jo azaab ke mustahiq ho chuke hain? aur jisey Allah zaleel-o-khwar karde usey phir koi izzat dene wala nahin hai. Allah karta hai jo kuch chahta hai

t: Hathani khasmani ikhtasamoo fee rabbihim faallatheena kafaroo quttiAAat lahum thiyabun min narin yusabbu min fawqi ruoosihimu alhameemu
u: Yeh do fareeq hain jinke darmiyan apne Rubb ke maamle ka jhagda hai. In mein se woh log jinhon ne kufr kiya hai unke liye aag ke libaas kaatey ja chuke hain, unke saron (heads) par khaulta (boiling) hua pani dala jayega

t: Yusharu bihi ma fee butoonihim waaljuloodu
u: Jissey unki khalein (skins) hi nahin pait ke andar ke hissey tak gal (melt) jayenge

t: Walahum maqamiAAu min hadeedin
u: Aur unki khabar lene ke liye lohey (iron) ke gurz (maces) honge

t: Kullama aradoo an yakhrujoo minha min ghammin oAAeedoo feeha wathooqoo AAathaba alhareeqi
u: Jab kabhi woh ghabra kar jahannum se nikalne ki koshish karenge phir usi mein dhakeil diye jayenge ke chakkho ab jalne ki saza ka maza

t: Inna Allaha yudkhilu allatheena amanoo waAAamiloo alssalihati jannatin tajree min tahtiha alanharu yuhallawna feeha min asawira min thahabin waluluan walibasuhum feeha hareerun
u: (Dusri taraf) jo log iman laaye aur jinhon ne neik amal kiye unko Allah aisi jannaton mein dakhil karega jinke nichey nehrein beh rahi hongi, wahan woh soonay ke kangano aur motiyon se aarasta kiye jayenge aur unke libas resham ke honge

t: Wahudoo ila alttayyibi mina alqawli wahudoo ila sirati alhameedi
u: Unko pakeeza baat kabool karne ki hidayat bakshi gayi aur unhein khudaye satuda siffat (All Praiseworthy) ka raasta dikhaya gaya

t: Inna allatheena kafaroo wayasuddoona AAan sabeeli Allahi waalmasjidi alharami allathee jaAAalnahu lilnnasi sawaan alAAakifu feehi waalbadi waman yurid feehi biilhadin bithulmin nuthiqhu min AAathabin aleemin
u: Jin logon ne kufr kiya aur jo (aaj) Allah ke raaste se rok rahey hain aur us masjid e haram ki ziyarat mein maney hain jisey humne sab logon ke liye banaya hai, jismein muqami bashindon aur bahar se aane walon ke huqooq barabar hain, (unki rawish yaqeenan saza ki mustahiq hai), is (masjid e haram) mein jo bhi raasti se hatkar (deviate from righteousness) zulm ka tareeqa ikhtiyar karega usey hum dardnaak azaab ka maza chakhayenge

t: Waith bawwana liibraheema makana albayti an la tushrik bee shayan watahhir baytiya lilttaifeena waalqaimeena waalrrukkaAAi alssujoodi
u: Yaad karo woh waqt jab humne Ibrahim ke liye is ghar (khane Kaaba) ki jagah tajweez ki thi (is hidayat ke saath) ke “mere saath kisi cheez ko shareek na karo, aur mere ghar ko tawaf karne walon aur qayam va ruku va sujood karne walon ke liye paak rakho

t: Waaththin fee alnnasi bialhajji yatooka rijalan waAAala kulli damirin yateena min kulli fajjin AAameeqin
u: Aur logon ko hajj ke liye izan e aam (proclamation) de do ke woh tumhare paas har door daraz muqaam se paidal aur ounton(camels) par sawar aayein

t: Liyashhadoo manafiAAa lahum wayathkuroo isma Allahi fee ayyamin maAAloomatin AAala ma razaqahum min baheemati alanAAami fakuloo minha waatAAimoo albaisa alfaqeera
u: Taa-ke woh faiyde dekhein jo yahan unke liye rakkhe gaye hain, aur chandh muqarrar dino mein un jaanwaron par Allah ka naam lein jo usne unhein bakshe hain, khud bhi khayein aur tang-dast mohtaj ko bhi dein

t: Thumma lyaqdoo tafathahum walyoofoo nuthoorahum walyattawwafoo bialbayti alAAateeqi
u: Phir apna mail-kuchel (dirt) door karein aur apni nazrein (vows) poori karein, aur us qadeem (ancient) ghar ka tawaf karein

t: Thalika waman yuAAaththim hurumati Allahi fahuwa khayrun lahu AAinda rabbihi waohillat lakumu alanAAamu illa ma yutla AAalaykum faijtaniboo alrrijsa mina alawthani waijtaniboo qawla alzzoori
u: Yeh tha (taamir e kaaba ka maqsad) aur jo koi Allah ki qayam karda hurmaton (sanctity) ka ehtamam karey to yeh uske Rubb ke nazdeek khud usi keliye behtar hai. Aur tumhare liye maweshi (cattle) jaanwar halal kiye gaye , ma siwa un cheezon ke jo tumhein batayi jaa chuki hain. Pas buthon(Idols) ki gandagi se bacho, jhooti baaton se parheiz karo

t: Hunafaa lillahi ghayra mushrikeena bihi waman yushrik biAllahi fakaannama kharra mina alssamai fatakhtafuhu alttayru aw tahwee bihi alrreehu fee makanin saheeqin
u: Yaksu hokar Allah ke banday bano, uske saath kisi ko shareek na karo aur jo koi Allah ke saath shirk karey to goya woh aasmaan se gir gaya, ab ya to usey parinday uchak le jayenge ya hawa usko aisi jagah le jaa kar phenk degi jahan uske cheethdey udh (shattered into pieces) jayenge

t: Thalika waman yuAAaththim shaAAaira Allahi fainnaha min taqwa alquloobi
u: Yeh hai asal maamla (isey samajh lo), aur jo Allah ke muqarrar karda shaair (sanctity) ka ehtaram karey to yeh dilon ke taqwa se hai

t: Lakum feeha manafiAAu ila ajalin musamman thumma mahilluha ila albayti alAAateeqi
u: Tumhein ek waqt e muqarrar tak un (hadi ke jaanwaron) se faiyda uthane ka haqq hai phir un (ke qurbaan karne) ki jagah usi qadeem ghar ke paas hai

t: Walikulli ommatin jaAAalna mansakan liyathkuroo isma Allahi AAala ma razaqahum min baheemati alanAAami failahukum ilahun wahidun falahu aslimoo wabashshiri almukhbiteena
u: Har ummat ke liye humne qurbani ka ek qaida muqarrar kardiya hai taa-ke (us ummat ke log) un jaanwaron par Allah ka naam lein jo usne unko bakshey hain (in mukhtalif tareeqon ke andar maqsad ek hi hai). Pas tumhara khuda ek hi khuda hi aur usi ke tum mutii e farmaan bano. Aur aey Nabi, basharat de de aajizana (humble ) rawish ikhtiyar karne walon ko

t: Allatheena itha thukira Allahu wajilat quloobuhum waalssabireena AAala ma asabahum waalmuqeemee alssalati wamimma razaqnahum yunfiqoona
u: Jinka haal yeh hai ke Allah ka zikr sunte hain to unke dil kaanp uthte hain, jo museebat bhi unpar aati hai uspar sabr karte hain, namaz qayam karte hai, aur jo kuch rizq humne unko diya hai us mein se kharch karte hain

t: Waalbudna jaAAalnaha lakum min shaAAairi Allahi lakum feeha khayrun faothkuroo isma Allahi AAalayha sawaffa faitha wajabat junoobuha fakuloo minha waatAAimoo alqaniAAa waalmuAAtarra kathalika sakhkharnaha lakum laAAallakum tashkuroona
u: Aur (qurbani ke) ounton (camels) ko humne tumhare liye shaaer-Allah (symbols of Allah) mein shamil kiya hai, tumhare liye un mein bhalayi hai. Pas unhein khada karke unpar Allah ka naam lo, aur jab (qurbani ke baad) unki peethein zameen par tik jayein to unmein se khud bhi khao aur unko bhi khilao jo qanaat kiye baithe hain (contented ones) aur unko bhi jo apni haajat pesh karein. In jaanwaron ko humne is tarah tumhare liye musakkhar kiya hai taa-ke tum shukriya ada karo

t: Lan yanala Allaha luhoomuha wala dimaoha walakin yanaluhu alttaqwa minkum kathalika sakhkharaha lakum litukabbiroo Allaha AAala ma hadakum wabashshiri almuhsineena
u: Na unke gosht Allah ko pahunchte hain na khoon, magar usey tumhara taqwa pahunchta hai. Usne unko tumhare liye is tarah musakkhar kiya hai taa-ke uski bakshi hui hidayat par tum uski takbeer karo. Aur (aey Nabi), basharat dedo neikukar logon ko

t: Inna Allaha yudafiAAu AAani allatheena amanoo inna Allaha la yuhibbu kulla khawwanin kafoorin
u: Yaqeenan Allah mudafiyat (defends) karta hai un logon ki taraf se jo iman laye hain. Yaqeenan Allah kisi khain (treacherous) kafir e niyamat ko pasand nahin karta

t: Othina lillatheena yuqataloona biannahum thulimoo wainna Allaha AAala nasrihim laqadeerun
u: Ijazat de di gayi un logon ko jinke khilaf jung ki jaa rahi hai, kyunke woh mazloom hain, aur Allah yaqeenan unki madad par qadir hai

t: Allatheena okhrijoo min diyarihim bighayri haqqin illa an yaqooloo rabbuna Allahu walawla dafAAu Allahi alnnasa baAAdahum bibaAAdin lahuddimat sawamiAAu wabiyaAAun wasalawatun wamasajidu yuthkaru feeha ismu Allahi katheeran walayansuranna Allahu man yansuruhu inna Allaha laqawiyyun AAazeezun
u: Yeh woh log hain jo apne gharon se na-haqq nikal diye gaye sirf is kasoor par ke woh kehte thay “hamara Rubb Allah hai”. Agar Allah logon ko ek dusre ke zariye dafa na karta rahey to khanqahein (monasteries), aur girja (churches) aur mabad (synagogues) aur masjidein, jin mein Allah ka kasrat se naam liye jata hai, sab mismaar (demolished) kar daali jayein. Allah zaroor un logon ki madad karega jo uski madad karenge. Allah bada taaqatwar aur zabardast hai

t: Allatheena in makkannahum fee alardi aqamoo alssalata waatawoo alzzakata waamaroo bialmaAAroofi wanahaw AAani almunkari walillahi AAaqibatu alomoori
u: Yeh woh log hain jinhein agar hum zameen mein iqtedar bakshein to woh namaz qayam karenge, zakat denge, maroof (bhalayi) ka hukum denge aur munkar (burayi) se mana karenge aur tamaam maamlaat ka anjaam kaar Allah ke haath mein hai

t: Wain yukaththibooka faqad kaththabat qablahum qawmu noohin waAAadun wathamoodu
u: (Aey Nabi), agar woh tumhein jhutlate hain to unse pehle qaum e Nooh aur Aad aur Samood

t: Waqawmu ibraheema waqawmu lootin
u: Aur qaum e Ibrahim aur qaum e Lut

t: Waashabu madyana wakuththiba moosa faamlaytu lilkafireena thumma akhathtuhum fakayfa kana nakeeri
u: Aur ehle madyan bhi jhutla chuke hain aur Moosa bhi jhutlaye jaa chuke hain. Un sab munkireen ko maine pehle mohlat di , phir pakad liya. Ab dekhlo ke meri uqubat(chastisement) kaisi thi
