t: YudaAAaf lahu alAAathabu yawma alqiyamati wayakhlud feehi muhanan
u: Qayamat ke roz usko mukarrar azaab diya jayega aur isi mein woh hamesha zillat ke saath pada rahega

t: Illa man taba waamana waAAamila AAamalan salihan faolaika yubaddilu Allahu sayyiatihim hasanatin wakana Allahu ghafooran raheeman
u: Illa yeh ke koi (in gunaahon ke baad) toubah kar chuka ho aur iman laa kar amal e saleeh karne laga ho, aisey logon ki buraiyon ko Allah bhalaiyon se badal dega aur woh bada gafoor o raheem hai

t: Waman taba waAAamila salihan fainnahu yatoobu ila Allahi mataban
u: Jo shaks toubah karke neik amali ikhtiyar karta hai woh to Allah ki taraf palat aata hai jaisa ke palatne ka haqq hai

t: Waallatheena la yashhadoona alzzoora waitha marroo biallaghwi marroo kiraman
u: (Aur Rehman ke bandey woh hain) jo jhoot ke gawaah nahin bante aur kisi lagv (fizul/vain) cheez par unka guzar ho jaye to shareef aadmiyon ki tarah guzar jatey hain

t: Waallatheena itha thukkiroo biayati rabbihim lam yakhirroo AAalayha summan waAAumyanan
u: Jinhein agar unke Rubb ki aayat suna kar naseehat ki jati hai to woh uspar andhey aur behre bankar nahin reh jatey

t: Waallatheena yaqooloona rabbana hab lana min azwajina wathurriyyatina qurrata aAAyunin waijAAalna lilmuttaqeena imaman
u: Jo duaein maanga karte hain ke, “Aey hamare Rubb, humein apni biwiyon aur apni aulaad se aankhon ki thandak de, aur humko parheizgaaron ka imam bana.”

t: Olaika yujzawna alghurfata bima sabaroo wayulaqqawna feeha tahiyyatan wasalaman
u: Yeh hain woh log jo apne sabr ka phal manzil-e-buland ki shakal mein payenge, aadaab o tasleemaat se unka istaqbaal hoga

t: Khalideena feeha hasunat mustaqarran wamuqaman
u: Woh hamesha hamesha wahan rahenge. Kya hi accha hai woh mustaqar (excellent abode) aur woh muqaam

t: Qul ma yaAAbao bikum rabbee lawla duAAaokum faqad kaththabtum fasawfa yakoonu lizaman
u: (Aey Muhammad), logon se kaho, “mere Rubb ko tumhari kya haajat padi hai agar tum usko na pukaro. Ab ke tumne jhutla diya hai, anqareeb woh saza paogey ke jaan chudhani muhaal (never be able to avoid) hogi”

t: Taseenmeem
u: Taa seen Meem

t: Tilka ayatu alkitabi almubeeni
u: Yeh kitaab e Mubeen ki aayat hain

t: LaAAallaka bakhiAAun nafsaka alla yakoonoo mumineena
u: (Aey Muhammad), shayad tum is gham (grief) mein apni jaan kho dogey ke yeh log iman nahin latey

t: In nasha nunazzil AAalayhim mina alssamai ayatan fathallat aAAnaquhum laha khadiAAeena
u: Hum chahein to aasmaan se aisi nishani nazil kar sakte hain ke inki gardanein iske aagey jhuk jayein

t: Wama yateehim min thikrin mina alrrahmani muhdathin illa kanoo AAanhu muAArideena
u: In logon ke paas rehman ki taraf se jo nayi naseehat bhi aati hai yeh ussey mooh moad letey hain

t: Faqad kaththaboo fasayateehim anbao ma kanoo bihi yastahzioona
u: Ab ke yeh jhutla chuke hain, ankareeb inko is cheez ki haqeeqat (mukhtalif tareeqon se) maloom ho jayegi jiska yeh mazaak udatay rahey hain

t: Awalam yaraw ila alardi kam anbatna feeha min kulli zawjin kareemin
u: Aur kya inhon ne kabhi zameen par nigaah nahin daali ke humne kitni kaseer miqdaar mein har tarah ki umdah nabataat(vegetation) ismein paida ki hain

t: Inna fee thalika laayatan wama kana aktharuhum mumineena
u: Yaqeenen ismein ek nishani hai, magar in mein se aksar maanne waley nahin

t: Wainna rabbaka lahuwa alAAazeezu alrraheemu
u: Aur haqeeqat yeh hai ke tera Rubb zabardast bhi hai aur raheem bhi

t: Waith nada rabbuka moosa ani iti alqawma alththalimeena
u: Inhein us waqt ka qissa sunao jabke tumhare Rubb ne Moosa ko pukara “ zaalim qaum ke paas jaa

t: Qawma firAAawna ala yattaqoona
u: Firoun ki qaum ke paas, kya woh nahin darte?”

t: Qala rabbi innee akhafu an yukaththibooni
u: Usne arz kiya “aey Rubb, mujhey khauf hai ke woh mujhey jhutla dengey

t: Wayadeequ sadree wala yantaliqu lisanee faarsil ila haroona
u: Mera seena ghutt-ta hai aur meri zubaan nahin chalti, aap Haroon ki taraf risalat bhejein

t: Walahum AAalayya thanbun faakhafu an yaqtulooni
u: Aur mujhpar unke haan ek jurm ka ilzam bhi hai, is liye main darta hoon ke woh mujhey qatal kar dengey”

t: Qala kalla faithhaba biayatina inna maAAakum mustamiAAoona
u: Farmaya “hargiz nahin, tum dono jao hamari nishaniyan lekar, hum tumhare saath sab kuch suntey rahenge

t: Fatiya firAAawna faqoola inna rasoolu rabbi alAAalameena
u: Firoun ke paas jao aur ussey kaho, humko Rubb ul aalameen ne isliye bheja hai

t: An arsil maAAana banee israeela
u: Ke tu bani Israel ko hamare saath janey de”

t: Qala alam nurabbika feena waleedan walabithta feena min AAumurika sineena
u: Firoun ne kaha “kya humne tujhko apne haan baccha sa nahin paala tha? Tu nay apni umar ke kai saal hamare haan guzare

t: WafaAAalta faAAlataka allatee faAAalta waanta mina alkafireena
u: Aur iske baad kar gaya jo kuch ke kar gaya, tu bada ehsan faramosh aadmi hai”

t: Qala faAAaltuha ithan waana mina alddalleena
u: Moosa ne jawab diya “us waqt woh kaam maine nadanishtagi (inadvertently) mein kardiya tha

t: Fafarartu minkum lamma khiftukum fawahaba lee rabbee hukman wajaAAalanee mina almursaleena
u: Phir main tumhare khauf se bhaag gaya. Iske baad mere Rubb ne mujhko hukum ata kiya aur mujhey Rasoolon mein shamil farma liya

t: Watilka niAAmatun tamunnuha AAalayya an AAabbadta banee israeela
u: Raha tera ehsan jo tu nay mujhpar jataya hai to iski haqeeqat yeh hai ke tu nay bani Israel ko ghulaam bana liya tha”

t: Qala firAAawnu wama rabbu alAAalameena
u: Firoun ne kaha “aur yeh Rubb-ul-Aalameen kya hota hai?”

t: Qala rabbu alssamawati waalardi wama baynahuma in kuntum mooqineena
u: Moosa ne jawab diya “Aasmano aur zameen ka Rubb, aur un sab cheezon ka Rubb jo aasmaan o zameen ke darmiyan hain, agar tum yaqeen laney waley ho.”

t: Qala liman hawlahu ala tastamiAAoona
u: Firoun ne apne gird o pesh ke logon se kaha ‘Sunte ho?”

t: Qala rabbukum warabbu abaikumu alawwaleena
u: Moosa ne kaha, “tumhara Rubb bhi aur tumhare un aabaa o ajdaad ka Rubb bhi jo guzar chuke hain”

t: Qala inna rasoolakumu allathee orsila ilaykum lamajnoonun
u: Firoun ne ( haazirin se) kaha “ tumhare yeh Rasool sahib jo tumhari taraf bhejey gaye hain, bilkul hi pagal maloom hotay hain”

t: Qala rabbu almashriqi waalmaghribi wama baynahuma in kuntum taAAqiloona
u: Moosa ne kaha “mashriq o magrib aur jo kuch inke darmiyan hai sabka Rubb, agar aap log kuch aqal rakhte hain”

t: Qala laini ittakhathta ilahan ghayree laajAAalannaka mina almasjooneena
u: Firoun ne kaha “ agar tu nay mere siwa kisi aur ko mabood maana to tujhey main un logon mein shamil kardunga jo qaid khano mein paday saddh(rotting) rahey hain”

t: Qala awalaw jituka bishayin mubeenin
u: Moosa ne kaha “Agarche main le aaon tere saamne ek sareeh cheez bhi?”

t: Qala fati bihi in kunta mina alssadiqeena
u: Firoun ne kaha “Accha to le aa agar tu saccha hai”

t: Faalqa AAasahu faitha hiya thuAAbanun mubeenun
u: (Uski zubaan se yeh baat nikalte hi) Moosa ne apna asa (staff) phenka aur yakayak woh ek sareeh azdha (serpant/snake) tha

t: WanazaAAa yadahu faitha hiya baydao lilnnathireena
u: Phir usne apna hath (bagal se) khincha aur wo sab dekne walon ke saamne chamak raha tha

t: Qala lilmalai hawlahu inna hatha lasahirun AAaleemun
u: Firoun apne gird o pesh ke sardaron se bola “yeh shaks yaqeenan ek maahir jaadugar hai

t: Yureedu an yukhrijakum min ardikum bisihrihi famatha tamuroona
u: Chahta hai ke apne jaadu ke zoar se tumko tumhare mulk se nikal de, ab tum batao tum kya hukum dete ho?”

t: Qaloo arjih waakhahu waibAAath fee almadaini hashireena
u: Unhon ne kaha “ isey aur iske bhai ko rok lijiye aur shehron mein harkare (heralds) bhej dijiye

t: Yatooka bikulli sahharin AAaleemin
u: Ke har siyane jaadugar ko aapke paas le aayein”

t: FajumiAAa alssaharatu limeeqati yawmin maAAloomin
u: Chunanchey ek roz muqarrar waqt par jaadugar ikatthey karliye gaye

t: Waqeela lilnnasi hal antum mujtamiAAoona
u: Aur logon se kaha gaya “tum ijtima mein chaloge

t: LaAAallana nattabiAAu alssaharata in kanoo humu alghalibeena
u: Shayad ke hum jaadugaron ke deen hi par reh jayein agar woh gaalib rahey”

t: Falamma jaa alssaharatu qaloo lifirAAawna ainna lana laajran in kunna nahnu alghalibeena
u: Jab jaadugar maidan mein aa gaye to unhon ne Firoun se kaha “humein inaam to milega agar hum gaalib rahey?”

t: Qala naAAam wainnakum ithan lamina almuqarrabeena
u: Usne kaha “ haan, aur tum to us waqt muqarrabeen (nearest to me) mein shamil ho jaogey”

t: Qala lahum moosa alqoo ma antum mulqoona
u: Moosa ne kaha “ phenko jo tumhein phenkna hai”

t: Faalqaw hibalahum waAAisiyyahum waqaloo biAAizzati firAAawna inna lanahnu alghaliboona
u: Unhon ne fawran apni rassiyan aur laathiyan phenk di aur bole “ Firoun ke iqbal se hum hi gaalib rahenge.”

t: Faalqa moosa AAasahu faitha hiya talqafu ma yafikoona
u: Phir Moosa ne apna asa (staff) phenka to yakayak woh unke jhootey karishmon ko hadap karta chala ja raha tha

t: Faolqiya alssaharatu sajideena
u: Ispar sarey jaadugar be-ikhtiyar sajde mein gir paday

t: Qaloo amanna birabbi alAAalameena
u: Aur bol uthey ke “ maan gaye hum Rubb-ul-Aalameen ko

t: Rabbi moosa waharoona
u: Moosa aur Haroon ke Rubb ko”

t: Qala amantum lahu qabla an athana lakum innahu lakabeerukumu allathee AAallamakumu alssihra falasawfa taAAlamoona laoqattiAAanna aydiyakum waarjulakum min khilafin walaosallibannakum ajmaAAeena
u: Firoun ne kaha “tum Moosa ki baat maan gaye qabl iske ke main tumhein ijazat deta! Zaroor yeh tumhara bada hai jisne tumhein jaadu sikhaya hai. Accha, abhi tumhein maloom hua jaata hai, main tumhare haath paon mukhalif simton (opposite sides) mein katwaunga aur tum sabko sooli (crucify) chadha dunga”

t: Qaloo la dayra inna ila rabbina munqaliboona
u: Unhon ne jawab diya “kuch parwah nahin, hum apne Rubb ke huzur pahunch jayenge

t: Inna natmaAAu an yaghfira lana rabbuna khatayana an kunna awwala almumineena
u: Aur humein tawaqqu hai ke hamara Rubb hamare gunaah maaf kardega kyunke sabse pehle hum iman laye hain”

t: Waawhayna ila moosa an asri biAAibadee innakum muttabaAAoona
u: Humne Moosa ko wahee (revelation) bhejhi ke “raat o raat mere bandon ko lekar nikal jao, tumhara peecha kiya jayega”

t: Faarsala firAAawnu fee almadaini hashireena
u: Ispar Firoun ne (Faujein jama karne ke liye) shehron mein naqeeb (heralds) bhej diye

t: Inna haolai lashirthimatun qaleeloona
u: (aur kehla bheja) ke “yeh kuch mutthi bhar log hain

t: Wainnahum lana laghaithoona
u: Aur inhon ne humko bahut naraaz kiya hai

t: Wainna lajameeAAun hathiroona
u: Aur hum ek aisi jamaat hain jiska shewa har waqt chokanna rehna hai”

t: Faakhrajnahum min jannatin waAAuyoonin
u: Is tarah hum unhein unke baaghon aur chashmon (water –springs)

t: Wakunoozin wamaqamin kareemin
u: Aur khazano aur unki behtareen qayam-gaahon se nikal laaye

t: Kathalika waawrathnaha banee israeela
u: Yeh to hua unke saath aur (dusri taraf) bani Israel ko humne in sab cheezon ka waris kardiya

t: FaatbaAAoohum mushriqeena
u: Subah hotey hi yeh log unke taaqub (pursuit) mein chal paday

t: Falamma taraa aljamAAani qala ashabu moosa inna lamudrakoona
u: Jab dono girohon ka aamna saamna hua to Moosa ke saathi cheekh utthey ke “ hum to pakde gaye”

t: Qala kalla inna maAAiya rabbee sayahdeeni
u: Moosa ne kaha “ hargiz nahin mere saath mera Rubb hai, woh zaroor meri rehnumayi farmayega”

t: Faawhayna ila moosa ani idrib biAAasaka albahra fainfalaqa fakana kullu firqin kaalttawdi alAAatheemi
u: Humne Moosa ko wahee ke zariye se hukum diya ke “maar apna asa (staff) samandar par” yakayak samandar pahtt gaya aur uska har tukda ek azeem o shaan pahad ki tarah ho gaya

t: Waazlafna thamma alakhareena
u: Usi jagah hum dusre giroh ko bhi kareeb le aaye

t: Waanjayna moosa waman maAAahu ajmaAAeena

t: Thumma aghraqna alakhareena

t: Inna fee thalika laayatan wama kana aktharuhum mumineena

t: Wainna rabbaka lahuwa alAAazeezu alrraheemu
u: Aur haqeeqat yeh hai ke tera Rubb zabardast bhi hai aur raheem bhi

t: Waotlu AAalayhim nabaa ibraheema
u: Aur inhein Ibrahim ka qissa sunao

t: Ith qala liabeehi waqawmihi ma taAAbudoona
u: Jabke usne apne baap aur apni qaum se pucha tha ke “yeh kya cheezein hain jinko tum poojhte ho?”

t: Qaloo naAAbudu asnaman fanathallu laha AAakifeena
u: Unhon ne jawab diya “ kuch buth (idols/murtiyan) hain jinki hum pooja karte hain aur inhi ki sewa mein hum lagey rehte hain”

t: Qala hal yasmaAAoonakum ith tadAAoona
u: Usne pucha “kya yeh tumhari sunte hain jab tum inhein pukarte ho

t: Aw yanfaAAoonakum aw yadurroona
u: Ya yeh tumhein kuch nafaa ya nuqsaan pahunchate hain?”

t: Qaloo bal wajadna abaana kathalika yafAAaloona
u: Unhon ne jawab diya “ nahin , balke humne apne baap dada ko aisa hi karte paya hai”

t: Qala afaraaytum ma kuntum taAAbudoona
u: Ispar Ibrahim ne kaha “ kabhi tumne (aankhein khol kar) un cheezon ko dekha bhi jinki bandagi tum

t: Antum waabaokumu alaqdamoona
u: Aur tumhare pichle baap dada baja latey rahey

t: Fainnahum AAaduwwun lee illa rabba alAAalameena
u: Mere to yeh sab dushman hain, bajuz ek Rubb ul aalameen ke

t: Allathee khalaqanee fahuwa yahdeeni
u: Jisne mujhey paida kiya, phir wahi meri rehnumayi farmata hai

t: Waallathee huwa yutAAimunee wayasqeeni

t: Waitha maridtu fahuwa yashfeeni
u: Aur jab main bimar ho jaata hoon to wahi mujhey shifa deta hai

t: Waallathee yumeetunee thumma yuhyeeni
u: Jo mujhey maut dega aur phir dobara mujhko zindagi bakshega

t: Waallathee atmaAAu an yaghfira lee khateeatee yawma alddeeni
u: Aur jissey main umeed rakhta hoon ke roz e jaza mein woh meri khata maaf farmadega”

t: Rabbi hab lee hukman waalhiqnee bialssaliheena
u: (iske baad Ibrahim ne dua ki) “Aey mere Rubb, mujhey hukum ata kar aur mujhko salihon (neik logon) ke saath mila

t: WaijAAal lee lisana sidqin fee alakhireena
u: Aur baad ke aane walon mein mujhko sacchi naamwari ata kar

t: WaijAAalnee min warathati jannati alnnaAAeemi
u: Aur mujhey jannat e naeem ke warison (inheritors) mein shamil farma

t: Waighfir liabee innahu kana mina alddalleena
u: Aur mere baap ko maaf karde ke beshak woh gumraah logon mein se hai

t: Wala tukhzinee yawma yubAAathoona
u: Aur mujhey us din ruswa na kar jabke sab log zinda karke uthaye jayenge

t: Yawma la yanfaAAu malun wala banoona
u: Jabke na maal koi faiyda dega na Aulad

t: Illa man ata Allaha biqalbin saleemin
u: Bajuz iske ke koi shaks qalb-e-saleem (sound heart) liye huey Allah ke huzur haazir ho”

t: Waozlifati aljannatu lilmuttaqeena
u: (Us roz) jannat parheizgaaron ke qareeb le aayi jayegi

t: Waburrizati aljaheemu lilghaweena
u: Aur dozakh behke huey logon ke saamne khol di jayegi

t: Waqeela lahum ayna ma kuntum taAAbudoona

t: Min dooni Allahi hal yansuroonakum aw yantasiroona
u: Kya woh tumhari kuch madad kar rahey hain ya khud apna bachao kar sakte hain?”

t: Fakubkiboo feeha hum waalghawoona
u: Phir woh mabood aur yeh behke huey log

t: Wajunoodu ibleesa ajmaAAoona
u: Aur Iblis ke lashkar sabke sab ismein upar taley dhakeil diye jayenge

t: Qaloo wahum feeha yakhtasimoona
u: Wahan yeh sab aapas mein jhagdenge aur yeh behke huey log (apne maboodon se) kahenge

t: TaAllahi in kunna lafee dalalin mubeenin
u: Ke “khuda ki kasam , hum to sareeh gumraahi mein mubtala thay

t: Ith nusawweekum birabbi alAAalameena
u: Jabke tumko Rubb ul Aalameen ki barabari ka darja de rahey thay

t: Wama adallana illa almujrimoona
u: Aur woh mujrim log hi thay jinhon ne humko is gumraahi mein dala

t: Fama lana min shafiAAeena
u: Ab na hamara koi sifarishi hai

t: Wala sadeeqin hameemin
u: Aur na koi jigri dost

t: Falaw anna lana karratan fanakoona mina almumineena
u: Kaash humein ek dafa phir palatne ka mauqa mil jaye to hum momin hon”

t: Inna fee thalika laayatan wama kana aktharuhum mumineena

u: Aur haqeeqat yeh hai ke tera Rubb zabardast bhi hai aur raheem bhi

t: Faittaqoo Allaha waateeAAooni
u: Pas tum Allah se daro aur ( be khatke) meri itaat karo”

t: Qaloo anuminu laka waittabaAAaka alarthaloona
u: Unhon ne jawab diya “kya hum tujhey maan lein halaanke teri pairwi razil-tareen (lowest/meanest) logon ne ikhtiyar ki hai?”

t: Qala wama AAilmee bima kanoo yaAAmaloona

t: In hisabuhum illa AAala rabbee law tashAAuroona
u: Unka hisaab to mere Rubb ke zimme hai, kaash tum kuch shaoor se kaam lo

t: Wama ana bitaridi almumineena
u: Mera yeh kaam nahin hai ke jo iman layein unko main dhutkaar doon

t: In ana illa natheerun mubeenun
u: Main to bas ek saaf saaf mutanabbeh (warn) kardene wala aadmi hoon”

t: Qaloo lain lam tantahi ya noohu latakoonanna mina almarjoomeena
u: Unhon ne kaha “Aey Nooh , agar tu baaz na aaya to phitkarey huey logon mein shamil hokar rahega”

t: Qala rabbi inna qawmee kaththabooni
u: Nooh ne dua ki “Aey mere Rubb, meri qaum ne mujhey jhutla diya

u: Ab mere aur unke darmiyan do-toak faisla karde aur mujhey aur jo momin mere saath hain inko nijaat de”

t: Thumma aghraqna baAAdu albaqeena

t: Atabnoona bikulli reeAAin ayatan taAAbathoona
u: Yeh tumhara kya haal hai ke har unchey maqaam par la haasil ek yaadgaar imarat bana daalte ho

t: Watattakhithoona masaniAAa laAAallakum takhludoona
u: Aur baday baday qasar (huge castles) taamir karte ho goya tumhein hamesha rehna hai

t: Waitha batashtum batashtum jabbareena

u: Mujhey tumhare haqq mein ek baday din ke azaab ka darr hai”

u: Yeh baatein to yunhi hoti chali aayi hain

u: Jo zameen mein fasaad barpa karte hain aur koi islaah nahin karte”

u: Isko hargiz na chedhna(molest) warna ek baday din ka azaab tumko aa lega”

t: Atatoona alththukrana mina alAAalameena
u: Kya tum duniya ki makhlooq mein se Mardon ke paas jatey ho

t: Watatharoona ma khalaqa lakum rabbukum min azwajikum bal antum qawmun AAadoona
u: Aur tumhari biwiyon mein tumhare Rubb ne tumhare liye jo kuch paida kiya hai usey chodh detey ho? Balke tum log to hadd se hi guzar gaye ho.”

u: Unhon ne kaha “ aey Lut” agar tu in baaton se baaz na aaya to jo log hamari bastiyon se nikale gaye hain unmein tu bhi shamil ho kar rahega”

t: Qala innee liAAamalikum mina alqaleena
u: Usne kaha “tumhare kartooton par jo log kudd (abhor/detest) rahey hain main un mein shamil hoon

t: Rabbi najjinee waahlee mimma yaAAmaloona
u: Aey parwardigar, mujhey aur mere ehal-o-ayaal (me and my people/ my family) ko inki badkirdariyon se nijaat de”

t: Fanajjaynahu waahlahu ajmaAAeena
u: Aakhir e kaar humne usey aur uske sab ehal-o-ayaal ko bacha liya

t: Illa AAajoozan fee alghabireena
u: Bajuz ek budiya ke jo peechey reh janey walon mein se thi

t: Thumma dammarna alakhareena
u: Phir baaqi maanda(rest) logon ko humne tabaah kardiya

t: Waamtarna AAalayhim mataran fasaa mataru almunthareena
u: Aur unpar barsayi ek barsaat, badi hi buri baarish thi jo un daraye janey walon par nazil hui

t: Awfoo alkayla wala takoonoo mina almukhsireena
u: Paimane theek bharo (Give full measure) aur kisi ko ghaata (less) na do

t: Wazinoo bialqistasi almustaqeemi
u: Saheeh tarazu se tolo

t: Wala tabkhasoo alnnasa ashyaahum wala taAAthaw fee alardi mufsideena
u: Aur logon ko unki cheezein kam na do, zameen mein fasaad na phaylate phiro

u: Aur us zaat ka khauff karo jisne tumhein aur guzishta nasalon ko paida kiya hai.”

u: Agar tu saccha hai to humpar aasmaan ka koi tukda gira de”

t: Qala rabbee aAAlamu bima taAAmaloona
u: Shoaib ne kaha “ mera Rubb jaanta hai jo kuch tum kar rahey ho”

t: Fakaththaboohu faakhathahum AAathabu yawmi alththullati innahu kana AAathaba yawmin AAatheemin
u: Unhon ne usey jhutla diya, aakhir-e-kaar chatri waley din (Day of Canopy) ka azaab unpar aa gaya, aur woh baday hi khauf-naak din ka azaab tha

t: Inna fee thalika laayatan wama kana aktharuhum mumineena
u: Yaqeenan ismein ek nishani hai, magar in mein se aksar log maanne waley nahin

u: Aur haqeeqat yeh hai ke tera Rubb zabardast bhi hai aur raheem bhi

t: Wainnahu latanzeelu rabbi alAAalameena
u: Yeh Rabbul Aalameen ki nazil karda cheez hai

t: Nazala bihi alrroohu alameenu
u: Isey lekar tere dil par amanat-daar rooh utri hai

t: AAala qalbika litakoona mina almunthireena
u: Taa-ke tu un logon mein shamil ho jo (khuda ki taraf se khalq-e-khuda ko) mutanabbeh (warn) karne waley hain

t: Bilisanin AAarabiyyin mubeenin
u: Saaf saaf arabi zubaan mein

t: Wainnahu lafee zuburi alawwaleena
u: Aur agley logo ki kitaabon mein bhi yeh maujood hai

t: Awalam yakun lahum ayatan an yaAAlamahu AAulamao banee israeela
u: Kya in (ehle Makkah) ke liye yeh koi nishani nahin hai ke isey ulema-e-bani Israel jaante hain

t: Walaw nazzalnahu AAala baAAdi alaAAjameena
u: (Lekin inki hatdarmi ka haal yeh hai ke) agar hum isey kisi ajami (non-arab) par bhi nazil kar detey

t: Faqaraahu AAalayhim ma kanoo bihi mumineena
u: Aur yeh (faseeh arabi kalaam) woh inko padh kar sunata tab bhi yeh maan kar na detey

t: Kathalika salaknahu fee quloobi almujrimeena
u: Isi tarah humne is (zikr) ko mujrimon ke dilon mein guzara hai

t: La yuminoona bihi hatta yarawoo alAAathaba alaleema
u: Woh ispar iman nahin latey jab tak azaab e aleem na dekh lein

t: Fayatiyahum baghtatan wahum la yashAAuroona
u: Phir jab woh be-khabari mein unpar aa padta hai

t: Fayaqooloo hal nahnu muntharoona
u: Us waqt kehte hain “ke kya ab humein kuch mohalat mil sakti hai?”

t: AfabiAAathabina yastaAAjiloona
u: To kya yeh log hamare azab ke liye jaldi macha rahey hain

t: Afaraayta in mattaAAnahum sineena
u: Tumne kuch gaur kiya , agar hum inhein barason tak aish karne ki mohalat bhi de dein

t: Thumma jaahum ma kanoo yooAAadoona
u: Aur phir wahi cheez unpar aa jaye jissey inhein daraya jaa raha hai

t: Ma aghna AAanhum ma kanoo yumattaAAoona
u: To woh saamaan-e-zeist (provisions of life) jo unko mila hua hai inke kis kaam aayega

t: Wama ahlakna min qaryatin illa laha munthiroona
u: (Dekho) humne kabhi kisi basti ko iske bagair halaak nahin kiya ke uske liye khabardar karne waley haqq e naseehat ada karne ko maujood thay

t: Thikra wama kunna thalimeena
u: Aur hum zaalim na thay

t: Wama tanazzalat bihi alshshayateenu
u: Is (kitaab e mubeen) ko shayateen lekar nahin utray hain

t: Wama yanbaghee lahum wama yastateeAAoona
u: Na yeh kaam unko sajta hai, aur na woh aisa kar hi sakte hain

t: Innahum AAani alssamAAi lamaAAzooloona
u: Woh to iski samaat (hearing) tak se door rakkhey gaye hain

t: Fala tadAAu maAAa Allahi ilahan akhara fatakoona mina almuAAaththabeena
u: Pas (aey Muhammad), Allah ke saath kisi dusre mabood ko na pukaro, warna tum bhi saza paaney walon mein shamil ho jaogey

t: Waanthir AAasheerataka alaqrabeena
u: Apne qareeb-tareen rishtedaaron ko darao

t: Waikhfid janahaka limani ittabaAAaka mina almumineena
u: Aur iman laney walon mein se jo log tumhari pairwi ikhtiyar karein unke saath tawazo (humble/kindness) se pesh aao

t: Fain AAasawka faqul innee bareeon mimma taAAmaloona
u: Lekin agar woh tumhari nafarmaani karein to unsey kehdo ke jo kuch tum karte ho ussey main bari-uz-zimma (not responsible) hoon

t: Watawakkal AAala alAAazeezi alrraheemi
u: Aur us zabardast aur raheem par tawakkul(bharosa) karo

t: Allathee yaraka heena taqoomu
u: Jo tumhein us waqt dekh raha hota hai jab tum uthte ho

t: Wataqallubaka fee alssajideena
u: Aur sajda guzaar logon mein tumhari naqal o harakat par nigaah rakhta hai

t: Innahu huwa alssameeAAu alAAaleemu
u: Woh sab kuch sunnay aur jaanne wala hai

t: Hal onabbiokum AAala man tanazzalu alshshayateenu
u: Logon, kya main tumhein bataon ke shayateen kis par utra karte hain

t: Tanazzalu AAala kulli affakin atheemin
u: Woh har chaal saaz, badhkaar par utra karte hain

t: Yulqoona alssamAAa waaktharuhum kathiboona
u: Suni sunayi baatein kaano mein phoonkte hain, aur unmein se aksar jhootey hotay hain

t: WaalshshuAAarao yattabiAAuhumu alghawoona
u: Rahey shuaraa (poets), to unke peechey behke huey log chala karte hain

t: Alam tara annahum fee kulli wadin yaheemoona
u: Kya tum dekhte nahin ho ke woh har waadi (valley) mein bhatakte hain

t: Waannahum yaqooloona ma la yafAAaloona
u: Aur aisi baatein kehte hain jo karte nahin hain

t: Illa allatheena amanoo waAAamiloo alssalihati wathakaroo Allaha katheeran waintasaroo min baAAdi ma thulimoo wasayaAAlamu allatheena thalamoo ayya munqalabin yanqaliboona
u: Bajuz un logon ke jo iman laye aur jinhon ne neik amal kiye aur Allah ko kasrat se yaad kiya aur jab unpar zulm kiya gaya to sirf badla le liye, aur zulm karne walon ko anqareeb maloom ho jayega ke woh kis anjaam se do-chaar hotay hain

t: Taseen tilka ayatu alqurani wakitabin mubeenin
u: Taa Seen. yeh aayat hain Quran aur kitaab e mubeen ki

t: Hudan wabushra lilmumineena
u: Hidayat aur basharat un iman laney walon ke liye

t: Allatheena yuqeemoona alssalata wayutoona alzzakata wahum bialakhirati hum yooqinoona
u: Jo namaz qayam karte aur zakat detey hain, aur phir woh aisey log hain jo aakhirat par poora yaqeen rakhte hain

t: Inna allatheena la yuminoona bialakhirati zayyanna lahum aAAmalahum fahum yaAAmahoona
u: Haqeeqat yeh hai ke jo log aakhirat ko nahin maante unke liye humne unke kartooton ko khushnuma bana diya hai, isliye woh bhatakte phir rahey hain

t: Olaika allatheena lahum sooo alAAathabi wahum fee alakhirati humu alakhsaroona
u: Yeh woh log hain jinke liye buri saza hai aur aakhirat mein yahi sabse zyada khasare (nuksaan) mein rehne waley hain

t: Wainnaka latulaqqa alqurana min ladun hakeemin AAaleemin
u: Aur (aey Muhammad) bila shubah tum yeh Quran ek hakeem o aleem (All-wise and All-knowing) hasti ki taraf se paa rahey ho

t: Ith qala moosa liahlihi innee anastu naran saateekum minha bikhabarin aw ateekum bishihabin qabasin laAAallakum tastaloona
u: (Inhein us waqt ka qissa sunao) jab Moosa ne apne ghar walon se kaha ke “mujhey ek aag si nazar aayi hai, main abhi ya to wahan se koi khabar lekar aata hoon ya koi angara chun laata hoon taa-ke tum log garam ho sako”

t: Falamma jaaha noodiya an boorika man fee alnnari waman hawlaha wasubhana Allahi rabbi alAAalameena
u: Wahan jo pahuncha to nidaa (awaaz/pukaar) aayi ke “mubarak hai woh jo is aag mein hai aur jo iske maahol mein hai, paak hai Allah sab jahanon ka parwardigar

t: Ya moosa innahu ana Allahu alAAazeezu alhakeemu
u: Aey Moosa, yeh main hoon Allah, zabardast aur daana(All-Wise)

t: Waalqi AAasaka falamma raaha tahtazzu kaannaha jannun walla mudbiran walam yuAAaqqib ya moosa la takhaf innee la yakhafu ladayya almursaloona
u: Aur phenk tu zara apni laathi.” Junhi ke Moosa ne dekha laathi saanp(snake) ki tarah bal kha rahi hai to peeth phair kar bhaaga aur peechey mudh kar bhi na dekha. “Aey Moosa, daro nahin, mere huzur Rasool dara nahin karte

t: Illa man thalama thumma baddala husnan baAAda sooin fainnee ghafoorun raheemun
u: Illa yeh ke kisi ne kasoor kiya ho. Phir agar burayi ke baad usne bhalayi se apne fail (amal) ko badal liya to main maaf karne wala meharbaan hoon

t: Waadkhil yadaka fee jaybika takhruj baydaa min ghayri sooin fee tisAAi ayatin ila firAAawna waqawmihi innahum kanoo qawman fasiqeena
u: Aur zara apna haath apne girebaan mein to daalo chamakta hua niklega bagair kisi takleef ke, yeh (dono nishaniyan) naw (nine) nishaniyon mein se hain Firoun aur uske qaum ki taraf (le janey ke liye), woh baday badh-kirdaar(wicked) log hain”

t: Falamma jaathum ayatuna mubsiratan qaloo hatha sihrun mubeenun
u: Magar jab hamari khuli khuli nihsaniyan un logon ke samney aayi to unhon ne kaha yeh to khula jaadu hai

t: Wajahadoo biha waistayqanatha anfusuhum thulman waAAuluwwan faonthur kayfa kana AAaqibatu almufsideena
u: Unhon ne sara-sar zulm aur guroor ki raah se in nishaniyon ka inkar kiya, halaanke dil unke qayel (convinced) ho chuke thay. Ab dekhlo ke un mufsidon ka anjaam kaisa hua

t: Walaqad atayna dawooda wasulaymana AAilman waqala alhamdu lillahi allathee faddalana AAala katheerin min AAibadihi almumineena
u: (Dusri taraf) humne Dawood o Sulaiman ko ilm ata kiya aur unhon ne kaha ke shukar hai us khuda ka jisne humko apne bahut se momin bandon par fazilat ata ki

t: Wawaritha sulaymanu dawooda waqala ya ayyuha alnnasu AAullimna mantiqa alttayri waooteena min kulli shayin inna hatha lahuwa alfadlu almubeenu
u: Aur Dawood ka waris sulaiman hua aur usne kaha “logon, humein parindon (birds) ki boliyan sikhayi gayi hain aur humein har tarah ki cheezein di gayi hain, beshak yeh (Allah ka) numaya fazl hai.”

t: Wahushira lisulaymana junooduhu mina aljinni waalinsi waalttayri fahum yoozaAAoona
u: Sulaiman ke liye Jinn aur Insano aur parindon ke lashkar jama kiye gaye thay aur woh puray zabt (strict discipline) mein rakkhey jatey thay

t: Hatta itha ataw AAala wadi alnnamli qalat namlatun ya ayyuha alnnamlu odkhuloo masakinakum la yahtimannakum sulaymanu wajunooduhu wahum la yashAAuroona
u: Ek martaba woh unke saath kooch (marching) kar raha tha) yahan tak ke jab yeh sab chuntiyon (ants) ki waadi(valley) mein pahunchey to ek chunti (ant) ne kaha “ Aey chunityon , Apne bilon (holes) mein ghuss jao, kahin aisa na ho ke Sulaiman aur uske lashkar tumhein kuchal daalein aur unhein khabar bhi na ho”

t: Fatabassama dahikan min qawliha waqala rabbi awziAAnee an ashkura niAAmataka allatee anAAamta AAalayya waAAala walidayya waan aAAmala salihan tardahu waadkhilnee birahmatika fee AAibadika alssaliheena
u: Sulaiman uski baat par muskurate huey hass pada aur bola “aey mere Rubb mujhey qaabu mein rakh ke main tere us ehsan ka shukar ada karta rahoon jo tu-nay mujhpar aur mere walidain par kiya hai aur aisa amal e saleh karoon jo tujhey pasand aaye, aur apni rehmat se mujhko apne saleh bandon mein daakhil kar.”

t: Watafaqqada alttayra faqala ma liya la ara alhudhuda am kana mina alghaibeena
u: (Ek aur mauqe par) Sulaiman ne parindon ka jaiza liya aur kaha “ kya baat hai ke main falaan hud-hud (hoopoe bird) ko nahin dekh raha hoon. Kya woh kahin gayab ho gaya hai

t: LaoAAaththibannahu AAathaban shadeedan aw laathbahannahu aw layatiyannee bisultanin mubeenin
u: Main usey sakht saza dunga, ya zubaa kardunga, warna usey mere saamne maaqool wajah pesh karni hogi

t: Famakatha ghayra baAAeedin faqala ahattu bima lam tuhit bihi wajituka min sabain binabain yaqeenin
u: Kuch zyada dair na guzri thi ke usne aakar kaha “maine woh maalumaat haasil ki hai jo aapke ilam mein nahin hain. Main Saba ke mutaalik yaqeeni ittila lekar aaya hoon

t: Innee wajadtu imraatan tamlikuhum waootiyat min kulli shayin walaha AAarshun AAatheemun
u: Maine wahan ek aurat dekhi jo us qaum ki hukmaran hai. Usko har tarah ka saaz o samaan baksha gaya hai aur uska takht (throne) bada azeem o shaan hai

t: Wajadtuha waqawmaha yasjudoona lilshshamsi min dooni Allahi wazayyana lahumu alshshaytanu aAAmalahum fasaddahum AAani alssabeeli fahum la yahtadoona
u: Maine dekha hai ke woh aur uski qaum Allah ke bajaye Suraj ke aagey sajda karti hai” Shaytaan ne unke aamaal unke liye khushnuma bana diye aur unhein shahraah se rok diya, is waja se woh yeh seedha raasta nahin paatey

t: Alla yasjudoo lillahi allathee yukhriju alkhabaa fee alssamawati waalardi wayaAAlamu ma tukhfoona wama tuAAlinoona
u: Ke us khuda ko sajda karein jo aasmano aur zameen ki posheeda(hidden) cheezein nikalta hai aur woh sab kuch jaanta hai jisey tum log chupate ho aur zaahir karte ho

t: Allahu la ilaha illa huwa rabbu alAAarshi alAAatheemi
u: Allah, ke jiske siwa koi mustahiq e Ibadat(worthy of worship) nahin, jo arsh e azeem ka maalik hai

t: Qala sananthuru asadaqta am kunta mina alkathibeena
u: Sulaiman ne kaha “abhi hum dekhe letay hain ke tu nay sach kaha hai ye tu jhoot bolne walon mein se hai

t: Ithhab bikitabee hatha faalqih ilayhim thumma tawalla AAanhum faonthur matha yarjiAAoona
u: Mera yeh khat (letter) le ja aur usey un logon ki taraf daal de, phir alag hatt kar dekh ke woh kya radd-e-amal zaahir karte hain”

t: Qalat ya ayyuha almalao innee olqiya ilayya kitabun kareemun
u: Malika boli “aey ehle darbaar, meri taraf ek bada eham khat phenka gaya hai

t: Innahu min sulaymana wainnahu bismi Allahi alrrahmani alrraheemi
u: Woh Sulaiman ki janib se hai aur Allah rehman o raheem ke naam se shuru kiya gaya hai

t: Alla taAAloo AAalayya watoonee muslimeena
u: Mazmoon yeh hai ke “ mere muqable mein sarkashi na karo aur muslim ho kar mere paas haazir ho jao”

t: Qalat ya ayyuha almalao aftoonee fee amree ma kuntu qatiAAatan amran hatta tashhadoona
u: (khat sunakar) Malika ne kaha “aey sardaran e qaum mere is maamle mein mujhey mashwara do. Main kisi maamle ka faisla tumhare bagair nahin karti hoon”

t: Qaloo nahnu oloo quwwatin waoloo basin shadeedin waalamru ilayki faonthuree matha tamureena
u: Unhon ne jawab diya “hum taqatwar aur ladne waley log hain, aagey faisla aap ke haath mein hai, aap khud dekh lein ke aapko kya hukum dena hai”

t: Qalat inna almulooka itha dakhaloo qaryatan afsadooha wajaAAaloo aAAizzata ahliha athillatan wakathalika yafAAaloona
u: Malika ne kaha ke “Baadshah jab kisi mulk mein ghus aate hain to usey kharab aur uske izzat walon ko zaleel kar detay hain, yahi kuch woh kiya karte hain

t: Wainnee mursilatun ilayhim bihadiyyatin fanathiratun bima yarjiAAu almursaloona
u: Main in logon ki taraf ek hadiya(gift) bhejti hoon, phir dekhti hoon ke mere elchi (envoy) kya jawaab lekar palat-te hain”

t: Falamma jaa sulaymana qala atumiddoonani bimalin fama ataniya Allahu khayrun mimma atakum bal antum bihadiyyatikum tafrahoona
u: Jab woh [Malika ka safeer(envoy)] Sulaiman ke haan pahuncha to usne kaha, “ kya tum log maal se meri madad karna chahte ho? Jo kuch khuda ne mujhey de rakkha hai woh issey bahut zyada hai jo tumhein diya hai. Tumhara hadiya (gifts) tumhi ko mubarak rahey

t: IrjiAA ilayhim falanatiyannahum bijunoodin la qibala lahum biha walanukhrijannahum minha athillatan wahum saghiroona
u: aey safeer (envoy)]wapas jaa apne bhejne walon ki taraf, hum unpar aisey lashkar lekar aayenge jinka muqabla woh na kar sakenge, aur hum unhein aisi zillat ke saath wahan se nikalenge ke woh khwar hokar reh jayenge”

t: Qala ya ayyuha almalao ayyukum yateenee biAAarshiha qabla an yatoonee muslimeena
u: Sulaiman ne kaha “aey ehle darbaar, tum mein se kaun uska takht (throne) mere paas laata hai qabl iske ke woh log mutii (farmabardaar) hokar mere paas haazir hoon?”

t: Qala AAifreetun mina aljinni ana ateeka bihi qabla an taqooma min maqamika wainne AAalayhi laqawiyyun ameenun
u: Jinno mein se ek qawi (mighty) haykal ne arz kiya “ main usey haazir kardunga qabl iske ke aap apni jagah se utthein. Main iski taaqat rakhta hoon aur amaanatdaar hoon”

t: Qala allathee AAindahu AAilmun mina alkitabi ana ateeka bihi qabla an yartadda ilayka tarfuka falamma raahu mustaqirran AAindahu qala hatha min fadli rabbee liyabluwanee aashkuru am akfuru waman shakara fainnama yashkuru linafsihi waman kafara fainna rabbee ghaniyyun kareemun
u: Jis shaks ke paas kitaab ka ilam tha woh bola “main aapki palakh jhapakne se pehle usey laye deta hoon”. Junhi ke Sulaiman ne woh takht apne paas rakkha hua dekha, woh pukar uttha “Yeh mere Rub ka fazal hai taa-ke woh mujhey aazmaaye ke main shukar karta hoon ya kaafir e niyamat karta hoon. Aur jo koi shukar karta hai uska shukar uske apne hi liye mufeed hai, warna koi nashukari karey to mera Rubb be-niyaz aur apni zaat mein aap buzurg hai.”

t: Qala nakkiroo laha AAarshaha nanthur atahtadee am takoonu mina allatheena la yahtadoona
u: Sulaiman ne kaha “anjaan tareeqe se uska takht uske saamne rakh do, dekhein woh saheeh baat tak pahunchti hai ya un logon mein se hai jo raah e raast nahin paatey.”

t: Falamma jaat qeela ahakatha AAarshuki qalat kaannahu huwa waooteena alAAilma min qabliha wakunna muslimeena
u: Malika jab haazir hui to ussey kaha gaya, kya tera takht (throne) aisa hi hai? Woh kehne lagi “yeh to goya wahi hai , hum to pehle hi jaan gaye thay aur humne sar-e-itaat jhuka diya tha (ya hum muslim ho chuke thay)”

t: Wasaddaha ma kanat taAAbudu min dooni Allahi innaha kanat min qawmin kafireena
u: Usko (iman laney se) jis cheez ne rok rakkha tha woh un maboodon ki ibadat thi jinhein woh Allah ke siwa poojhti thi, kyunke woh ek kafir qaum se thi

t: Qeela laha odkhulee alssarha falamma raathu hasibathu lujjatan wakashafat AAan saqayha qala innahu sarhun mumarradun min qawareera qalat rabbi innee thalamtu nafsee waaslamtu maAAa sulaymana lillahi rabbi alAAalameena
u: Ussey kaha gaya ke mahal mein daakhil ho, usne jo dekha to samjhi ke pani ka hauz hai aur utarne ke liye usne apne painchey utha liye (tucked up her skirt) , Sulaiman ne kaha yeh sheeshey (glass) ka chikna farsh hai ispar woh pukar utthi “Aey mere Rubb, (aaj tak) main apne nafs par bada zulm karti rahi, aur ab maine Sulaiman ke saath Allah Rabbul aalameen ki itaat qabool karli”

t: Walaqad arsalna ila thamooda akhahum salihan ani oAAbudoo Allaha faitha hum fareeqani yakhtasimoona
u: Aur Samood ki taraf humne unke bhai Saleh ko (yeh paigaam de kar) bheja ke Allah ki bandagi karo, to yakayak woh do mutakhasim fareeq (two wrangling) ban gaye

t: Qala ya qawmi lima tastaAAjiloona bialssayyiati qabla alhasanati lawla tastaghfiroona Allaha laAAallakum turhamoona
u: Saleh ne kaha “aey meri qaum ke logon, bhalayi se pehle burayi ke liye kyun jaldi machate ho? Kyun nahin Allah se magfirat talab karte? Shayad ke tumpar reham farmaya jaye?”

t: Qaloo ittayyarna bika wabiman maAAaka qala tairukum AAinda Allahi bal antum qawmun tuftanoona
u: Unhon ne kaha “humne to tumko aur tumhare sathiyon ko badd-shaguni ka nishaan paya hai”. Saleh ne jawab diya “tumhare neik o badd shagun ka sar rishta (good and bad omens issue) Allah ke paas hai. Asal baat yeh hai ke tum logon ki aazmaish ho rahi hai”

t: Wakana fee almadeenati tisAAatu rahtin yufsidoona fee alardi wala yuslihoona
u: Us shehar mein naw (nine) jatthey-daar (ring-leaders) thay jo mulk mein fasaad phaylatey aur koi islaah ka kaam na karte thay

t: Qaloo taqasamoo biAllahi lanubayyitannahu waahlahu thumma lanaqoolanna liwaliyyihi ma shahidna mahlika ahlihi wainna lasadiqoona
u: Unhon ne aapas mein kaha “ khuda ki kasam kha kar ahad karlo ke hum Saleh aur uske ghar walon par shabkhun (secret night attack) marenge aur phir uske wali(guardian) se keh denge ke hum us khandaan ki halakat ke mauqe par maujood na thay, hum bilkul sach kehte hain

t: Wamakaroo makran wamakarna makran wahum la yashAAuroona
u: Yeh chaal to woh chale aur phir ek chaal humne chali jiski unhein khabar na thi

t: Faonthur kayfa kana AAaqibatu makrihim anna dammarnahum waqawmahum ajmaAAeena
u: Ab dekhlo ke unki chaal ka anjaam kya hua. Humne tabaah karke rakh diya unko aur unki poori qaum ko

t: Fatilka buyootuhum khawiyatan bima thalamoo inna fee thalika laayatan liqawmin yaAAlamoona
u: Woh unke ghar khali padey hain us zulm ki padash mein jo woh karte thay, Is mein ek nishaan e ibrat hai un logon ke liye jo ilm rakhte hain

t: Waanjayna allatheena amanoo wakanoo yattaqoona
u: Aur bacha liya humne un logon ko jo iman laye thay aur nafarmani se parheiz karte thay

t: Walootan ith qala liqawmihi atatoona alfahishata waantum tubsiroona
u: Aur Lut ko humne bheja. Yaad karo woh waqt jab usne apni qaum se kaha “kya tum aankhon dekhte badhkari karte ho

t: Ainnakum latatoona alrrijala shahwatan min dooni alnnisai bal antum qawmun tajhaloona
u: Kya tumhara yahi chalan hai ke auraton ko chodh kar mardon ke paas shehwat-rani (sexual desire) ke liye jatey ho? Haqeeqat yeh hai ke tumlog sakht jahalat(ignorance) ka kaam karte ho.”

t: Fama kana jawaba qawmihi illa an qaloo akhrijoo ala lootin min qaryatikum innahum onasun yatatahharoona
u: Magar uski qaum ka jawab iske siwa kuch na tha ke unhon ne kaha “ nikaal do Lut ke ghar walon ko apni basti se, yeh baday paakbaaz bante hain”

t: Faanjaynahu waahlahu illa imraatahu qaddarnaha mina alghabireena
u: Aakhir e kaar humne bacha liya usko aur uske ghar walon ko, bajuz uski biwi ke jiska peechey reh jana humne tai kardiya tha

t: Waamtarna AAalayhim mataran fasaa mataru almunthareena
u: Aur barsayi un logon par ek barsaat, bahut hi buri barsaat thi wo un logon ke haqq mein jo mutanabbeh kiye jaa chuke thay

t: Quli alhamdu lillahi wasalamun AAala AAibadihi allatheena istafa allahu khayrun amma yushrikoona
u: (Aey Nabi) kaho, hamd hai Allah ke liye aur salaam uske un bandon par jinhein usne barguzida kiya. (Insey pucho) Allah behtar hai ya woh mabood jinhein yeh log iska shareek bana rahey hain

t: Amman khalaqa alssamawati waalarda waanzala lakum mina alssamai maan faanbatna bihi hadaiqa thata bahjatin ma kana lakum an tunbitoo shajaraha ailahun maAAa Allahi bal hum qawmun yaAAdiloona
u: Bhala woh kaun hai jisne aasmano aur zameen ko paida kiya, aur tumhare liye aasmaan se pani barsaya, phir uske zariye se woh khusnuma baagh ugaye jinke darakhton ka ugana tumhare bas mein na tha? Kya Allah ke saath koi dusra khuda bhi (in kaamon mein shareek) hai? (Nahin), balke yahi log raah e raast se hatkar chale jaa rahe hain

t: Amman jaAAala alarda qararan wajaAAala khilalaha anharan wajaAAala laha rawasiya wajaAAala bayna albahrayni hajizan ailahun maAAa Allahi bal aktharuhum la yaAAlamoona
u: Aur woh kaun hai jisne zameen ko jaye qaraar banaya aur uske andar dariya rawan kiye, aur usmein (pahadon ki) mekhein gaadh di aur pani ke do zakhiron(two bodies) ke darmiyan purda hayal kardiye? Kya Allah ke saath koi aur khuda bhi (in kaamon mein shareek) hai? Nahin, balke in mein se aksar log nadaan hain

t: Amman yujeebu almudtarra itha daAAahu wayakshifu alssooa wayajAAalukum khulafaa alardi ailahun maAAa Allahi qaleelan ma tathakkaroona
u: Kaun hai jo bekarar ki dua sunta hai jabke woh usey pukare aur kaun uski takleef rafaa karta hai? Aur (kaun hai jo) tumhein zameen ka khalifa banata hai? Kya Allah ke saath koi aur khuda bhi (yeh kaam karne wala) hai? Tum log kam hi sochte ho

t: Amman yahdeekum fee thulumati albarri waalbahri waman yursilu alrriyaha bushran bayna yaday rahmatihi ailahun maAAa Allahi taAAala Allahu AAamma yushrikoona
u: Aur woh kaun hai jo khushki aur samandar ki tareekiyon (darkness) mein tumko raasta dikhata hai aur kaun apni rehmat ke aagey hawaon ko khush khabri lekar bhejhta hai? Kya Allah ke saath koi dusra khuda bhi (yeh kaam karta) hai? Bahut baala o bartar hai Allah us shirk se jo yeh log karte hain

t: Amman yabdao alkhalqa thumma yuAAeeduhu waman yarzuqukum mina alssamai waalardi ailahun maAAa Allahi qul hatoo burhanakum in kuntum sadiqeena
u: Aur woh kaun hai jo khalq (creation) ki ibtida (orignate) karta aur phir uska iaada (reproduce) karta hai. Aur kaun tumko aasmaan aur zameen se rizq deta hai? Kya Allah ke saath koi aur khuda bhi (in kaamon mein hissedar) hai? Kaho ke laao apni daleel agar tum sachhey ho

t: Qul la yaAAlamu man fee alssamawati waalardi alghayba illa Allahu wama yashAAuroona ayyana yubAAathoona
u: Inse kaho, Allah ke siwa aasmano aur zameen mein koi gaib ka ilam nahin rakhta, aur woh nahin jaante ke kab woh uthaye jayenge

t: Bali iddaraka AAilmuhum fee alakhirati bal hum fee shakkin minha bal hum minha AAamoona
u: Balke aakhirat ka to ilam hi in logon se ghum ho gaya hai, balke yeh uski taraf se shakk mein hain, balke yeh ussey andhey hain

t: Waqala allatheena kafaroo aitha kunna turaban waabaona ainna lamukhrajoona
u: Yeh munkireen kehte hain “kya jab hum aur hamare baap dada mitti ho chuke honge to humein waqayi qabaron se nikala jayega?”

t: Laqad wuAAidna hatha nahnu waabaona min qablu in hatha illa asateeru alawwaleena
u: Yeh khabrein humko bhi bahut di gayi hain aur pehle hamare aabaa o ajdaad ko bhi di jaati rahi hain, magar yeh bas afsane hi afsane hain jo agle waqton se sunte chale aa rahey hain”

t: Qul seeroo fee alardi faonthuroo kayfa kana AAaqibatu almujrimeena
u: Kaho, zara zameen mein chal phir kar dekho ke mujreemo ka kya anjaam ho chuka hai

t: Wala tahzan AAalayhim wala takun fee dayqin mimma yamkuroona
u: (Aey Nabi), inke haal par ranjh na karo aur na inki chaalon par dil tangg ho

t: Wayaqooloona mata hatha alwaAAdu in kuntum sadiqeena
u: Woh kehte hain ke “yeh dhamki kab poori hogi agar tum sacchey ho?”

t: Qul AAasa an yakoona radifa lakum baAAdu allathee tastaAAjiloona
u: Kaho, kya ajab ke jis azaab ke liye tum jaldi macha rahey ho uska ek hissa tumhare qareeb hi aa laga ho

t: Wainna rabbaka lathoo fadlin AAala alnnasi walakinna aktharahum la yashkuroona
u: Haqeeqat yeh hai ke tera Rubb to logon par bada fazal farmane wala hai, magar aksar log shukar nahin karte

t: Wainna rabbaka layaAAlamu ma tukinnu sudooruhum wama yuAAlinoona
u: Bila shubha tera Rubb khoob jaanta hai jo kuch unke seenay apne andar chupaye huey hain aur jo kuch woh zaahir karte hain

t: Wama min ghaibatin fee alssamai waalardi illa fee kitabin mubeenin
u: Aasmaan o zameen ki koi posheeda cheez aisi nahin hai jo ek wazeh kitaab mein likhi hui maujood na ho

t: Inna hatha alqurana yaqussu AAala banee israeela akthara allathee hum feehi yakhtalifoona
u: Yeh waqia hai ke yeh Quraan bani Israel ko aksar un baaton ki haqeeqat batata hai jin mein woh ikhtilaf rakhte hain

t: Wainnahu lahudan warahmatun lilmumineena
u: Aur yeh hidayat aur rehmat hai iman laney walon ke liye

t: Inna rabbaka yaqdee baynahum bihukmihi wahuwa alAAazeezu alAAaleemu
u: Yaqeenan (isi tarah) tera Rubb in logon ke darmiyan bhi apne hukum se faisla kardega. Aur woh zabardast aur sab kuch jaan-nay wala hai

t: Fatawakkal AAala Allahi innaka AAala alhaqqi almubeeni
u: Pas aey Nabi, Allah par bharosa rakkho, yaqeenan tum sareeh haqq par ho

t: Innaka la tusmiAAu almawta wala tusmiAAu alssumma aldduAAaa itha wallaw mudbireena
u: Tum murdon ko nahin suna sakte, na un behron tak apni pukar pahuncha sakte ho jo peeth phair kar bhaagey ja rahey hon

t: Wama anta bihadee alAAumyi AAan dalalatihim in tusmiAAu illa man yuminu biayatina fahum muslimoona
u: Aur na andhon ko raasta bata kar bhatakne se bacha sakte ho. Tum to apni baat unhi logon ko suna sakte ho jo hamari aayat par iman latey hain aur phir farmabardaar ban jatey hain

t: Waitha waqaAAa alqawlu AAalayhim akhrajna lahum dabbatan mina alardi tukallimuhum anna alnnasa kanoo biayatina la yooqinoona
u: Aur jab hamari baat poori hone ka waqt unpar aa pahunchega to hum unke liye ek jaanwar zameen se nikalenge jo unse kalaam karega ke log hamari aayat par yaqeen nahin karte thay

t: Wayawma nahshuru min kulli ommatin fawjan mimman yukaththibu biayatina fahum yoozaAAoona
u: Aur zara tasavvur karo us din ka jab hum har ummat mein se ek fauj ki fauj un logon ki gher layenge jo hamari aayat ko jhutlaya karte thay, phir unko (unki aqsaam (classification and merit) ke lihaz se darja ba darja) murattab (arrange) kiya jayega

t: Hatta itha jaoo qala akaththabtum biayatee walam tuheetoo biha AAilman ammatha kuntum taAAmaloona
u: Yahan tak ke jab sab aa jayenge to (unka Rubb unse) puchega ke “tumne meri aayat ko jhutla diya halaanke tumne unka ilmi ihata (comprehend) na kiya tha? Agar yeh nahin to aur tum kya kar rahey thay?”

t: WawaqaAAa alqawlu AAalayhim bima thalamoo fahum la yantiqoona
u: Aur unke zulm ki wajah se azaab ka wada unpar poora ho jayega, tab woh kuch bhi na bol sakenge

t: Alam yaraw anna jaAAalna allayla liyaskunoo feehi waalnnahara mubsiran inna fee thalika laayatin liqawmin yuminoona
u: Kya unko soojhayi na deta tha ke humne raat unke liye sukoon haasil karne ko banayi thi aur din ko roshan kiya tha? Isi mein bahut nishaniyan thi un logon ke liye jo iman latey thay

t: Wayawma yunfakhu fee alssoori fafaziAAa man fee alssamawati waman fee alardi illa man shaa Allahu wakullun atawhu dakhireena
u: Aur kya guzregi us roz jabke sur/soor (trumphet) phunka jaayega aur haul(terror) kha jayenge woh sab jo aasmaano aur zameen mein hain, siwaye un logon ke jinhein Allah is haul(terror) se bachana chahega. Aur sab kaan dabaye uske huzoor hazir ho jayenge

t: Watara aljibala tahsabuha jamidatan wahiya tamurru marra alssahabi sunAAa Allahi allathee atqana kulla shayin innahu khabeerun bima tafAAaloona
u: Aaj tu pahadon ko dekhta hai aur samajhta hai ke khoob jamey huey hain, magar us waqt yeh baadalon ki tarah udh rahey honge, yeh Allah ki qudrat ka karishma hoga jisne har cheez ko hikmat ke saath ustwar (ordered with wisdom) kiya hai. Woh khoob jaanta hai ke tumlog kya karte ho

t: Man jaa bialhasanati falahu khayrun minha wahum min fazaAAin yawmaithin aminoona
u: Jo shaks bhalayi lekar aayega usey ussey zyada behtar sila milega aur aisey log us din ke haul (terror/dehshat) se mehfooz hongey

t: Waman jaa bialssayyiati fakubbat wujoohuhum fee alnnari hal tujzawna illa ma kuntum taAAmaloona
u: Aur jo burayi liye huey aayega, aisey sab log aundhey mooh aag mein phenke jayenge. Kya tumlog iske siwa koi aur jaza paa sakte ho ke jaisa karo waisa bharo

t: Innama omirtu an aAAbuda rabba hathihi albaldati allathee harramaha walahu kullu shayin waomirtu an akoona mina almuslimeena
u: (Aey Muhammad, Insey kaho) “Mujhey to yahi hukum diya gaya hai ke is shehar ke Rubb ki bandagi karoon jisne isey haram (sacred) banaya hai, aur jo har cheez ka maalik hai. Mujhey hukum diya gaya hai ke main Muslim ban kar rahoon

t: Waan atluwa alqurana famani ihtada fainnama yahtadee linafsihi waman dalla faqul innama ana mina almunthireena
u: Aur yeh Quran padh kar sunaoon” ab jo hidayat ikhtiyar karega woh apne hi bhale ke liye hidayat ikhtiyar karega, aur jo gumraah ho ussey kehdo main to bas khabardaar kardene wala hoon

t: Waquli alhamdu lillahi sayureekum ayatihi fataAArifoonaha wama rabbuka bighafilin AAamma taAAmaloona
u: Insey kaho, tareef Allah hi ke liye hai, ankareeb woh tumhein apni nishaniyan dikha dega aur tum unhein pehchan logey, aur tera Rubb bay-khabar nahin hai un aamal se jo tum log karte ho

t: Taseenmeem
u: Taa seen Meem

t: Tilka ayatu alkitabi almubeeni
u: Yeh kitaab e mubeen(clear book) ki aayat hain

t: Natloo AAalayka min nabai moosa wafirAAawna bialhaqqi liqawmin yuminoona
u: Hum Moosa aur Firoun ka kuch haal theek theek tumhein sunate hain aisey logon ke faiyde ke liye jo iman layein

t: Inna firAAawna AAala fee alardi wajaAAala ahlaha shiyaAAan yastadAAifu taifatan minhum yuthabbihu abnaahum wayastahyee nisaahum innahu kana mina almufsideena
u: Waqia yeh hai ke Firoun ne zameen mein sarkashi ki aur uske bashindon ko girohon mein taseem kardiya, un mein se ek giroh ko woh zaleel karta tha, iske ladkon ko qatal karta aur uski ladkiyon ko jeeta (zinda) rehne deta tha. Fil waqai woh mufsid (mischief-makers) logon mein se tha

t: Wanureedu an namunna AAala allatheena istudAAifoo fee alardi wanajAAalahum aimmatan wanajAAalahumu alwaritheena
u: Aur hum yeh irada rakhte thay ke meharbani karein un logon par jo zameen mein zaleel karke rakkhey gaye thay, aur unhein peshwa(leaders) bana dein, aur unhi ko waris banayein

t: Wanumakkina lahum fee alardi wanuriya firAAawna wahamana wajunoodahuma minhum ma kanoo yahtharoona
u: Aur zameen mein unko iqtedar(power) bakshein, aur unse Firoun o Hamaan aur unke lashkaron ko wahi kuch dikhla dein jiska unhein darr tha

t: Waawhayna ila ommi moosa an ardiAAeehi faitha khifti AAalayhi faalqeehi fee alyammi wala takhafee wala tahzanee inna raddoohu ilayki wajaAAiloohu mina almursaleena
u: Humne Moosa ki Maa ko ishara kiya ke “Isko doodh pila, phir jab tujhey uski jaan ka khatra ho to isey dariya mein daal de aur kuch khauf aur gham na kar, hum isey terey hi paas wapas le aayenge, aur isko paighambaron mein shamil karenge”

t: Failtaqatahu alu firAAawna liyakoona lahum AAaduwwan wahazanan inna firAAawna wahamana wajunoodahuma kanoo khatieena
u: Aakhir e kaar Firoun ke ghar walon ne usey (dariya se) nikal liya taa-ke woh unka dushman aur unke liye sabab e ranj baney. Waqayi Firoun aur Hamaan aur uske lashkar (apni tadbeer mein ) baday galat-kaar thay

t: Waqalati imraatu firAAawna qurratu AAaynin lee walaka la taqtuloohu AAasa an yanfaAAana aw nattakhithahu waladan wahum la yashAAuroona
u: Firoun ki biwi ne (ussey) kaha “yeh mere aur tere liye aankhon ki thandak hai, isey qatal na karo, kya ajab ke yeh hamare liye mufeed saabit ho, ya hum isey beta hi bana lein.” Aur woh (anjaam se) bekhabar thay

t: Waasbaha fuadu ommi moosa farighan in kadat latubdee bihi lawla an rabatna AAala qalbiha litakoona mina almumineena
u: Udhar Moosa ki Maa ka dil uda jaa raha tha, woh is raaz ko faash kar baithti agar hum uski dharas(strengthened her heart ) na bandha detey taa-ke woh ( hamare wadey par) iman laney walon mein se ho

t: Waqalat liokhtihi qusseehi fabasurat bihi AAan junubin wahum la yashAAuroona
u: Usne bachhey ki behan se kaha iske peechey peechey ja, chunanchey woh alag se usko is tarah dekhti rahi ke (dushmano ko) uska pata na chala

t: Waharramna AAalayhi almaradiAAa min qablu faqalat hal adullukum AAala ahli baytin yakfuloonahu lakum wahum lahu nasihoona
u: Aur humne bacchey par pehle hi doodh pilane waliyon ki chatiyan (breasts) haraam kar rakkhi thi. (Yeh halat dekh kar) us ladki ne unsey kaha “main tumhein aisey ghar ka pata bataon jiske log iski parwarish ka zimma lein aur khair khwahi ke saath isey rakkhein?”

t: Faradadnahu ila ommihi kay taqarra AAaynuha wala tahzana walitaAAlama anna waAAda Allahi haqqun walakinna aktharahum la yaAAlamoona
u: Is tarah hum Moosa ko uski Maa ke paas palta laaye taa-ke uski aankhein thandi hon aur woh ghamgheen na ho. Aur jaan le ke Allah ka wada saccha tha, magar aksar log is baat ko nahin jaantey

t: Walamma balagha ashuddahu waistawa ataynahu hukman waAAilman wakathalika najzee almuhsineena
u: Phir jab Moosa apni poori jawani ko pahunch gaya aur uska nasho-numa mukammal ho gaya to humne usey hukum aur ilm ata kiya. Hum neik logon ko aisi hi jazaa detey hain

t: Wadakhala almadeenata AAala heeni ghaflatin min ahliha fawajada feeha rajulayni yaqtatilani hatha min sheeAAatihi wahatha min AAaduwwihi faistaghathahu allathee min sheeAAatihi AAala allathee min AAaduwwihi fawakazahu moosa faqada AAalayhi qala hatha min AAamali alshshaytani innahu AAaduwwun mudillun mubeenun
u: (Ek roz) woh shehar mein aisey waqt mein dakhil hua jabke ehle shehar gaflat mein thay. Wahan usne dekha ke do aadmi laddh rahey hain, ek uski apni qaum ka tha aur dusra uski dushman qaum se taaluq rakhta tha.Uski qaum ke aadmi ne dushman qaum waley ke khilaf usey madad ke liye pukara. Moosa ne usko ek ghoosa (fist) maara aur uska kaam tamaam kardiya. (Yeh harakat sarzad hotey hi)Moosa ne kaha “yeh Shaytaan ki kaar farmayi hai, woh sakht dushman aur khula gumraah kun hai”

t: Qala rabbi innee thalamtu nafsee faighfir lee faghafara lahu innahu huwa alghafooru alrraheemu
u: Phir woh kehne laga “Aey mere Rubb, maine apne nafs par bada zulm kar daala, meri magfirat farma de.”Chunanchey Allah ne uski magfirat farma di, woh gafoor o raheem hai

t: Qala rabbi bima anAAamta AAalayya falan akoona thaheeran lilmujrimeena
u: Mossa ne ahad kiya ke “Aey mere Rubb, yeh ehsan jo tu nay mujhpar kiya hai iske baad ab main kabhi mujrimon ka madadgaar na banunga”

t: Faasbaha fee almadeenati khaifan yataraqqabu faitha allathee istansarahu bialamsi yastasrikhuhu qala lahu moosa innaka laghawiyyun mubeenun
u: Dusre roz woh subah saware darta aur har taraf se khatra bhampta hua shehar mein jaa raha tha ke yakayak kya dekhta hai ke wahi shaks jisne kal usey madad ke liye pukara tha aaj phir usey pukar raha hai. Mossa ne kaha “tu to bada hi behka hua aadmi hai”

t: Falamma an arada an yabtisha biallathee huwa AAaduwwun lahuma qala ya moosa atureedu an taqtulanee kama qatalta nafsan bialamsi in tureedu illa an takoona jabbaran fee alardi wama tureedu an takoona mina almusliheena
u: Phir jab Moosa ne irada kiya ke dushman qaum ke aadmi par hamla karey to woh pukar uttha “Aey Moosa , kya aaj tu mujhey usi tarah qatal karne laga hai jis tarah kal ek shaks ko qatal kar chuka hai, tu is mulk mein jabbar ban kar rehna chahta hai, Islaah nahin karna chahta”

t: Wajaa rajulun min aqsa almadeenati yasAAa qala ya moosa inna almalaa yatamiroona bika liyaqtulooka faokhruj innee laka mina alnnasiheena
u: Iske baad ek aadmi shehar ke parle sirey (other end of the city) se daudta hua aaya aur bola “Moosa , sardaron mein tere qatal ke mashwarey ho rahey hain, yahan se nikal jaa, main tera khair khwa(wellwisher) hoon”

t: Fakharaja minha khaifan yataraqqabu qala rabbi najjinee mina alqawmi alththalimeena
u: Yeh khabar sunte hi Moosa darta aur sehamta nikal khada hua aur usne dua ki ke “Aey mere Rubb, mujhey zaalimon se bacha”

t: Walamma tawajjaha tilqaa madyana qala AAasa rabbee an yahdiyanee sawaa alssabeeli
u: (Misr se nikal kar) jab Moosa ne Madiyan ka rukh kiya to usne kaha “ Umeed hai ke mera Rubb mujhey theek raaste par daal dega”

t: Walamma warada maa madyana wajada AAalayhi ommatan mina alnnasi yasqoona wawajada min doonihimu imraatayni tathoodani qala ma khatbukuma qalata la nasqee hatta yusdira alrriAAao waaboona shaykhun kabeerun
u: Aur jab woh Madiyan ke kunwein (well) par pahuncha to usne dekha ke bahut se log apne jaanwaron ko pani pila rahey hain, aur unsey alag ek taraf do auratein apne jaanwaron ko rok rahi hain. Moosa ne in auraton se pucha “tumhein kya pareshani hai?” unhon ne kaha “Hum apne jaanwaron ko pani nahin pila sakti jab tak yeh charwahe apne jaanwar nikal kar na le jayein, aur hamare waalid ek bahut boodey aadmi hain”

t: Fasaqa lahuma thumma tawalla ila alththilli faqala rabbi innee lima anzalta ilayya min khayrin faqeerun
u: Yeh sunkar Moosa ne unke jaanwaron ko pani pila diya, phir ek saaye ki jagah jaa baitha aur bola “parwardigar, jo khair bhi tu mujhpar nazil karde main uska mohtaj hoon.”

t: Fajaathu ihdahuma tamshee AAala istihyain qalat inna abee yadAAooka liyajziyaka ajra ma saqayta lana falamma jaahu waqassa AAalayhi alqasasa qala la takhaf najawta mina alqawmi alththalimeena
u: (Kuch dair na guzri thi ke) un dono auraton mein se ek sharam o haya se chalti hui uske paas aayi aur kehne lagi “Mere waalid aap ko bula rahey hain taa-ke aapne hamare jaanwaron ko pani jo pilaya hai uska ajar aapko dein.” Moosa jab uske paas pahuncha aur apna saara qissa usey sunaya to usne kaha “kuch khauf na karo, ab tum zaalimon se bach nikle ho.”

t: Qalat ihdahuma ya abati istajirhu inna khayra mani istajarta alqawiyyu alameenu
u: In dono auraton mein se ek ne apne baap se kaha “abbajaan is shaks ko naukar rakh lijiye, behtareen aadmi jisey aap mulazim rakhein wahi ho sakta hai jo mazboot aur amaanat-daar ho”

t: Qala innee oreedu an onkihaka ihda ibnatayya hatayni AAala an tajuranee thamaniya hijajin fain atmamta AAashran famin AAindika wama oreedu an ashuqqa AAalayka satajidunee in shaa Allahu mina alssaliheena
u: Uske baap ne (Moosa se) kaha “main chahta hoon ke apni in do betiyon mein se ek ka nikah tumhare saath kardoon bashart yeh ke tum aath(eight) saal tak mere haan mulazimat karo, aur agar dus saal purey kardo to yeh tumhari marzi hai. Main tumpar sakhti nahin karna chahta, tum insha Allah mujhey neik aadmi paogey”

t: Qala thalika baynee wabaynaka ayyama alajalayni qadaytu fala AAudwana AAalayya waAllahu AAala ma naqoolu wakeelun
u: Mossa ne jawab diya “yeh baat mere aur aapke darmiyan tai ho gayi.In dono muddaton mein se jo bhi main poori kardoon uske baad phir koi zyadati mujhpar na ho, aur jo kuch qaul o qaraar hum kar rahey hain Allah uspar nigehbaan hai.”

t: Falamma qada moosaalajala wasara biahlihi anasa min janibi alttoori naran qala liahlihi omkuthoo innee anastu naran laAAallee ateekum minha bikhabarin aw jathwatin mina alnnari laAAallakum tastaloona
u: Jab Moosa ne muddat poori kardi aur woh apne ehal-o-aayal(family) ko lekar chala to Toor ki jaanib usko ek aag nazar aayi.Usne apne ghar walon se kaha “thehro, maine ek aag dekhi hai, shayad main wahan se koi khabar le aaoon ya is aag se koi angara hi utha laaon jissey tum taap sako.”

t: Falamma ataha noodiya min shatii alwadi alaymani fee albuqAAati almubarakati mina alshshajarati an ya moosa innee ana Allahu rabbu alAAalameena
u: Wahan pahuncha to wadi ke dahine kinarey par mubarak khittey mein ek darakht se pukara gaya ke “Aey Moosa, main hi Allah hoon, sarey jahaan walon ka maalik”

t: Waan alqi AAasaka falamma raaha tahtazzu kaannaha jannun walla mudbiran walam yuAAaqqib ya moosa aqbil wala takhaf innaka mina alamineena
u: Aur (hukum diya gaya ke) “phenk de apni laathi.”Junhi ke Moosa ne dekha ke woh laathi saanp (snake) ki tarah bal kha rahi hai to woh peeth pher kar bhaaga aur unse mudh kar bhi na dekha. (Irshad hua) “Moosa, palat aa aur khauf na kar, tu bilkul mehfuz hai

t: Osluk yadaka fee jaybika takhruj baydaa min ghayri sooin waodmum ilayka janahaka mina alrrahbi fathanika burhanani min rabbika ila firAAawna wamalaihi innahum kanoo qawman fasiqeena
u: Apna haath girehban mein daal, chamakta hua niklega bagair kisi takleef ke aur khauf se bachne ke liye apna baazu bhench le(fold back). Yeh do roshan nishaniyan hain tere Rubb ki taraf se Firoun aur uske darbariyon ke saamne pesh karne ke liye, woh badey hi nafarmaan log hain”

t: Qala rabbi innee qataltu minhum nafsan faakhafu an yaqtulooni
u: Moosa ne arz kiya “Mere aaqa, main to unka ek aadmi qatal kar chuka hoon, darta hoon ke woh mujhey maar daalenge

t: Waakhee haroonu huwa afsahu minnee lisanan faarsilhu maAAiya ridan yusaddiqunee innee akhafu an yukaththibooni
u: Aur mera bhai Haroon mujhse zyada zubaan awar (eloquent of tongue) hai, usey mere saath madadgaar ke taur par bhej taa-ke woh meri taaeed (support) karey, mujhey andesha hai ke woh log mujhey jhutlayenge.”

t: Qala sanashuddu AAadudaka biakheeka wanajAAalu lakuma sultanan fala yasiloona ilaykuma biayatina antuma wamani ittabaAAakuma alghaliboona
u: Farmaya “hum tere bhai ke zariye se tera haath mazboot karenge aur tum dono ko aisi sitwat(authority) bakshenge ke woh tumhara kuch na bigaad sakenge.Hamari nishaniyon ke zoar se galaba (triumph) tumhare aur tumhare pairawon ka hi hoga”

t: Falamma jaahum moosa biayatina bayyinatin qaloo ma hatha illa sihrun muftaran wama samiAAna bihatha fee abaina alawwaleena
u: Phir jab Moosa un logon ke paas hamari khuli khuli nishaniyan lekar pahuncha to unhon ne kaha ke yeh kuch nahin hai magar banawati jaadu aur yeh baatein to humne apne baap dada ke zamane mein kabhi suni hi nahin

t: Waqala moosa rabbee aAAlamu biman jaa bialhuda min AAindihi waman takoonu lahu AAaqibatu alddari innahu la yuflihu alththalimoona
u: Moosa ne jawab diya “Mera Rubb us shaks ke haal se khoob waqif hai jo uski taraf se hidayat lekar aaya hai aur wahi behtar jaanta hai ke aakhri anjaam kiska accha hona hai, haqq yeh hai ke zaalim kabhi falah nahin paatey.”

t: Waqala firAAawnu ya ayyuha almalao ma AAalimtu lakum min ilahin ghayree faawqid lee ya hamanu AAala altteeni faijAAal lee sarhan laAAallee attaliAAu ila ilahi moosa wainnee laathunnuhu mina alkathibeena
u: Aur Firoun ne kaha “Aey ehle darbaar main to apne siwa tumhare kisi khuda ko nahin jaanta. Hamaan, zara eatain (bricks) pakwa kar mere liye ek unchi imarat to banwa, shayad ke uspar chadh kar main Moosa ke khuda ko dekh sakoon, main to isey jhoota hi samajhta hoon”

t: Waistakbara huwa wajunooduhu fee alardi bighayri alhaqqi wathannoo annahum ilayna la yurjaAAoona
u: Usne aur uske lashkaron ne zameen mein bagair kisi haqq ke apni badayi ka ghamand kiya aur samjhe ke unhein kabhi hamari taraf palatna nahin hai

t: Faakhathnahu wajunoodahu fanabathnahum fee alyammi faonthur kayfa kana AAaqibatu alththalimeena
u: Aakhir-e-kaar humne usey aur uske lashkaron ko pakda aur samandar mein phenk diya, ab dekhlo ke un zaalimon ka kaisa anjaam hua

t: WajaAAalnahum aimmatan yadAAoona ila alnnari wayawma alqiyamati la yunsaroona
u: Humne unhein jahannum ki taraf dawat dene waley pesh-ro bana diya aur qayamat ke roz woh kahin se koi madad na paa sakenge

t: WaatbaAAnahum fee hathihi alddunya laAAnatan wayawma alqiyamati hum mina almaqbooheena
u: Humne is duniya mein unke pichey laanat laga di aur qayamat ke roz woh badi qabahat (awkward predicament) mein mubtila hongey

t: Walaqad atayna moosa alkitaba min baAAdi ma ahlakna alquroona aloola basaira lilnnasi wahudan warahmatan laAAallahum yatathakkaroona
u: Pichli nasalon ko halaak karne ke baad humne Moosa ko kitaab ata ki, logon ke liye baseeraton ka samaan(means of enlightenment) bana kar, hidayat aur rehmat bana kar, taa-ke shayad log sabaq haasil karein

t: Wama kunta bijanibi algharbiyyi ith qadayna ila moosa alamra wama kunta mina alshshahideena
u: (Aey Muhammad) tum us waqt magrabi goshey(western side) mein maujood na thay jab humne Moosa ko yeh farmaan e shariyat ata kiya aur na tum shahideen (witnesses) mein shamil thay

t: Walakinna anshana quroonan fatatawala AAalayhimu alAAumuru wama kunta thawiyan fee ahli madyana tatloo AAalayhim ayatina walakinna kunna mursileena
u: Balke iske baad (tumhare zamane tak) hum bahut se nasalein (generations) utha chuke hain aur unpar bahut zamana guzar chuka hai. Tum ehle Madiyan ke darmiyaan bhi maujood na thay ke unko hamari aayat suna rahey hotey, Magar (us waqt ki yeh khabrein) bhejne waley hum hain

t: Wama kunta bijanibi alttoori ith nadayna walakin rahmatan min rabbika litunthira qawman ma atahum min natheerin min qablika laAAallahum yatathakkaroona
u: Aur tum Toor ke daaman mein bhi us waqt maujood na they jab humne (Moosa ko pehli martaba) pukara tha, magar yeh tumhare Rubb ki rehmat hai (ke tumko yeh malumaat di jaa rahi hain) taa-ke tum un logon ko mutanabbeh (warn) kardo jinke paas tumse pehle koi mutanabbeh (warn) karne wala nahin aaya, shayad ke woh hosh mein aayein

t: Walawla an tuseebahum museebatun bima qaddamat aydeehim fayaqooloo rabbana lawla arsalta ilayna rasoolan fanattabiAAa ayatika wanakoona mina almumineena
u: (Aur yeh humne isliye kiya ke) kahin aisa na ho ke unke apne kiye kartooton ki badaulat koi museebat jab unpar aaye to woh kahein “aey parwardigar, tu-nay kyun na hamari taraf koi Rasool bheja ke hum teri aayaat ki pairawi karte aur ehle iman mein se hotey.”

t: Falamma jaahumu alhaqqu min AAindina qaloo lawla ootiya mithla ma ootiya moosa awalam yakfuroo bima ootiya moosa min qablu qaloo sihrani tathahara waqaloo inna bikullin kafiroona
u: Magar jab hamare haan se haqq unke paas aa gaya to woh kehne lagey ‘kyun na diya gaya isko wahi kuch jo Moosa ko diya gaya tha?” Kya yeh log uska inkar nahin kar chuke hain jo issey pehle Moosa ko diya gaya tha? Unhon ne kaha “dono jaadu hain jo ek dusre ki madad karte hain” aur kaha “hum kisi ko nahin maante.”

t: Qul fatoo bikitabin min AAindi Allahi huwa ahda minhuma attabiAAhu in kuntum sadiqeena
u: (Aey Nabi) insey kaho “accha to laao Allah ki taraf se koi kitaab jo in dono se zyada hidayat bakshne wali ho agar tum sacchey ho, main usi ki pairwi ikhtiyar karunga.”

t: Fain lam yastajeeboo laka faiAAlam annama yattabiAAoona ahwaahum waman adallu mimmani ittabaAAa hawahu bighayri hudan mina Allahi inna Allaha la yahdee alqawma alththalimeena
u: Ab agar woh tumhara yeh mutalaba poora nahin karte to samajh lo ke dar asal yeh apni khwahishat ke pairo hain, aur us shaks se badh kar kaun gumraah hoga jo khudayi hidayat ke bagair bas apni khwahishat ki pairwi karey? Allah aise zaalimon ko hargiz hidayat nahin bakshta

t: Walaqad wassalna lahumu alqawla laAAallahum yatathakkaroona
u: Aur (naseehat ki ) baat pai dar pai hum unhein pahuncha chuke hain taa-ke woh gaflat se bedaar hon

t: Allatheena ataynahumu alkitaba min qablihi hum bihi yuminoona
u: Jin logon ko issey pehle humne kitaab di thi woh is (Quran) par iman latey hain

t: Waitha yutla AAalayhim qaloo amanna bihi innahu alhaqqu min rabbina inna kunna min qablihi muslimeena
u: Aur jab yeh unko sunaya jata hai to woh kehte hain ke “ hum ispar iman laye, yeh waqayi haqq hai hamare Rubb ki taraf se, hum to pehle hi se Muslim hain”

t: Olaika yutawna ajrahum marratayni bima sabaroo wayadraoona bialhasanati alssayyiata wamimma razaqnahum yunfiqoona
u: Yeh woh log hain jinhein unka ajar do baar diya jayega us saabit qadami ke badle jo unhon ne dikhayi. Woh burayi ko bhalayi se dafa karte hain aur jo kuch rizq humne unhein diya hai usmein se kharch karte hain

t: Waitha samiAAoo allaghwa aAAradoo AAanhu waqaloo lana aAAmaluna walakum aAAmalukum salamun AAalaykum la nabtaghee aljahileena
u: Aur jab unhon ne behuda baat suni to yeh keh kar ussey kinara kash ho gaye ke “hamare aamal hamare liye aur tumhare aamal tumhare liye, tumko salaam hai, hum jaahilon ka sa tareeqa ikhtiyar karna nahin chahte.”

t: Innaka la tahdee man ahbabta walakinna Allaha yahdee man yashao wahuwa aAAlamu bialmuhtadeena
u: “Aey Nabi, tum jisey chaho usey hidayat nahin de sakte, magar Allah jisey chahta hai hidayat deta hai aur woh un logon ko khoob jaanta hai jo hidayat qabool karne waley hain.”

t: Waqaloo in nattabiAAi alhuda maAAaka nutakhattaf min ardina awalam numakkin lahum haraman aminan yujba ilayhi thamaratu kulli shayin rizqan min ladunna walakinna aktharahum la yaAAlamoona
u: Woh kehte hain “agar hum tumhare saath is hidayat ki pairwi ikhtiyar karlein to apni zameen se uchak liye jaayenge.” Kya yeh waqia nahin hai ke humne ek pur-aman haram(makkah) ko inke liye jaaye qiyam bana diya jiski taraf har tarah ke samaraat(provision) khinchey chaley aate hain, hamari taraf se rizq ke taur par? Magar inmein se aksar log jaante nahin hain

t: Wakam ahlakna min qaryatin batirat maAAeeshataha fatilka masakinuhum lam tuskan min baAAdihim illa qaleelan wakunna nahnu alwaritheena
u: Aur kitni hi aisi bastiyan hum tabaah kar chuke hain jinke log apni maishat (economy) par itra gaye thay so dekhlo, woh unke maskan padey huey hain jin mein unke baad kam hi koi basa hai. Aakhir e kaar hum hi waris ho kar rahey

t: Wama kana rabbuka muhlika alqura hatta yabAAatha fee ommiha rasoolan yatloo AAalayhim ayatina wama kunna muhlikee alqura illa waahluha thalimoona
u: Aur tera Rubb bastiyon ko halaak karne wala na tha jab tak ke unke markaz mein ek Rasool na bhejh deta jo unko hamari aayat sunata, aur hum bastiyon ko halaak karne waley na they jab tak ke unke rehne waley zaalim na ho jatey

t: Wama ooteetum min shayin famataAAu alhayati alddunya wazeenatuha wama AAinda Allahi khayrun waabqa afala taAAqiloona
u: Tum logon ko jo kuch bhi diya gaya hai woh mehaz duniya ki zindagi ka samaan aur uski zeenat(adornment) hai, aur jo kuch Allah ke paas hai woh issey behtar aur baaqi tar hai. Kya tum log aqal se kaam nahin letay

t: Afaman waAAadnahu waAAdan hasanan fahuwa laqeehi kaman mattaAAnahu mataAAa alhayati alddunya thumma huwa yawma alqiyamati mina almuhdareena
u: Bhala woh shaks jissey humne accha wada kiya ho, aur woh usey panay wala ho kabhi us shaks ki tarah ho sakta hai jisey humne sirf hayat-e-duniya ka sar-o-samaan de diya ho, aur phir woh qayamat ke roz saza ke liye pesh kiya janey wala ho

t: Wayawma yunadeehim fayaqoolu ayna shurakaiya allatheena kuntum tazAAumoona
u: Aur (bhool na jayein yeh log) us din ko jabke woh inko pukarega aur puchega “kahan hai mere woh shareek jinka tum gumaan rakhte thay?”

t: Qala allatheena haqqa AAalayhimu alqawlu rabbana haolai allatheena aghwayna aghwaynahum kama ghawayna tabarrana ilayka ma kanoo iyyana yaAAbudoona
u: Yeh qaul jinpar chaspan hoga woh kahenge “Aey hamare Rubb, beshak yahi log hain jinko humne gumraah kiya tha, inhein humne usi tarah gumraah kiya jaise hum khud gumraah huey. Hum aap ke saamne baraat(disassociation) ka izhar karte hain. Yeh hamari to bandagi nahin karte thay”

t: Waqeela odAAoo shurakaakum fadaAAawhum falam yastajeeboo lahum waraawoo alAAathaba law annahum kanoo yahtadoona
u: Phir insey kaha jayega ke pukaro ab apne thehraye huey shareekon ko. Yeh unhein pukarenge magar woh inko koi jawab na dengey aur yeh log azaab dekh lenge. Kaash yeh hidayat ikhtiyar karne waley hotey

t: Wayawma yunadeehim fayaqoolu matha ajabtumu almursaleena
u: Aur (faramosh na karein yeh log) woh din jabke woh inko pukarega aur puchega ke “Jo Rasool bheje gaye thay unhein tumne kya jawab diya tha?”

t: FaAAamiyat AAalayhimu alanbao yawmaithin fahum la yatasaaloona
u: Us waqt koi jawab inko na soojhega aur na yeh aapas mein ek dusre se puch hi sakenge

t: Faamma man taba waamana waAAamila salihan faAAasa an yakoona mina almufliheena
u: Albatta jisne aaj toubah karli aur iman le aaya aur neik amal kiye wahi yeh tawakko(expect) kar sakta hai ke wahan falaah paaney walon mein se hoga

t: Warabbuka yakhluqu ma yashao wayakhtaru ma kana lahumu alkhiyaratu subhana Allahi wataAAala AAamma yushrikoona
u: Tera Rubb paida karta hai jo kuch chahta hai. Aur (woh khud hi apne kaam ke liye jisey chahta hai) muntakhab(choose) kar leta hai. Yeh intekhab in logon ke karne ka kaam nahin hai, Allah paak hai aur bahut baala-tarr hai us shirk se jo yeh log karte hain

t: Warabbuka yaAAlamu ma tukinnu sudooruhum wama yuAAlinoona
u: Tera Rubb jaanta hai jo kuch yeh dilon mein chupaye huey hain aur jo kuch yeh zaahir karte hain

t: Wahuwa Allahu la ilaha illa huwa lahu alhamdu fee aloola waalakhirati walahu alhukmu wailayhi turjaAAoona
u: Wahi ek Allah hai jiske siwa koi ibadat ka mustahiq nahin. Usi ke liye hamd hai duniya mein bhi aur aakhirat mein bhi, Farma rawayi usi ki hai aur usi ki taraf tum sab palataye janey waley ho

t: Qul araaytum in jaAAala Allahu AAalaykumu allayla sarmadan ila yawmi alqiyamati man ilahun ghayru Allahi yateekum bidiyain afala tasmaAAoona
u: Aey Nabi, insey kaho kabhi tum logon ne gaur kiya ke agar Allah qayamat tak tumpar hamesha ke liye raat taari karde to Allah ke siwa woh kaunsa mabood hai jo tumhein roshni laa dey? Kya tum sunte nahin ho

t: Qul araaytum in jaAAala Allahu AAalaykumu alnnahara sarmadan ila yawmi alqiyamati man ilahun ghayru Allahi yateekum bilaylin taskunoona feehi afala tubsiroona
u: Insey pucho, kabhi tumne socha ke agar Allah qayamat tak tumpar hamesha ke liye din taari karde to Allah ke siwa woh kaunsa maabood hai jo tumhein raat laa dey taa-ke tum usmein sukoon haasil kar sako? Kya tumko soojhta nahin

t: Wamin rahmatihi jaAAala lakumu allayla waalnnahara litaskunoo feehi walitabtaghoo min fadlihi walaAAallakum tashkuroona
u: Yeh usi ki rehmat hai ke usne tumhare liye raat aur din banaye taa-ke tum (raat mein) sukoon haasil karo aur (din ko) apne Rubb ka fazal talash karo. Shayad ke tum shukar guzar bano

t: Wayawma yunadeehim fayaqoolu ayna shurakaiya allatheena kuntum tazAAumoona
u: (Yaad rakhein yeh log) woh din jabke woh inhein pukarega phir puchega “kahan hai mere woh shareek jinka tum gumaan rakhte thay?”

t: WanazaAAna min kulli ommatin shaheedan faqulna hatoo burhanakum faAAalimoo anna alhaqqa lillahi wadalla AAanhum ma kanoo yaftaroona
u: Aur hum har ummat mein se ek gawah nikal layenge phir kahenge ke “lao ab apni daleel”. Us waqt inhein maloom ho jayega ke haqq Allah ki taraf hai, aur gum (vanish) ho jayenge inke woh saarey jhoot jo inhon ne ghadh rakkhe thay

t: Inna qaroona kana min qawmi moosa fabagha AAalayhim waataynahu mina alkunoozi ma inna mafatihahu latanooo bialAAusbati olee alquwwati ith qala lahu qawmuhu la tafrah inna Allaha la yuhibbu alfariheena
u: Yeh ek waqia hai ke Qaroon Moosa ki qaum ka ek shaks tha, phir woh apni qaum ke khilaf sarkash ho gaya aur humne usko itney khazane (treasures) de rakkhe thay ke unki kunjiyan (keys) taqatwar aadmiyon ki ek jamaat mushkil se utha sakti thi. Ek dafa jab uski qaum ke logon ne ussey kaha “ phoolna (itrana /exult) jaa, Allah phoolne(itrane) walon ko pasand nahin karta

t: Waibtaghi feema ataka Allahu alddara alakhirata wala tansa naseebaka mina alddunya waahsin kama ahsana Allahu ilayka wala tabghi alfasada fee alardi inna Allaha la yuhibbu almufsideena
u: Jo maal Allah ne tujhey diya hai ussey aakhirat ka ghar banane ki fikar kar, aur duniya mein se bhi apna hissa faramosh na kar. Ehsan kar jis tarah Allah ne tere saath ehsan kiya hai, aur zameen mein fasaad barpa karne ki koshish na kar, Allah mufsidon (fasaad karne waalon) ko pasand nahin karta.”

t: Qala innama ooteetuhu AAala AAilmin AAindee awalam yaAAlam anna Allaha qad ahlaka min qablihi mina alqurooni man huwa ashaddu minhu quwwatan waaktharu jamAAan wala yusalu AAan thunoobihimu almujrimoona
u: To usne kaha “Yeh sab kuch to mujhey us ilm ki bina par diya gaya hai jo mujhko haasil hai”. Kya usko yeh ilm na tha ke Allah ussey pehle bahut se aisey logon ko halaak kar chuka hai jo ussey zyada quwwat aur jamiyat rakhte thay? Mujrim se to unke gunaah nahin puchey jatey

t: Fakharaja AAala qawmihi fee zeenatihi qala allatheena yureedoona alhayata alddunya ya layta lana mithla ma ootiya qaroonu innahu lathoo haththin AAatheemin
u: Ek roz woh apni qaum ke saamne apne puray thaat mein nikla. Jo log hayat e duniya ke taalib thay woh usey dekh kar kehne lagey “kaash humein bhi wahi kuch milta jo Qaroon ko diya gaya hai, yeh to bada naseebe wala hai.”

t: Waqala allatheena ootoo alAAilma waylakum thawabu Allahi khayrun liman amana waAAamila salihan wala yulaqqaha illa alssabiroona
u: Magar jo log ilm rakhne waley thay woh kehne lagey “Afsos tumhare haal par, Allah ka sawaab behtar hai us shaks ke liye jo iman laye aur neik amal karey, aur yeh daulat nahin milti magar sabr karne waalon ko.”

t: Fakhasafna bihi wabidarihi alarda fama kana lahu min fiatin yansuroonahu min dooni Allahi wama kana mina almuntasireena
u: Aakhir-e-kaar humne usey aur uske ghar ko zameen mein dhansa diya, phir koi uske haamiyon(supporters) ka giroh na tha jo Allah ke muqabley mein uski madad ko aata, aur na woh khud apni madad aap kar saka

t: Waasbaha allatheena tamannaw makanahu bialamsi yaqooloona waykaanna Allaha yabsutu alrrizqa liman yashao min AAibadihi wayaqdiru lawla an manna Allahu AAalayna lakhasafa bina waykaannahu la yuflihu alkafiroona
u: Ab wahi log jo kal uski manzilat ki tamanna kar rahey thay kehne lagey “afsos, hum bhool gaye thay ke Allah apne bandon mein se jiska rizq chahta hai kushada karta hai aur jisey chahta hai napa-tula deta hai.Agar Allah ne humpar ehsan na kiya hota to humein bhi zameen mein dhansa deta. Afsos humko yaad na raha ke kafir falaah nahin paya karte.”

t: Tilka alddaru alakhiratu najAAaluha lillatheena la yureedoona AAuluwwan fee alardi wala fasadan waalAAaqibatu lilmuttaqeena
u: Woh aakhirat ka ghar to hum un logon ke liye makhsoos kar dengey jo zameen mein apni badayi nahin chahte aur na fasaad karna chahte hain. Aur anjaam ki bhalayi muttaqin hi ke liye hai

t: Man jaa bialhasanati falahu khayrun minha waman jaa bialssayyiati fala yujza allatheena AAamiloo alssayyiati illa ma kanoo yaAAmaloona
u: Jo koi bhalayi lekar aayega uske liye ussey behtar bhalayi hai, aur jo burayi lekar aaye to buraiyan karne walon ko waisa hi badla milega jaise amal woh karte thay

t: Inna allathee farada AAalayka alqurana laradduka ila maAAadin qul rabbee aAAlamu man jaa bialhuda waman huwa fee dalalin mubeenin
u: Aey Nabi, yaqeen jaano ke jisne yeh Quran tumpar farz kiya hai woh tumhein ek behtareen anjaam ko pahunchane wala hai. In logon se kehdo ke “Mera Rubb khoob jaanta hai ke hidayat lekar kaun aaya aur khuli gumraahi mein kaun mubtala hai.”

t: Wama kunta tarjoo an yulqa ilayka alkitabu illa rahmatan min rabbika fala takoonanna thaheeran lilkafireena
u: Tum is baat ke hargiz umeedwar na thay ke tumpar kitaab nazil ki jayegi. Yeh to mehaz tumhare Rubb ki meharbani se (tumpar nazil hui hai), pas tum kafiron ke madadgaar na bano

t: Wala yasuddunnaka AAan ayati Allahi baAAda ith onzilat ilayka waodAAu ila rabbika wala takoonanna mina almushrikeena
u: Aur aisa kabhi na honay paye ke Allah ki aayat jab tumpar nazil hoon to kuffar tumhein unsey baaz rakhein. Apne Rubb ki taraf dawat do aur hargiz mushrikon mein shamil na ho

t: Wala tadAAu maAAa Allahi ilahan akhara la ilaha illa huwa kullu shayin halikun illa wajhahu lahu alhukmu wailayhi turjaAAoona
u: Aur Allah ke saath kisi dusre mabood ko na pukaro. Uske siwa koi mabood nahin hai. Har cheez halaak honay wali hai siwaye uski zaat ke. Farman rawayi usi ki hai aur usi ki taraf tum sab paltaye janey waley ho

t: Aliflammeem
u: Alif Laam Meem

t: Ahasiba alnnasu an yutrakoo an yaqooloo amanna wahum la yuftanoona
u: Kya logon ne yeh samajh rakkha hai ke woh bas itna kehne par chodh diye jayenge ke “hum iman laaye” aur unko aazmaya na jayega

t: Walaqad fatanna allatheena min qablihim falayaAAlamanna Allahu allatheena sadaqoo walayaAAlamanna alkathibeena
u: Halaanke hum un sab logon ki aazmaish kar chuke hain jo insey pehle guzre hain. Allah ko to zaroor yeh dekhna hai ke sacchey kaun hain aur jhootey kaun

t: Am hasiba allatheena yaAAmaloona alssayyiati an yasbiqoona saa ma yahkumoona
u: Aur kya woh log jo buri harkatein kar rahey hain yeh samajh baithey hain ke woh humse baazi le jayenge? Bada galat hukum hai jo woh laga rahey hain

t: Man kana yarjoo liqaa Allahi fainna ajala Allahi laatin wahuwa alssameeAAu alAAaleemu
