u: Jo log Allah aur uske Rasool ko aziyat(annoyance ) detay hain unpar duniya aur aakhirat mein Allah ne laanat farmayi hai aur unke liye ruswa-kun azaab muhaiyya kardiya hai

t: Waallatheena yuthoona almumineena waalmuminati bighayri ma iktasaboo faqadi ihtamaloo buhtanan waithman mubeenan
u: Aur jo log momin mardon aur auraton ko be-kasoor aziyat (hurt) dete hain unhon ne ek badey bohtan (slander/calumny) aur sareeh gunaah ka wabal apne sar le liya hai

t: Ya ayyuha alnnabiyyu qul liazwajika wabanatika wanisai almumineena yudneena AAalayhinna min jalabeebihinna thalika adna an yuAArafna fala yuthayna wakana Allahu ghafooran raheeman
u: Aey Nabi, apni biwiyon aur betiyon aur ehle iman ki auraton se kehdo ke apne upar apni chadaron ke pallu latka liya karein. Yeh zyada munasib tareeqa hai taa-ke woh pehchan li jayein aur na satayi jayein. Allah taala gafoor o raheem hai

t: Lain lam yantahi almunafiqoona waallatheena fee quloobihim maradun waalmurjifoona fee almadeenati lanughriyannaka bihim thumma la yujawiroonaka feeha illa qaleelan
u: Agar munafiqeen, aur woh log jinke dilon mein kharabi hai, aur woh jo Medina mein hijaan angez afwahein(scandal mongers phaylane waley hain, apni harakaton se baaz na aayein to hum unke khilaf karawai karne ke liye tumhein utha khada karenge. Phir woh is shehar mein mushkil hi se tumhare saath reh sakenge)

t: MalAAooneena aynama thuqifoo okhithoo waquttiloo taqteelan
u: Unpar har taraf se laanat ki bochar hogi, jahan kahin paye jayenge pakde jayenge aur buri tarah marey jayenge

t: Sunnata Allahi fee allatheena khalaw min qablu walan tajida lisunnati Allahi tabdeelan
u: Yeh Allah ki sunnat hai jo aisey logon ke maamle mein pehle se chali aa rahi hai, aur tum Allah ki sunnat mein koi tabdili na paogey

t: Yasaluka alnnasu AAani alssaAAati qul innama AAilmuha AAinda Allahi wama yudreeka laAAalla alssaAAata takoonu qareeban
u: Log tumse puchte hain ke qayamat ki ghadi kab aayegi. Kaho uska ilm to Allah hi ko hai , tumhein kya khabar?shayad ke woh qareeb hi aa lagi ho

t: Inna Allaha laAAana alkafireena waaAAadda lahum saAAeeran
u: Bahr-e-haal yeh yaqeeni amar hai ke Allah ne kaafiron par laanat ki hai aur unke liye bhadakti hui aag muhaiyya kardi hai

t: Khalideena feeha abadan la yajidoona waliyyan wala naseeran
u: Jismein woh hamesha rahenge. Koi haami o madadgar na paa sakenge

t: Yawma tuqallabu wujoohuhum fee alnnari yaqooloona ya laytana ataAAna Allaha waataAAna alrrasoola
u: Jis roz unke chehre aag par ulat palat kiye jayenge us waqt woh kahenge ke “ kaash humne Allah aur Rasool ki itaat ki hoti”

t: Waqaloo rabbana inna ataAAna sadatana wakubaraana faadalloona alssabeela
u: Aur kahenge “Aey Rubb hamare, humne apne sardaron aur apne badon (great ones) ki itaat ki aur unhon ne humein raah-e-raast se bay-raah kardiya

t: Rabbana atihim diAAfayni mina alAAathabi wailAAanhum laAAnan kabeeran
u: Aey Rubb, unko dohra(double) azaab dey aur unpar sakht laanat kar”

t: Ya ayyuha allatheena amanoo la takoonoo kaallatheena athaw moosa fabarraahu Allahu mimma qaloo wakana AAinda Allahi wajeehan
u: Aey logon jo iman laye ho, un logon ki tarah na ban jao jinhon ne Moosa ko aziyatein (ranj pahuncha) di thin, phir Allah ne unki banayi hui baaton se uski baraat farmayi(cleared him) aur woh Allah ke nazdeek ba-izzat tha

t: Ya ayyuha allatheena amanoo ittaqoo Allaha waqooloo qawlan sadeedan
u: Aey iman laney walon, Allah se daro aur theek baat kiya karo

t: Yuslih lakum aAAmalakum wayaghfir lakum thunoobakum waman yutiAAi Allaha warasoolahu faqad faza fawzan AAatheeman
u: Allah tumhare aamal durust kardega aur tumhare kasooron se darguzar famayega. Jo shaks Allah aur uske Rasool ki itaat karey usne badi kamiyabi haasil ki

t: Inna AAaradna alamanata AAala alssamawati waalardi waaljibali faabayna an yahmilnaha waashfaqna minha wahamalaha alinsanu innahu kana thalooman jahoolan
u: Humne is amanat ko aasmano aur zameen aur pahadon ke saamne pesh kiya to woh usey uthane ke liye tayyar na huey, aur issey darr gaye. Magar Insaan ne isey utha liya, beshak woh bada zaalim aur jahil (ignorant) hai

t: LiyuAAaththiba Allahu almunafiqeena waalmunafiqati waalmushrikeena waalmushrikati wayatooba Allahu AAala almumineena waalmuminati wakana Allahu ghafooran raheeman
u: Is baar-e-amanat ko uthane ka laazmi nateeja yeh hai ke Allah munafiq mardon aur auraton, aur mushrik mardon aur auraton ko saza dey aur momin mardon aur auraton ki towbah qabool karey.Allah darguzar farmane wala aur raheem hai

t: Alhamdu lillahi allathee lahu ma fee alssamawati wama fee alardi walahu alhamdu fee alakhirati wahuwa alhakeemu alkhabeeru
u: Hamd (tareef) us khuda ke liye hai jo aasmaano aur zameen ki har cheez ka maalik hai aur aakhirat mein bhi usi ke liye hamd hai. Woh dana (hikmat wala) aur bakhabar hai

t: YaAAlamu ma yaliju fee alardi wama yakhruju minha wama yanzilu mina alssamai wama yaAAruju feeha wahuwa alrraheemu alghafooru
u: Jo kuch zameen mein jata aur jo kuch ussey nikalta hai aur jo kuch aasmaan se utarta hai aur jo kuch usmein chadhta hai, har cheez ko woh jaanta hai.Woh raheem aur gafoor hai

t: Waqala allatheena kafaroo la tateena alssaAAatu qul bala warabbee latatiyannakum AAalimi alghaybi la yaAAzubu AAanhu mithqalu tharratin fee alssamawati wala fee alardi wala asgharu min thalika wala akbaru illa fee kitabin mubeenin
u: Mukireen kehte hain ke kya baat hai ke qayamat humpar nahin aa rahi hai! Kaho kasam hai mere aalim-ul-gaib parwardigar ki, woh tumpar aa kar raheygi. Ussey zarra barabar (atoms weight/smallest particle) koi cheez na aasmaano mein chupi hui hai na zameen mein na zarre se badi aur na ussey choti, sab kuch ek numaya daftar mein darj hai

t: Liyajziya allatheena amanoo waAAamiloo alssalihati olaika lahum maghfiratun warizqun kareemun
u: Aur yeh qayamat isliye aayegi ke jaza de Allah un logon ko jo imaan laye hain aur neik amal karte rahey hain. Unke liye magfirat hai aur rizq-e-kareem

t: Waallatheena saAAaw fee ayatina muAAajizeena olaika lahum AAathabun min rijzin aleemin
u: Aur jin logon ne hamari aayat ko nicha dikhane ke liye zoar lagaya hai, unke liye badhtareen qisam ka dardnaak azaab hai

t: Wayara allatheena ootoo alAAilma allathee onzila ilayka min rabbika huwa alhaqqa wayahdee ila sirati alAAazeezi alhameedi
u: (Aey Nabi), ilm rakhne waley khoob jaante hain ke jo kuch tumhare Rubb ki taraf se tumpar nazil kiya gaya hai woh sarasar haqq hai aur khuda-e-azeez o hameed ka raasta dikhata hai

t: Waqala allatheena kafaroo hal nadullukum AAala rajulin yunabbiokum itha muzziqtum kulla mumazzaqin innakum lafee khalqin jadeedin
u: Munkireen logon se kehte hain “hum batayein tumhein aisa shaks jo khabar deta hai ke jab tumhare jism ka zarra zarra muntashir (bikhara) ho chuka hoga us waqt tum naye sirey se paida kardiye jaogey

t: Aftara AAala Allahi kathiban am bihi jinnatun bali allatheena la yuminoona bialakhirati fee alAAathabi waalddalali albaAAeedi
u: Na maloom yeh shaks Allah ke naam se jhoot ghadta hai ya isey junoon (deewana pan) lahiq hai.” Nahin, balke jo log aakhirat ko nahin maante woh azaab mein mubtala honay waley hain aur wahi buri tarah behke huey hain

t: Afalam yaraw ila ma bayna aydeehim wama khalfahum mina alssamai waalardi in nasha nakhsif bihimu alarda aw nusqit AAalayhim kisafan mina alssamai inna fee thalika laayatan likulli AAabdin muneebin
u: Kya inhon ne kabhi us aasmaan o zameen ko nahin dekha jo inhein aagey aur peechey se gheray huey hai? Hum chahein to inhein zameen mein dhansa dein, ya aasmaan ke kuch tukde inpar gira dein. Dar haqeeqat is mein ek naishani hai har us banday ke liye jo khuda ki taraf rujoo karne wala ho

t: Walaqad atayna dawooda minna fadlan ya jibalu awwibee maAAahu waalttayra waalanna lahu alhadeeda
u: Humne Dawood ko apne haan se bada fazal ata kiya tha.(Humne hukum diya ke) aey pahadon (mountains), iske saath hum ahangi karo (unke saath tasbeeh karo) (aur yahi hukum humne) parindon ko diya. Humne lohay (Iron) ko uske liye narm kardiya

t: Ani iAAmal sabighatin waqaddir fee alssardi waiAAmaloo salihan innee bima taAAmaloona baseerun
u: Is hidayat ke saath ke zirein (full coats of mail) bana aur unke halqe theek andaze par rakh. (Aey aale Dawood) neik amal karo. Jo kuch tum karte ho usko main dekh raha hoon

t: Walisulaymana alrreeha ghuduwwuha shahrun warawahuha shahrun waasalna lahu AAayna alqitri wamina aljinni man yaAAmalu bayna yadayhi biithni rabbihi waman yazigh minhum AAan amrina nuthiqhu min AAathabi alssaAAeeri
u: Aur Sulaiman ke liye humne hawa ko musakkhar kardiya, subah ke waqt uska chalna ek mahine ki raah tak aur shaam ke waqt uska chalna ek mahine ki raah tak. Humne uske liye pigley huey tambey(molten brass) ka chashma (spring) baha diya aur aisey Jinn uske taabey kardiye jo apne Rubb ke hukum se uske aagey kaam karte thay. Unmein se jo hamare hukum se sartabi (deviate /swerved) karta usko hum bhadakti hui aag ka maza chakhate

t: YaAAmaloona lahu ma yashao min mahareeba watamatheela wajifanin kaaljawabi waqudoorin rasiyatin iAAmaloo ala dawooda shukran waqaleelun min AAibadiya alshshakooru
u: Woh uske liye banate thay jo kuch woh chahta, unchi imaratein, tasvirein, baday baday hauz jaisey lagan (bowls like reservoirs) aur apni jagah se na hatne wali bhari degein. Aey aale Dawood, amal karo shukar ke tareeqe par. Mere bandon mein kam hi shukar guzar hain

t: Falamma qadayna AAalayhi almawta ma dallahum AAala mawtihi illa dabbatu alardi takulu minsaatahu falamma kharra tabayyanati aljinnu an law kanoo yaAAlamoona alghayba ma labithoo fee alAAathabi almuheeni
u: Phir jab Sulaiman par humne maut ka faisla nafiz kiya to Jinno ko uski maut ka pata dene wali koi cheez us ghun (worm) ke siwa na thi jo uske asa (staff) ko kha raha tha. Is tarah jab Sualiman gir pada to Jinno par yeh baat khul gayi ke agar woh gaib ke janne waley hotey to is zillat ke azaab mein mubtala na rehte

t: Laqad kana lisabain fee maskanihim ayatun jannatani AAan yameenin washimalin kuloo min rizqi rabbikum waoshkuroo lahu baldatun tayyibatun warabbun ghafoorun
u: Saba (Sheba) ke liye unke apne maskan (home-land) hi mein ek nishani maujood thi, do baag dayein(right) aur bayein(left). Khao apne Rubb ka diya hua rizq aur shukar baja lao uska, Mulk hai umda o pakeeza aur parwardigar hai bakshish farmane waala

t: FaaAAradoo faarsalna AAalayhim sayla alAAarimi wabaddalnahum bijannatayhim jannatayni thawatay okulin khamtin waathlin washayin min sidrin qaleelin
u: Magar woh mooh moad gaye. Aakhir e kaar humne unpar bandh (dam) todh sailaab (flood) bhej diya aur unke pichle do baaghon (gardens) ke jagah do aur baagh unhein diye jinmein kadwe (bitter) kasaile (tamarisk) phal aur jhaao ke darakht thay aur kuch thodi si beriyan (lote trees)

t: Thalika jazaynahum bima kafaroo wahal nujazee illa alkafoora
u: Yeh tha unke kufr ka badla jo humne unko diya. Aur nashukre Insan ke siwa aisa badla hum aur kisi ko nahin detey

t: WajaAAalna baynahum wabayna alqura allatee barakna feeha quran thahiratan waqaddarna feeha alssayra seeroo feeha layaliya waayyaman amineena
u: Aur humne unke aur un bastiyon ke darmiyaan, jinko humne barakat ata ki thi, numayan bastiyan basa di thin, aur unmein safar ki musaftein ek andaze par rakh di thin.chalo phiro in raaston mein raat din purey aman ke saath

t: Faqaloo rabbana baAAid bayna asfarina wathalamoo anfusahum fajaAAalnahum ahadeetha wamazzaqnahum kulla mumazzaqin inna fee thalika laayatin likulli sabbarin shakoorin
u: Magar unhon ne kaha “Aey hamare Rubb, hamare safar ki musafatein lambi karde.” Unhon ne apne upar aap zulm kiya, aakhir e kaar humne unhein afsana bana kar rakh diya aur unhein bilkul tittar bittar kar daala. Yaqeenan ismein nishaniyan hain har us shaks ke liye jo bada saabir(steadfast) o shakir (thankful) ho

t: Walaqad saddaqa AAalayhim ibleesu thannahu faittabaAAoohu illa fareeqan mina almumineena
u: Unke maamle mein Iblis ne apna gumaan saheeh paya aur unhon ne usi ki pairwi ki, bajuz ek thode se giroh ke jo momin tha

t: Wama kana lahu AAalayhim min sultanin illa linaAAlama man yuminu bialakhirati mimman huwa minha fee shakkin warabbuka AAala kulli shayin hafeethun
u: Iblis ko unpar koi iqtedar (authority) haasil na tha magar jo kuch hua woh isliye hua ke hum yeh dekhna chahte thay ke kaun aakhirat ka maanne wala hai aur kaun uski taraf se shakk mein pada hua hai. Tera Rubb har cheez par nigraan (watchful) hai

t: Quli odAAoo allatheena zaAAamtum min dooni Allahi la yamlikoona mithqala tharratin fee alssamawati wala fee alardi wama lahum feehima min shirkin wama lahu minhum min thaheerin
u: (Aey Nabi, in mushrikeen se) kaho ke pukar dekho apne un maboodon ko jinhein tum Allah ke siwa apna mabood samajhey baithey ho. Woh na aasmaano mein kisi zarra barabar cheez ke maalik hain na zameen mein. Woh aasmaan o zameen ki milkiyat mein shareek bhi nahin hain.Unmein se koi Allah ka madadgaar bhi nahin hai

t: Wala tanfaAAu alshshafaAAatu AAindahu illa liman athina lahu hatta itha fuzziAAa AAan quloobihim qaloo matha qala rabbukum qaloo alhaqqa wahuwa alAAaliyyu alkabeeru
u: Aur Allah ke huzur koi shafaat bhi kisi ke liye nafeh (faida-mand) nahin ho sakti bajuz us shaks ke jiske liye Allah ne sifarish ki ijazat di ho. Hatta ke jab logon ke dilon se ghabrahat door hogi to woh (sifarish karne walon se) puchenge ke tumhare Rubb ne kya jawab diya, woh kahenge ke theek jawab mila hai aur woh buzurg o bartar hai

t: Qul man yarzuqukum mina alssamawati waalardi quli Allahu wainna aw iyyakum laAAala hudan aw fee dalalin mubeenin
u: (Aey Nabi) insey pucho, “kaun tumko aasmaano aur zameen se rizq deta hai?” kaho “Allah. Ab la muhala (inevitably) hum mein aur tum mein se koi ek hi hidayat par hai ya khuli gumraahi mein pada hua hai.”

t: Qul la tusaloona AAamma ajramna wala nusalu AAamma taAAmaloona
u: Insey kaho, “jo kasoor humne kiya ho uski koi baaz-purs tumse na hogi, aur jo kuch tum kar rahey ho uski koi jawab talabi humse nahin ki jayegi.”

t: Qul yajmaAAu baynana rabbuna thumma yaftahu baynana bialhaqqi wahuwa alfattahu alAAaleemu
u: Kaho “hamara Rubb humko jamaa karega, phir hamare darmiyan theek theek faisla kardega. Woh aisa zabardast hakim (Great Judge) hai jo sab kuch jaanta hai.”

t: Qul arooniya allatheena alhaqtum bihi shurakaa kalla bal huwa Allahu alAAazeezu alhakeemu
u: Insey kaho, “zara mujhey dekhao to saheeh woh kaun hastiyan hain jinhein tumne uske saath shareek laga rakkha hai.” Hargiz nahin, zabardast aur dana to bas woh Allah hi hai

t: Wama arsalnaka illa kaffatan lilnnasi basheeran wanatheeran walakinna akthara alnnasi la yaAAlamoona
u: Aur (Aey Nabi) humne tumko tamaam hi insaano ke liye basheer (khush kabhri dene wala) o nazeer (darr sunane wala) bana kar bheja hai, magar aksar log jaante nahin hain

t: Wayaqooloona mata hatha alwaAAdu in kuntum sadiqeena
u: Yeh log tumse kehte hain ke woh (qayamat ka) wada kab poora hoga agar tum sacchey ho

t: Qul lakum meeAAadu yawmin la tastakhiroona AAanhu saAAatan wala tastaqdimoona
u: Kaho tumhare liye ek aisey din ki miyad muqarrar hai jiske aane mein na ek ghadi bhar ki taakhir (delay) tum kar sakte ho aur na ek ghadi bhar pehle isey laa sakte ho

t: Waqala allatheena kafaroo lan numina bihatha alqurani wala biallathee bayna yadayhi walaw tara ithi alththalimoona mawqoofoona AAinda rabbihim yarjiAAu baAAduhum ila baAAdin alqawla yaqoolu allatheena istudAAifoo lillatheena istakbaroo lawla antum lakunna mumineena
u: Yeh kaafir kehte hain ke “hum hargiz is Quran ko na maanenge aur na issey pehle aayi hui kisi kitaab ko tasleem karenge”. Kaash tum dekho inka haal us waqt jab yeh zaalim apne Rubb ke huzur khaday hongey us waqt yeh ek dusre par ilzam dharenge. Jo log duniya mein daba kar rakkhe gaye thay woh baday bannay walon se kahenge ke “agar tum na hotay to hum momin hotay.”

t: Qala allatheena istakbaroo lillatheena istudAAifoo anahnu sadadnakum AAani alhuda baAAda ith jaakum bal kuntum mujrimeena
u: Woh baday bannay walay in dabay huey logon ko jawab denge “kya humne tumhein us hidayat se roka tha jo tumhare paas aayi thi? Nahin, balke tum khud mujrim thay.”

t: Waqala allatheena istudAAifoo lillatheena istakbaroo bal makru allayli waalnnahari ith tamuroonana an nakfura biAllahi wanajAAala lahu andadan waasarroo alnnadamata lamma raawoo alAAathaba wajaAAalna alaghlala fee aAAnaqi allatheena kafaroo hal yujzawna illa ma kanoo yaAAmaloona
u: Woh dabay huey log un baday banne walon se kahenge, ‘Nahin, balke shab-o-roz ki makkari thi jab tum humse kehte thay ke hum Allah se kufr karein aur dusron ko uska humsar thehrayein.” Aakhir e kaar jab yeh log azaab dekhenge to apne dilon mein pachtayenge aur hum in munkireen ke galon mein tauq (bedi/fetters) daal denge. Kya logon ko iske siwa aur koi badla diya ja sakta hai ke jaise aamal unke thay waisi hi jaza woh payein

t: Wama arsalna fee qaryatin min natheerin illa qala mutrafooha inna bima orsiltum bihi kafiroona
u: Kabhi aisa nahin hua ke humne kisi basti mein ek khabardar karne wala bheja ho aur us basti ke khatey peetay logon ne yeh na kaha ho ke jo paigham tum lekar aaye ho usko hum nahin maante

t: Waqaloo nahnu aktharu amwalan waawladan wama nahnu bimuAAaththabeena
u: Unhon ne hamesha yahi kaha ke hum tumse zyada maal aulad rakhte hain aur hum hargiz saza paaney walay nahin hain

t: Qul inna rabbee yabsutu alrrizqa liman yashao wayaqdiru walakinna akthara alnnasi la yaAAlamoona
u: (Aye Nabi), Insey kaho mera Rubb jisey chahta hai kushada (abundant) rizq deta hai aur jisey chahta hai napa tula ata karta hai, magar aksar log iski haqeeqat nahin jaante

t: Wama amwalukum wala awladukum biallatee tuqarribukum AAindana zulfa illa man amana waAAamila salihan faolaika lahum jazao alddiAAfi bima AAamiloo wahum fee alghurufati aminoona
u: Yeh tumahri daulat aur tumhari aulad nahin hai jo tumhein humse kareeb karti ho. Haan magar jo iman laye aur neik amal karey, yahi log hain jinke liye unke amal ki dohri (double) jaza hai, aur woh baland o baala imaraton mein itminaan se rahenge

t: Waallatheena yasAAawna fee ayatina muAAajizeena olaika fee alAAathabi muhdaroona
u: Rahey woh log jo hamari aayat ko nicha dikhane ke liye daud-dhoop karte hain, to woh azaab mein mubtala hongey

t: Qul inna rabbee yabsutu alrrizqa liman yashao min AAibadihi wayaqdiru lahu wama anfaqtum min shayin fahuwa yukhlifuhu wahuwa khayru alrraziqeena
u: (Aey Nabi), Insey kaho, “mera Rubb apne bandon mein se jisey chahta hai khula rizq deta hai aur jisey chahta hai napa tula deta hai. Jo kuch tum kharch kar detey ho uski jagah whai tumko aur deta hai. Woh sab raziqon(providers) se behtar raziq(provider) hai

t: Wayawma yahshuruhum jameeAAan thumma yaqoolu lilmalaikati ahaolai iyyakum kanoo yaAAbudoona
u: Aur jis din woh tamaam Insano ko jamaa karega phir Farishton se poochega “kya yeh log tumhari hi ibadat kiya karte thay?”

t: Qaloo subhanaka anta waliyyuna min doonihim bal kanoo yaAAbudoona aljinna aktharuhum bihim muminoona
u: To woh jawab denge ke “paak hai aap ki zaat, hamara taaluq to aapse hai na ke in logon se. Dar-asal yeh hamari nahin balke Jinno ki ibadat karte thay, in mein se aksar unhi par iman laye huey thay”

t: Faalyawma la yamliku baAAdukum libaAAdin nafAAan wala darran wanaqoolu lillatheena thalamoo thooqoo AAathaba alnnari allatee kuntum biha tukaththiboona
u: (Us waqt hum kahenge ke) aaj tum mein se koi na kisi ko faida pahuncha sakta hai na nuksan. Aur zaalimon se hum kehdenge ke ab chakkho us azaab e jahannum ka maza jisey tum jhutlaya karte thay

t: Waitha tutla AAalayhim ayatuna bayyinatin qaloo ma hatha illa rajulun yureedu an yasuddakum AAamma kana yaAAbudu abaokum waqaloo ma hatha illa ifkun muftaran waqala allatheena kafaroo lilhaqqi lamma jaahum in hatha illa sihrun mubeenun
u: In logon ko jab hamari saaf saaf aayat sunayi jaati hain to yeh kahte hain ke “yeh shaks to bas yeh chahta hai ke tumko un maboodon se bargashta (turn away) karde jinki ibadat tumhare baap dada karte aaye hain.” aur kehte hain ke “yeh (Quran) mehaz ek jhoot hai ghada hua.” In kafiron ke saamne jab haqq aaya to unhon ne kehdiya ke “ yeh to sareeh jaadu hai”

t: Wama ataynahum min kutubin yadrusoonaha wama arsalna ilayhim qablaka min natheerin
u: Halaanke na humne in logon ko pehle koi kitaab di thi ke yeh usey padhte hon, aur na tumse pehle inki taraf koi mutanabbeh karne wala bheja tha

t: Wakaththaba allatheena min qablihim wama balaghoo miAAshara ma ataynahum fakaththaboo rusulee fakayfa kana nakeeri
u: Insey pehle guzre huey log jhutla chuke hain. Jo kuch humne unhein diya tha uske usrey-asheer (even a tenth/ daswe hissey) ko bhi yeh nahin pahunche hain. Magar jab unhon ne mere Rasoolon ko jhutlaya to dekhlo ke meri saza kaisi sakht thi

t: Qul innama aAAithukum biwahidatin an taqoomoo lillahi mathna wafurada thumma tatafakkaroo ma bisahibikum min jinnatin in huwa illa natheerun lakum bayna yaday AAathabin shadeedin
u: (Aey Nabi), Insey kaho “main tumhein bas ek baat ki naseehat karta hoon, khuda ke liye tum akele akele aur do do mil kar apna dimaag ladaoo aur socho, tumhare saahib[companion(Muhammad)] mein aakhir aisi kaunsi baat hai jo junoon(madness) ki ho? Woh to ek sakht azaab ki aamad (aaney) se pehle tumko mutanabbeh karne wala hai”

t: Qul ma saaltukum min ajrin fahuwa lakum in ajriya illa AAala Allahi wahuwa AAala kulli shayin shaheedun
u: Insey kaho “agar maine tumse koi ajar maanga hai to woh tum hi ko mubarak rahey. Mera ajar to Allah ke zimmey hai aur woh har cheez par gawah hai.”

t: Qul inna rabbee yaqthifu bialhaqqi AAallamu alghuyoobi
u: Insey kaho “mera Rubb (mujhpar) haqq ka ilqa (inspiration/hurls down) karta hai aur woh tamaam posheeda(chupi hui) haqeeqaton ko jaane wala hai”

t: Qul jaa alhaqqu wama yubdio albatilu wama yuAAeedu
u: Kaho, “haqq aa gaya aur ab baatil ke kiye kuch nahin ho sakta”

t: Qul in dalaltu fainnama adillu AAala nafsee waini ihtadaytu fabima yoohee ilayya rabbee innahu sameeAAun qareebun
u: Kaho, “Agar main gumraah ho gaya hoon to meri gumraahi ka wabal mujhpar hai, aur agar main hidayat par hoon to us wahee (revelation) ki bina par hoon jo mera Rubb mere upar nazil karta hai.Woh sabkuch sunta hai aur qareeb hi hai.”

t: Walaw tara ith faziAAoo fala fawta waokhithoo min makanin qareebin
u: Kaash tum dekho inhein us waqt jab yeh log ghabraye phir rahey hongey aur kahin bach kar na ja sakengey, balke qareeb hi se pakad liye jayenge

t: Waqaloo amanna bihi waanna lahumu alttanawushu min makanin baAAeedin
u: Us waqt yeh kahenge ke hum uspar iman le aaye, halanke ab dur nikli hui cheez kahan haath aa sakti hai

t: Waqad kafaroo bihi min qablu wayaqthifoona bialghaybi min makanin baAAeedin
u: Issey pehle yeh kufr kar chuke thay aur bila tehqeeq dur dur ki kodiyan (conjectures) laya karte thay

t: Waheela baynahum wabayna ma yashtahoona kama fuAAila biashyaAAihim min qablu innahum kanoo fee shakkin mureebin
u: Us waqt jis cheez ki yeh tamanna kar rahey hongey ussey mehroom kardiye jayenge jis tarh inke pesh-ro hum mashrab (likes of them before) mehroom ho chuke hongey. Yeh baday gumraah-kun shakk mein paday huey thay

t: Alhamdu lillahi fatiri alssamawati waalardi jaAAili almalaikati rusulan olee ajnihatin mathna wathulatha warubaAAa yazeedu fee alkhalqi ma yashao inna Allaha AAala kulli shayin qadeerun
u: Tareef Allah hi ke liye hai jo aasmaano aur zameen ka banane wala aur Farishton ko paigham rasaan muqarrar karne wala hai. (Aisey Farishtey) jinke do do aur teen teen aur chaar chaar baazu (wings) hain. Woh apni makhooq ki saakht mein jaisa chahta hai izafa karta hai. Yaqeenan Allah har cheez par qadir hai

t: Ma yaftahi Allahu lilnnasi min rahmatin fala mumsika laha wama yumsik fala mursila lahu min baAAdihi wahuwa alAAazeezu alhakeemu
u: Allah jis rehmat ka darwaza bhi logon ke liye khol de usey koi roakne wala nahin, aur jisey woh bandh karde usey Allah ke baad phir koi dusra kholne wala nahin. Woh zabardast aur hakeem hai

t: Ya ayyuha alnnasu othkuroo niAAmata Allahi AAalaykum hal min khaliqin ghayru Allahi yarzuqukum mina alssamai waalardi la ilaha illa huwa faanna tufakoona
u: Logon, tumpar Allah ke jo ehsanaat hain unhein yaad rakkho, kya Allah ke siwa koi aur khaliq bhi hai jo tumhein aasmaan aur zameen se rizq deta ho? Koi mabood uske siwa nahin, Aakhir tum kahan se dhoka kha rahey ho

t: Wain yukaththibooka faqad kuththibat rusulun min qablika waila Allahi turjaAAu alomooru
u: Ab agar (aey Nabi) yeh log tumhein jhutlate hain (to yeh koi nayi baat nahin), tumse pehle bhi bahut se Rasool jhutlaye ja chuke hain, aur sarey maamlaat aakhir e kaar Allah hi ki taraf rujoo honay waley hain

t: Ya ayyuha alnnasu inna waAAda Allahi haqqun fala taghurrannakumu alhayatu alddunya wala yaghurrannakum biAllahi algharooru
u: Logon, Allah ka waada yaqeenan barhaqq (saccha) hai, lihaza duniya ki zindagi tumhein dhoke mein na daley aur na woh bada dhokebaaz tumhein Allah ke barey mein dhoka dene paye

t: Inna alshshaytana lakum AAaduwwun faittakhithoohu AAaduwwan innama yadAAoo hizbahu liyakoonoo min ashabi alssaAAeeri
u: Dar haqeeqat shaytan tumhara dushman hai is liye tum bhi usey apna dushman hi samjho, woh to apne pairawon ko apni raah par is liye bula raha hai ke woh dozakhiyon mein shamil ho jayein

t: Allatheena kafaroo lahum AAathabun shadeedun waallatheena amanoo waAAamiloo alssalihati lahum maghfiratun waajrun kabeerun
u: Jo log kufr karenge unke liye sakht azaab hai aur jo iman layenge aur neik amal karenge unke liye magfirat aur bada ajar hai

t: Afaman zuyyina lahu sooo AAamalihi faraahu hasanan fainna Allaha yudillu man yashao wayahdee man yashao fala tathhab nafsuka AAalayhim hasaratin inna Allaha AAaleemun bima yasnaAAoona
u: (Bhala kuch thikana hai us shaks ki gumraahi ka) jiske liye uska bura amal khushnuma bana diya gaya ho aur woh usey accha samajh raha ho? Haqeeqat yeh hai ke Allah jisey chahta hai gumrahi mein daal deta hai aur jisey chahta hai raah e raast dikha deta hai.Pas (aey Nabi) kha-ma-kha tumhari jaan in logon ki khatir gham-o-afsos mein na ghulay. Jo kuch yeh kar rahey hain Allah usko khoob jaanta hai

t: WaAllahu allathee arsala alrriyaha fatutheeru sahaban fasuqnahu ila baladin mayyitin faahyayna bihi alarda baAAda mawtiha kathalika alnnushooru
u: Woh Allah hi to hai jo hawaon ko bhejta hai, phir woh baadal uthati hain, phir hum usey ek ujadh (banjar) ilakey ki taraf le jatey hain aur usi zameen ko jila uthate hain jo mari padi thi. Marey huey Insano ka jee uthna bhi isi tarah hoga

t: Man kana yureedu alAAizzata falillahi alAAizzatu jameeAAan ilayhi yasAAadu alkalimu alttayyibu waalAAamalu alssalihu yarfaAAuhu waallatheena yamkuroona alssayyiati lahum AAathabun shadeedun wamakru olaika huwa yabooru
u: Jo koi izzat chahta ho usey maloom hona chahiye ke izzat saari ki saari Allah ki hai. Uske haan jo cheez upar chadhti hai woh sirf pakeezah qaul(baat/words) hai, aur amal e saleh usko upar chadhata hai. Rahey woh log jo behuda chaal baaziyan karte hain, unke liye sakht azaab hai aur unka makar (plotting) khud hi gaarat honay wala hai

t: WaAllahu khalaqakum min turabin thumma min nutfatin thumma jaAAalakum azwajan wama tahmilu min ontha wala tadaAAu illa biAAilmihi wama yuAAammaru min muAAammarin wala yunqasu min AAumurihi illa fee kitabin inna thalika AAala Allahi yaseerun
u: Allah ne tumko mitti se paida kiya, phir nutfey(drop of sperm) se, phir tumhare joday bana diye (yani mard aur aurat). Koi aurat hamila (conceive) nahin hoti aur na baccha janti hai magar yeh sab kuch Allah ke ilm mein hota hai. Koi umar paney wala umar nahin paata aur na kisi ki umar mein kuch kami hoti hai magar yeh sab kuch ek kitaab mein likha hota hai. Allah ke liye yeh bahut aasaan kaam hai

t: Wama yastawee albahrani hatha AAathbun furatun saighun sharabuhu wahatha milhun ojajun wamin kullin takuloona lahman tariyyan watastakhrijoona hilyatan talbasoonaha watara alfulka feehi mawakhira litabtaghoo min fadlihi walaAAallakum tashkuroona
u: Aur pani ke dono zakheere yaksan nahin hain. Ek meetha aur pyaas bujhane wala hai, peene mein khushgawar, aur dusra sakht khari (salty) ke halaq sheel de(bitter on the tongue), magar dono se tum tar-o-taaza gosht haasil karte ho. Pehanne ke liye zeenat ka samaan nikalte ho, aur isi pani mein tum dekhte ho ke kashtiyan uska seena cheerti chali jaa rahi hain taa-ke tum Allah ka fazal talash karo aur uske shukar guzar bano

t: Yooliju allayla fee alnnahari wayooliju alnnahara fee allayli wasakhkhara alshshamsa waalqamara kullun yajree liajalin musamman thalikumu Allahu rabbukum lahu almulku waallatheena tadAAoona min doonihi ma yamlikoona min qitmeerin
u: Woh din ke andar raat ko aur raat ke andar din ko pirota hua le aata hai.Chand aur Suraj ko usne musakkhar kar rakkha hai. Yeh sab kuch ek waqt-e-muqarrar tak chale jaa raha hain. Wahi Allah (jiske yeh sarey kaam hai) tumhara Rubb hai, baadshahi usi ki hai usey chodh kar jin dusron ko tum pukarte ho woh ek parekaah (skin of a date-stone) ke maalik bhi nahin hai

t: In tadAAoohum la yasmaAAoo duAAaakum walaw samiAAoo ma istajaboo lakum wayawma alqiyamati yakfuroona bishirkikum wala yunabbioka mithlu khabeerin
u: Inhein pukaro to woh tumhari duaein sun nahin sakte.Aur sun lein to unka tumhein koi jawab nahin de sakte.Aur qayamat ke roz woh tumhare shirk ka inkar kardenge. Haqeeqat e haal ki aisi saheeh khabar tumhein ek khabardar ke siwa koi nahin de sakta

t: Ya ayyuha alnnasu antumu alfuqarao ila Allahi waAllahu huwa alghaniyyu alhameedu
u: Logon, Tum hi Allah ke mohtaj ho aur Allah to Gani(Self-Sufficient) o Hameed (Immensely Praiseworthy) hai

t: In yasha yuthhibkum wayati bikhalqin jadeedin
u: Woh chahey to tumhein hata kar koi nayi khalqat (creation) tumhari jagah le aaye

t: Wama thalika AAala Allahi biAAazeezin
u: Aisa karna Allah ke liye kuch bhi dushwar nahin

t: Wala taziru waziratun wizra okhra wain tadAAu muthqalatun ila himliha la yuhmal minhu shayon walaw kana tha qurba innama tunthiru allatheena yakhshawna rabbahum bialghaybi waaqamoo alssalata waman tazakka fainnama yatazakka linafsihi waila Allahi almaseeru
u: Koi bojh uthane wala kisi dusre ka bojh na uthayega.Aur agar koi lada hua (heavily laden) nafs apna bojh uthane ke liye pukarega to uske baar ka ek adna (chota) hissa bhi batane ke liye koi na aayega chahe woh kareeb-tareen rishtedar hi kyun na ho. (Aey Nabi) tum sirf unhi logon ko mutanabbeh (warn) kar sakte ho jo bay-dekhe apne Rubb se darte hain aur namaz qayam karte hain. Jo shaks bhi pakeezgi ikhtiyar karta hai apne hi bhalayi ke liye karta hai aur palatna sabko Allah hi ki taraf hai

t: Wama yastawee alaAAma waalbaseeru
u: Andha aur aankhon wala barabar nahin hai

t: Wala alththulumatu wala alnnooru
u: Na tareekiyan (darkness) aur roshni yaksan hain

t: Wala alththillu wala alharooru
u: Na thandi chaaon aur dhoop ki tapish ek jaisi hai

t: Wama yastawee alahyao wala alamwatu inna Allaha yusmiAAu man yashao wama anta bimusmiAAin man fee alquboori
u: Aur na zinde aur murde musavi (barabar) hain. Allah jisey chahta hai sunwata (hear) hai, magar (aey Nabi) tum un logon ko nahin suna sakte ho qabaron mein madfoon hain

t: In anta illa natheerun
u: Tum to bas ek khabardar karne waley ho

t: Inna arsalnaka bialhaqqi basheeran wanatheeran wain min ommatin illa khala feeha natheerun
u: Humne tumko haqq ke saath bheja hai. Basharat (khush khabri) dene wala aur darane wala banakar. Aur koi ummat aisi nahin guzri hai jismein koi mutanabbeh (warn) karne wala na aaya ho

t: Wain yukaththibooka faqad kaththaba allatheena min qablihim jaathum rusuluhum bialbayyinati wabialzzuburi wabialkitabi almuneeri
u: Ab agar yeh log tumhein jhutlate hain to insey pehle guzre huey log bhi jhutla chuke hain. Unke paas unke Rasool khule dalail (proofs) aur saheefay (scriptures) aur roshan hidayaat (guidance) dene wali kitaab lekar aaye thay

t: Thumma akhathtu allatheena kafaroo fakayfa kana nakeeri
u: Phir jin logon ne na maana unko maine pakad liya aur dekhlo ke meri saza kaisi sakht thi

t: Alam tara anna Allaha anzala mina alssamai maan faakhrajna bihi thamaratin mukhtalifan alwanuha wamina aljibali judadun beedun wahumrun mukhtalifun alwanuha wagharabeebu soodun
u: Kya tum dekhte nahin ho ke Allah aasmaan se pani barsata hai aur phir iske zariye se hum tarah tarah ke phal nikal latey hain jinke rang mukhtalif hotey hain. Pahadon mein bhi safed (white), surkh (red) aur gehri siyah(pitchy black) dhariyan payi jaati hain jinke rang mukhtalif hotay hain

t: Wamina alnnasi waalddawabbi waalanAAami mukhtalifun alwanuhu kathalika innama yakhsha Allaha min AAibadihi alAAulamao inna Allaha AAazeezun ghafoorun
u: Aur isi tarah Insano aur jaanwaron aur maweshiyon ke rang bhi mukhtalif hain. Haqeeqat yeh hai ke Allah ke bandon mein se sirf ilm rakhne wale log hi ussey darte hain. Beshak Allah zabardast aur darguzar farmane wala hai

t: Inna allatheena yatloona kitaba Allahi waaqamoo alssalata waanfaqoo mimma razaqnahum sirran waAAalaniyatan yarjoona tijaratan lan taboora
u: Jo log kitaabullah ki tilawat karte hain aur namaz qayam karte hain, aur jo kuch humne unhein rizq diya hai usmein se khule aur chupey kharch karte hain, yaqeenan woh ek aisi tijarat ke mutawaqqeh (umeedwaar) hain jismein hargiz khasara(nuksan) na hoga

t: Liyuwaffiyahum ojoorahum wayazeedahum min fadlihi innahu ghafoorun shakoorun
u: (Is tijarat mein unhon ne apna sabkuch is liye khapaya hai) taa-ke Allah unke ajar pooray ke pooray unko de aur mazeed apne fazal se unko ata farmaye. Beshak Allah bakshne wala aur qadardaan (appreciative) hai

t: Waallathee awhayna ilayka mina alkitabi huwa alhaqqu musaddiqan lima bayna yadayhi inna Allaha biAAibadihi lakhabeerun baseerun
u: (Aey Nabi) jo kitaab humne tumhari taraf wahee ke zariye se bheji hai wahi haqq hai, tasdeeq (confirm) karti hui aayi hai un kitaabon ki jo issey pehle aayi thin. Beshak Allah apne bandon ke haal se bakhabar hai, aur har cheez par nigaah rakhne wala hai

t: Thumma awrathna alkitaba allatheena istafayna min AAibadina faminhum thalimun linafsihi waminhum muqtasidun waminhum sabiqun bialkhayrati biithni Allahi thalika huwa alfadlu alkabeeru
u: Phir humne is kitaab ka waris bana diya un logon ko jinhein humne (is virasat ke liye) apne bandon mein se chun liya. Ab koi to inmein se apne nafs par zulm karne wala hai, aur koi beach ki raas hai (medium course), aur koi Allah ke izan se nekiyon mein sabaqat karne wala (aagey badne wala) hai, yahi bahut bada fazal hai

t: Jannatu AAadnin yadkhuloonaha yuhallawna feeha min asawira min thahabin waluluan walibasuhum feeha hareerun
u: Hamesha rehne wali jannatein hain jinmein yeh log dakhil hongey, wahan inhein soonay (gold) ke kangano (bracelets) aur motiyon (pearls) se aarasta (adorn) kiya jayega, wahan inka libas resham hoga

t: Waqaloo alhamdu lillahi allathee athhaba AAanna alhazana inna rabbana laghafoorun shakoorun
u: Aur woh kahenge ke shukar hai us khuda ka jisne humse gham door kardiya, yaqeenan hamara Rubb maaf karne wala aur qadar farmane wala hai

t: Allathee ahallana dara almuqamati min fadlihi la yamassuna feeha nasabun wala yamassuna feeha lughoobun
u: Jisne humein apne fazal se abadi (hamesha ke) qayam ki jagah thehra diya, ab yahan na humein koi mushaqqat pesh aati hai aur na thakaan lahiq hoti hai

t: Waallatheena kafaroo lahum naru jahannama la yuqda AAalayhim fayamootoo wala yukhaffafu AAanhum min AAathabiha kathalika najzee kulla kafoorin
u: Aur jin logon ne kufr kiya hai unke liye jahannum ki aag hai, na unka qissa paak kardiya jayega ke marr jayein aur na unke liye jahannum ke azaab mein koi kami ki jayegi. Is tarah hum badla detey hain har us shaks ko jo kufr karne wala hai

t: Wahum yastarikhoona feeha rabbana akhrijna naAAmal salihan ghayra allathee kunna naAAmalu awalam nuAAammirkum ma yatathakkaru feehi man tathakkara wajaakumu alnnatheeru fathooqoo fama lilththalimeena min naseerin
u: Woh wahan cheekh cheekh kar kahenge ke “Aey hamare Rubb humein yahan se nikal le taa-ke hum neik amal karein, un aamaal se mukhtalif jo pehle karte rahey thay.” (unhein jawab diya jayega) “Kya humne tumko itni umar na di thi ji mein koi sabaq lena chahta to sabaq le sakta tha? Aur tumhare paas mutanabbeh (warn) karne wala bhi aa chuka tha. Ab maza chakkho. Zaalimon ka yahan koi madadgaar nahin hai

t: Inna Allaha AAalimu ghaybi alssamawati waalardi innahu AAaleemun bithati alssudoori
u: Beshak Allah aasmaano aur zameen ki har posheeda (chupi) cheez se waqif hai.Woh to seeno ke chupey huey raaz tak jaanta hai

t: Huwa allathee jaAAalakum khalaifa fee alardi faman kafara faAAalayhi kufruhu wala yazeedu alkafireena kufruhum AAinda rabbihim illa maqtan wala yazeedu alkafireena kufruhum illa khasaran
u: Wahi to hai jisne tumko zameen mein khalifa banaya hai. Ab jo koi kufr karta hai uske kufr ka wabal (burden) usi par hai, aur kaafiron ko unka kufr iske siwa koi taraqqi nahin deta ke unke Rubb ka gazab unpar zyada se zyada bhadakta chala jaata hai. Kaafiron ke liye khasare (nuksan) mein izafey ke siwa koi taraqqi nahin

t: Qul araaytum shurakaakumu allatheena tadAAoona min dooni Allahi aroonee matha khalaqoo mina alardi am lahum shirkun fee alssamawati am ataynahum kitaban fahum AAala bayyinatin minhu bal in yaAAidu alththalimoona baAAduhum baAAdan illa ghurooran
u: (Aey Nabi) insey kaho, “kabhi tumne dekha bhi hai apne un shareekon ko jinhein tum khuda ko chodh kar pukara karte ho? Mujhey batao, unhon ne zameen mein kya paida kiya hai? Ya aasmaano mein unki kya shirkat hai?” (Agar yeh nahin bata sakte to insey pucho) kya humne inhein koi tehrir (written) likh kar di hai jiski bina par yeh (apne is shareek ke liye) koi saaf sanad rakhte hon? Nahin, balke yeh zaalim ek dusre ko mehaz fareb ke jhanse diye jaa rahe hain

t: Inna Allaha yumsiku alssamawati waalarda an tazoola walain zalata in amsakahuma min ahadin min baAAdihi innahu kana haleeman ghafooran
u: Haqeeqat yeh hai ke Allah hi hai jo aasmaano aur zameen ko tal (displace) janey se roke huey hai, aur agar woh tal (displace) jayein to Allah ke baad koi dusra inhein thamnay (hold) wala nahin hai. Beshak Allah bada haleem (Forbearing) aur darguzar farmane wala hai

t: Waaqsamoo biAllahi jahda aymanihim lain jaahum natheerun layakoonunna ahda min ihda alomami falamma jaahum natheerun ma zadahum illa nufooran
u: Yeh log kadi kadi qasmein kha kar kaha karte thay ke agar koi khabardar karne wala unke haan aa gaya hota to yeh duniya ki har dusri qaum se badh kar raast-ro(better-guided ) hotay. Magar jab khabardar karne wala inke paas aa gaya to uski aamad (coming) ne inke andar haqq se farar ke siwa kisi cheez mein izafa na kiya

t: Istikbaran fee alardi wamakra alssayyii wala yaheequ almakru alssayyio illa biahlihi fahal yanthuroona illa sunnata alawwaleena falan tajida lisunnati Allahi tabdeelan walan tajida lisunnati Allahi tahweelan
u: Yeh zameen mein aur zyada istakbaar (guroor) karne lagay aur buri buri chaalein chalne lagey, halanke buri chaalein chalne walon hi ko lay baithti hai. Ab kya yeh log iska intezar kar rahey hain ke pichli qaumon ke saath Allah ka jo tareeqa raha hai wahi inke saath bhi barta jaaye? Yahi baat hai to tum Allah ke tareeqe mein hargiz koi tabdili na paogey aur tum kabhi na dekhoge ke Allah ki sunnat ko uske muqarrar raaste se koi taaqat pher sakti hai

t: Awalam yaseeroo fee alardi fayanthuroo kayfa kana AAaqibatu allatheena min qablihim wakanoo ashadda minhum quwwatan wama kana Allahu liyuAAjizahu min shayin fee alssamawati wala fee alardi innahu kana AAaleeman qadeeran
u: Kya yeh log zameen mein kabhi chaley phirey nahin hain ke inhein un logon ka anjaam nazar aata jo insey pehle guzar chuke hain, aur insey bahut zyada taaqatwar thay? Allah ko koi cheez aajiz (frustrate) karne wali nahin hai, na aasmaano mein aur na zameen mein. Woh sab kuch jaanta hai aur har cheez par qudrat rakhta hai

t: Walaw yuakhithu Allahu alnnasa bima kasaboo ma taraka AAala thahriha min dabbatin walakin yuakhkhiruhum ila ajalin musamman faitha jaa ajaluhum fainna Allaha kana biAAibadihi baseeran
u: Agar kahin woh logon ko unke kiye kartooton par pakadta to zameen par kisi mutanaffis (living creature) ko jeeta (zinda) na chodhta. Magar woh unhein ek muqarrar waqt tak ke liye mohlat de raha hai, phir jab unka waqt aan poora hoga to Allah apne bandon ko dekh lega

t: Yaseen
u: Yasin

t: Waalqurani alhakeemi
u: Kasam hai Quran e Hakeem ki

t: Innaka lamina almursaleena
u: Ke tum yaqeenan Rasoolon mein se ho

t: AAala siratin mustaqeemin
u: Seedhey raastey par ho

t: Tanzeela alAAazeezi alrraheemi
u: (Aur yeh Quran) gaalib aur Raheem hasti ka nazil karda hai

t: Litunthira qawman ma onthira abaohum fahum ghafiloona
u: Taa-ke tum khabardar karo ek aisi qaum ko jiske baap dada khabardar na kiye gaye thay aur is wajah se woh gaflat mein padey huey hain

t: Laqad haqqa alqawlu AAala aktharihim fahum la yuminoona
u: Inmein se aksar log faisla-e-azaab ke mustahiq ho chuke hain, isi liye woh iman nahin latey

t: Inna jaAAalna fee aAAnaqihim aghlalan fahiya ila alathqani fahum muqmahoona
u: Humne unki gardano mein tauq (bedi /fetters) daal diye hain jinse woh thodiyon (chins) tak jakade gaye hain, isliye woh sar uthaye khade hain

t: WajaAAalna min bayni aydeehim saddan wamin khalfihim saddan faaghshaynahum fahum la yubsiroona
u: Humne ek deewar unke aagey khadi kardi hai aur ek deewar unke peechey, humne unhein dhaank diya hai, unhein ab kuch nahin soojhta

t: Wasawaon AAalayhim aanthartahum am lam tunthirhum la yuminoona
u: Unke liye yaksan hai, tum unhein khabardar karo ya na karo, yeh na maanengey

t: Innama tunthiru mani ittabaAAa alththikra wakhashiya alrrahmana bialghaybi fabashshirhu bimaghfiratin waajrin kareemin
u: Tum to usi shaks ko khabardar kar sakte ho jo naseehat ki pairvi karey aur bay-dekhe khuda e rehman se darey, usey magfirat aur ajr-e-karim ki basharat (khush khabri) de do

t: Inna nahnu nuhyee almawta wanaktubu ma qaddamoo waatharahum wakulla shayin ahsaynahu fee imamin mubeenin
u: Hum yaqeenan ek roz murdon ko zinda karne waley hain jo kuch afaal (aamal) unhon ne kiye hain woh sab hum likhte rahey hain, aur jo kuch aasaar unhon ne peechey chodhey hain woh bhi hum sabt (likh) rahey hain. Har cheez ko humne ek khuli kitaab mein darj kar rakkha hai

t: Waidrib lahum mathalan ashaba alqaryati ith jaaha almursaloona
u: Inhein misaal ke taur par us basti walon ka qissa sunao jabke usmein Rasool aaye thay

t: Ith arsalna ilayhimu ithnayni fakaththaboohuma faAAazzazna bithalithin faqaloo inna ilaykum mursaloona
u: Humne unki taraf do Rasool bheje aur unhon ne dono ko jhutla diya phir humne teesra madad ke liye bheja aur unsab ne kaha “Hum tumhari taraf Rasool ki haisiyat se bheje gaye hain”

t: Qaloo ma antum illa basharun mithluna wama anzala alrrahmanu min shayin in antum illa takthiboona
u: Basti walon ne kaha “ tum kuch nahin ho magar hum jaise chandh Insaan, aur khuda e rehman ne hargiz koi cheez nazil nahin ki hai, tum mehaz jhoot boltey ho.”

t: Qaloo rabbuna yaAAlamu inna ilaykum lamursaloona
u: Rasoolon ne kaha “ hamara Rubb jaanta hai ke hum zarooor tumhari taraf Rasool bana kar bheje gaye hain

t: Wama AAalayna illa albalaghu almubeenu
u: Aur humpar saaf saaf paigham pahuncha dene ke siwa koi zimmedari nahin hai”

t: Qaloo inna tatayyarna bikum lain lam tantahoo lanarjumannakum walayamassannakum minna AAathabun aleemun
u: Basti waley kehne lagey “hum to tumhein apne liye faal-e-badd (manhoos) samajhte hain , agar tum baaz na aaye to hum tumko sangsaar(stoning) kar dengey aur humse tum badi dardnaak saza paogey”

t: Qaloo tairukum maAAakum ain thukkirtum bal antum qawmun musrifoona
u: Rasoolon ne jawab diya “tumhari faal-e-badd (nahusat) to tumhare apne saath lagi hui hai , kya yeh baatein tum isliye karte ho ke tumhein naseehat ki gayi? Asal baat yeh hai ke tum hadd se guzre huey log ho”

t: Wajaa min aqsa almadeenati rajulun yasAAa qala ya qawmi ittabiAAoo almursaleena
u: Itne mein shehar ke door daraaz goshey se ek shaks daudta hua aaya aur bola “Aey meri qaum ke logon, Rasoolon ki pairwi ikhtiyar karlo

t: IttabiAAoo man la yasalukum ajran wahum muhtadoona
u: Pairwi karo un logon ki jo tumse koi ajar nahin chahte aur theek raaste par hain

t: Wama liya la aAAbudu allathee fataranee wailayhi turjaAAoona
u: Aakhir kyun na main us hasti ki bandagi karoon jisne mujhey paida kiya hai aur jiski taraf tum sabko palat kar jana hai

t: Aattakhithu min doonihi alihatan in yuridni alrrahmanu bidurrin la tughni AAannee shafaAAatuhum shayan wala yunqithooni
u: Kya main usey chodh kar dusre ko mabood bana loon? Halaanke agar khuda e Rehman mujhey koi nuksaan pahunchana chahe to na unki shafaat mere kisi kaam aa sakti hai aur na woh mujhey chuda hi sakte hain

t: Innee ithan lafee dalalin mubeenin
u: Agar main aisa karoon to main sareeh gumraahi mein mubtala ho jaunga

t: Innee amantu birabbikum faismaAAooni
u: Main to tumhare Rubb par iman le aaya, tum bhi meri baat maan lo.”

t: Qeela odkhuli aljannata qala ya layta qawmee yaAAlamoona
u: (aakhir e kaar un logon ne usey qatal kardiya aur) us shaks se kehdiya gaya ke “daakhil ho ja jannat mein” usne kaha “kaash meri qaum ko maaloom hota

t: Bima ghafara lee rabbee wajaAAalanee mina almukrameena
u: Ke mere Rubb ne kis cheez ki badaulat meri magfirat farma di aur mujhey ba-izzat logon mein daakhil farmaya”

t: Wama anzalna AAala qawmihi min baAAdihi min jundin mina alssamai wama kunna munzileena
u: Iske baad uski qaum par humne aasmaan se koi lashkar nahin utara , humein lashkar bhejne ki koi haajat na thi

t: In kanat illa sayhatan wahidatan faitha hum khamidoona
u: Bas ek dhamaka hua aur yakayak woh sab bujh kar reh gaye

t: Ya hasratan AAala alAAibadi ma yateehim min rasoolin illa kanoo bihi yastahzioona
u: Afsos bandon ke haal par, jo Rasool bhi unke paas aaya uska woh mazaaq hi udatey rahey

t: Alam yaraw kam ahlakna qablahum mina alqurooni annahum ilayhim la yarjiAAoona
u: Kya unhon ne dekha nahin ke unsey pehle kitni hi qaumon ko hum halaak kar chuke hain aur iske baad woh phir kabhi unki taraf palat kar na aaye

t: Wain kullun lamma jameeAAun ladayna muhdaroona
u: Un sab ko ek roz hamare saamne haazir kiya jaana hai

t: Waayatun lahumu alardu almaytatu ahyaynaha waakhrajna minha habban faminhu yakuloona
u: In logon ke liye be-jaan zameen ek nishani hai, humne isko zindagi bakshi aur issey galla (anaaj / grain) nikala jisey yeh khaate hain

t: WajaAAalna feeha jannatin min nakheelin waaAAnabin wafajjarna feeha mina alAAuyooni
u: Humne ismein khajuron aur angooron ke baagh paida kiye aur uske andar chashme (springs) phodh nikale

t: Liyakuloo min thamarihi wama AAamilathu aydeehim afala yashkuroona
u: Taa-ke yeh uske phal khayein, yeh sab kuch inke apne haathon ka paida kiya hua nahin hai phir kya yeh shukar ada nahin karte

t: Subhana allathee khalaqa alazwaja kullaha mimma tunbitu alardu wamin anfusihim wamimma la yaAAlamoona
u: Paak hai woh zaat jisne jumla aqsaam ke joday paida kiye khwah woh zameen ki nabataat mein se hon ya khud inki apni jins (yani naw-e-Insani) mein se ya un ashyah mein se jinko yeh jaante tak nahin hain

t: Waayatun lahumu allaylu naslakhu minhu alnnahara faitha hum muthlimoona
u: Inke liye ek aur nishani raat hai, hum uske upar se din hata dete hain to inpar andhera chaa jata hai

t: Waalshshamsu tajree limustaqarrin laha thalika taqdeeru alAAazeezi alAAaleemi
u: Aur Suraj, woh apne thikane ki taraf chala ja raha hai, yeh zabardat aleem(All-Knowing) hasti ka bandha hua hisaab hai

t: Waalqamara qaddarnahu manazila hatta AAada kaalAAurjooni alqadeemi
u: Aur chand, uske liye humne manzilein muqarrar kardi hain yahan tak ke insey guzarta hua woh phir khajur ki sukhi shaakh (dry old branch) ke manind reh jata hai

t: Aifkan alihatan doona Allahi tureedoona
u: Kya Allah ko chodh kar jhoot ghadey huey maabood chahte ho

t: Fama thannukum birabbi alAAalameena
u: Aakhir Allah Rubb-ul-Aalameen ke baarey mein tumhara kya gumaan hai?”

t: Fanathara nathratan fee alnnujoomi
u: Phir usne taaron par ek nigaah daali

t: Faqala innee saqeemun
u: Aur kaha meri tabiyat kharaab hai

t: Fatawallaw AAanhu mudbireena
u: Chunanche woh log usey chodh kar chale gaye

t: Faragha ila alihatihim faqala ala takuloona
u: Unke peechey woh chupke se unke maboodon ke mandir mein ghus gaya aur bola “aap log khate kyun nahin hain

t: Ma lakum la tantiqoona
u: Kya ho gaya, aap log bolte bhi nahin?”

t: Faragha AAalayhim darban bialyameeni
u: Iske baad woh unpar pil (toot) pada aur seedhay haath se khoob zarbein lagayi (todhna shuru kiya)

t: Faaqbaloo ilayhi yaziffoona
u: (Wapas aakar) woh log bhaage bhaage uske paas aaye

t: Qala ataAAbudoona ma tanhitoona
u: Usne kaha “kya tum apni hi tarashi hui cheezon ko poojhte ho

t: WaAllahu khalaqakum wama taAAmaloona
u: Halaanke Allah hi ne tumko bhi paida kiya hai aur un cheezon ko bhi jinhein tum banatey ho”

t: Qaloo ibnoo lahu bunyanan faalqoohu fee aljaheemi
u: Unhon ne aapas mein kaha “ iske liya ek alaaw (pyre) tayyar karo aur isey dehakti hui aag ke dhair mein phenk do”

t: Faaradoo bihi kaydan fajaAAalnahumu alasfaleena
u: Unhon ne uske khilaf ek karawayi karna chahi thi, magar humne unhi ko nicha dikha diya

t: Waqala innee thahibun ila rabbee sayahdeeni
u: Ibrahim ne kaha “ main apne Rubb ki taraf jata hoon, wahi meri rehnumayi karega

t: Rabbi hab lee mina alssaliheena
u: Aey parwardigar , mujhey ek beta ata kar jo salihon (righteous) mein se ho”

t: Fabashsharnahu bighulamin haleemin
u: (Is dua ke jawab mein)humne usko ek haleem (burdbaar) ladke ki basharat di

t: Falamma balagha maAAahu alssaAAya qala ya bunayya innee ara fee almanami annee athbahuka faonthur matha tara qala ya abati ifAAal ma tumaru satajidunee in shaa Allahu mina alssabireena
u: Woh ladka jab uske saath daud dhoop karne ki umar ko pahunch gaya to ( ek roz) Ibrahim ne ussey kaha, “beta, main khwab mein dekhta hoon ke main tujhey zibaah kar raha hoon, ab tu bata, tera kya khayal hai?” usne kaha, “abbajan , jo kuch aapko hukum diya jaa raha hai usey kar daliye, aap insha Allah mujhey saabiron(sabr karne walon) mein se payenge”

t: Falamma aslama watallahu liljabeeni
u: Aakhir ko jab in dono ne sar-e-tasleem kham kardiya aur Ibrahim ne bete ko maathay ke bal gira diya

t: Wanadaynahu an ya ibraheemu
u: Aur humne nida di ke “Aey Ibrahim

t: Qad saddaqta alrruya inna kathalika najzee almuhsineena
u: Tu nay khwab sach kar dikhaya hum neki karne walon ko aisi hi jaza deta hain

t: Inna hatha lahuwa albalao almubeenu
u: Yaqeenan yeh ek khuli aazmaaish thi”

t: Wafadaynahu bithibhin AAatheemin
u: Aur humne ek badi qurbani fidiye mein de kar us bacchey ko chuda liya

t: Watarakna AAalayhi fee alakhireena
u: Aur uski taarif o tauseef hamesha ke liye baad ki nasalon mein chodh di

t: Salamun AAala ibraheema
u: Salaam hai Ibrahim par

t: Kathalika najzee almuhsineena
u: Hum neki karne waalon ko aisi hi jaza detay hain

t: Innahu min AAibadina almumineena
u: Yaqeenan woh hamare momin bandon mein se tha

t: Wabashsharnahu biishaqa nabiyyan mina alssaliheena
u: Aur humne usey Ishaq(Issac) ki basharat di , ek Nabi saliheen mein se

t: Wabarakna AAalayhi waAAala ishaqa wamin thurriyyatihima muhsinun wathalimun linafsihi mubeenun
u: Aur usey aur Ishaq ko barakat di. Ab in dono ki zurriyat mein se koi mohsin hai aur koi apne nafs par sareeh zulm karne wala hai

t: Walaqad mananna AAala moosa waharoona
u: Aur humne Moosa o Haroon par ehsan kiya

t: Wanajjaynahuma waqawmahuma mina alkarbi alAAatheemi
u: Unko aur unki qaum ko karb-e-azeem( badi museebat) se nijaat di

t: Wanasarnahum fakanoo humu alghalibeena
u: Unhein nusrat bakshi jiski wajah se wahi galib rahey

t: Waataynahuma alkitaba almustabeena
u: Unko nihayat wazeh kitaab ata ki

t: Wahadaynahuma alssirata almustaqeema
u: Unhein raah-e-raast dikhayi

t: Watarakna AAalayhima fee alakhireena
u: Aur baad ki nasalon mein unka zikr e khair baaqi rakkha

t: Salamun AAala moosa waharoona
u: Salaam hai Mossa aur Haroon par

t: Inna kathalika najzee almuhsineena
u: Hum neki karne walon ko aisi hi jaza detay hain

t: Innahuma min AAibadina almumineena
u: Dar haqeeqat woh hamare momin bandon mein se thay

t: Wainna ilyasa lamina almursaleena
u: Aur Ilyas bhi yaqeenan mursaleen(messengers) mein se tha

t: Ith qala liqawmihi ala tattaqoona
u: Yaad karo jab usne apni qaum se kaha tha ke “tum log darte nahin ho

t: AtadAAoona baAAlan watatharoona ahsana alkhaliqeena
u: Kya tum BAAL ko pukarte ho aur ahsanul khaliqeen ko chodh dete ho

t: Allaha rabbakum warabba abaikumu alawwaleena
u: Us Allah ko jo tumhara aur tumhare agle pichle aaba o ajdaad ka Rubb hai?”

t: Fakaththaboohu fainnahum lamuhdaroona
u: Magar unhon ne usey jhutla diya, so ab yaqeenan woh saza ke liye pesh kiye janey waley hain

t: Illa AAibada Allahi almukhlaseena
u: Bajuz un bandagaan e khuda ke jinko khaalis karliya gaya tha

t: Watarakna AAalayhi fee alakhireena
u: Aur Ilyas ka zikr e khair humne baad ki nasalon mein baaki rakkha

t: Salamun AAala il yaseena
u: Salaam hai Ilyas par

t: Inna kathalika najzee almuhsineena
u: Hum neki karne walon ko aisi hi jaza dete hain

t: Innahu min AAibadina almumineena
u: Waqayi wo hamare momin bandon mein se tha

t: Wainna lootan lamina almursaleena
u: Aur Lut bhi unhi logon mein se tha jo Rasool bana kar bheje gaye hain

t: Ith najjaynahu waahlahu ajmaAAeena
u: Yaad karo jab humne usko aur uske sab gar walon ko nijaat di

t: Illa AAajoozan fee alghabireena
u: Siwaye ek budiya ke jo peechey reh janey walon mein se thi

t: Thumma dammarna alakhareena
u: Phir baaki sabko tehas nehas kardiya

t: Wainnakum latamurroona AAalayhim musbiheena
u: Aaj tum shab-o-roz unke ujday dayar (desolate habitations) par se guzarte ho

t: Wabiallayli afala taAAqiloona
u: Kya tumko aqal nahin aati

t: Wainna yoonusa lamina almursaleena
u: Aur yaqeenan Yunus bhi Rasoolon mein se tha

t: Ith abaqa ila alfulki almashhooni
u: Yaad karo jab woh ek bhari kashti ki taraf bhaag nikla

t: Fasahama fakana mina almudhadeena
u: Phir quora andazi (cast lots) mein shareek hua aur usmein maath khayi (among the losers)

t: Failtaqamahu alhootu wahuwa muleemun
u: Aakhir e kaar machli ne usey nigal liya aur woh malamat zada tha

t: Falawla annahu kana mina almusabbiheena
u: Ab agar woh tasbeeh karne walon mein se na hota to

t: Lalabitha fee batnihi ila yawmi yubAAathoona
u: Roz-e-qayamat tak usi machli ke pait mein rehta

t: Fanabathnahu bialAAarai wahuwa saqeemun
u: Aakhir humne usey badi sakheem (bimar /ill) halat mein ek chatiyal zameen par phenk diya

t: Waanbatna AAalayhi shajaratan min yaqteenin
u: Aur uspar ek bail-daar darakht (a spreading plant of the gourd kind) uga diya

t: Waarsalnahu ila miati alfin aw yazeedoona
u: Iske baad humne usey ek lakh ya us sey zayad logon ki taraf bheja

t: Faamanoo famattaAAnahum ila heenin
u: Woh imaan laye aur humne ek waqt e khaas tak unhein baaqi rakkha

t: Faistaftihim alirabbika albanatu walahumu albanoona
u: Phir zara in logon se pucho, kya (inke dil ko yeh baat lagti hai ke) tumhare Rubb ke liye to hon betiyan aur inke liye hon betay

t: Am khalaqna almalaikata inathan wahum shahidoona
u: Kya waqayi humne malaika (farishton) ko auratein banaya hai aur yeh aankhon dekhi baat keh rahey hain

t: Ala innahum min ifkihim layaqooloona
u: Khoob sun rakkho, dar-asal yeh log apni mann ghadat se yeh baat kehte hain

t: Walada Allahu wainnahum lakathiboona
u: Ke Allah aulad rakhta hai, aur fil waqayi yeh jhootey hain

t: Astafa albanati AAala albaneena
u: Kya Allah ne beton ke bajaye betiyan apne liye pasand karli

t: Ma lakum kayfa tahkumoona
u: Tumhein kya ho gaya hai, kaise hukum laga rahey ho

t: Afala tathakkaroona
u: Kya tumhein hosh nahin aata

t: Am lakum sultanun mubeenun
u: Ya phir tumhare paas apni in baaton ke liye koi saaf sanad (daleel) hai

t: Fatoo bikitabikum in kuntum sadiqeena
u: To lao apni woh kitaab agar tum sachhey ho

t: WajaAAaloo baynahu wabayna aljinnati nasaban walaqad AAalimati aljinnatu innahum lamuhdaroona
u: Inhon ne Allah aur malaika ke darmiyan nasab (kinship)ka rishta bana rakkha hai, halanke malaika khoob jaante hain ke yeh log mujrim ki haisiyat se pesh honay waley hain

t: Subhana Allahi AAamma yasifoona
u: (aur woh kehte hain ke) “Allah un sifaat se paak hai

t: Illa AAibada Allahi almukhlaseena
u: Jo uske khaalis bandon ke siwa dusre log uski taraf mansoob karte hain

t: Fainnakum wama taAAbudoona
u: Pas tum aur tumhare yeh mabood

t: Ma antum AAalayhi bifatineena
u: Allah se kisi ko pher nahin sakte

t: Illa man huwa sali aljaheemi
u: Magar sifr usko jo dozakh ki bhadakti hui aag mein jhulasne wala ho

t: Wama minna illa lahu maqamun maAAloomun
u: Aur hamara haal to yeh hai ke hum mein se har ek ka ek muqaam mukarrar hai

t: Wainna lanahnu alssaffoona
u: Aur hum saff basta (in rows) khidmatgaar hain

t: Wainna lanahnu almusabbihoona
u: Tasbeeh karne waley hain.”

t: Wain kanoo layaqooloona
u: Yeh log pehle to kaha karte thay

t: Law anna AAindana thikran mina alawwaleena
u: Ke kaash hamare paas woh “Zikr” hota jo pichli qaumon ko mila tha

t: Lakunna AAibada Allahi almukhlaseena
u: To hum Allah ke cheedah (chune huey/chosen) banday hotay

t: Fakafaroo bihi fasawfa yaAAlamoona
u: Magar (jab woh aa gaya) to inhon ne uska inkar kardiya, ab ankareeb inhein (is rawish ka natija) maloom ho jayega

t: Walaqad sabaqat kalimatuna liAAibadina almursaleena
u: Apne bheje huey bandon se hum pehle hi waada kar chuke hain

t: Innahum lahumu almansooroona
u: Ke yaqeenan unki madad ki jayegi

t: Wainna jundana lahumu alghaliboona
u: Aur hamara lashkar hi gaalib hokar rahega

t: Fatawalla AAanhum hatta heenin
u: Pas (aey Nabi) zara kuch muddat tak inhein inke haal par chodh do

t: Waabsirhum fasawfa yubsiroona
u: Aur dekhte raho, anqareeb yeh khud bhi dekh lengey

t: AfabiAAathabina yastaAAjiloona
u: Kya yeh hamare azaab ke liye jaldi macha rahey hain

t: Faitha nazala bisahatihim fasaa sabahu almunthareena
u: Jab woh inke sehan (maidan/open space) mein aa utrega woh din un logon ke liye bahut bura hoga jinhein mutanabbeh (warn) kiya ja chuka hai

t: Watawalla AAanhum hatta heenin
u: Pas zara inhein kuch muddat ke liye chodh do

t: Waabsir fasawfa yubsiroona
u: Aur dekhte raho, anqareeb yeh khud dekh lenge

t: Subhana rabbika rabbi alAAizzati AAamma yasifoona
u: Paak hai tera Rubb, izzat ka maalik, un tamaam baaton se jo yeh log bana rahey hain

t: Wasalamun AAala almursaleena
u: Aur salaam hai mursalin (messengers) par

t: Waalhamdu lillahi rabbi alAAalameena
u: Aur saari taarif Allah Rabbul Aalameen hi ke liye hai

t: Sad waalqurani thee alththikri
u: Saad, kasam hai naseehat bharey Quran ki

t: Bali allatheena kafaroo fee AAizzatin washiqaqin
u: Balke yahi log, jinhon ne maanney se inkar kiya hai, sakht takabbur aur zid mein mubtila hain

t: Kam ahlakna min qablihim min qarnin fanadaw walata heena manasin
u: Insey pehle hum aisi kitni hi qaumon ko halaak kar chuke hain (aur jab unki shamat aayi hai) to woh cheekh utthey hain, magar woh waqt bachne ka nahin hota

t: WaAAajiboo an jaahum munthirun minhum waqala alkafiroona hatha sahirun kaththabun
u: In logon ko is baat par bada taajub hua ke ek darane wala khud inhi mein se aa gaya, munkireen kehne lagey ke “yeh saahir(sorcerer) hai, sakht jhoota hai

t: AjaAAala alalihata ilahan wahidan inna hatha lashayon AAujabun
u: Kya isney saarey khudaon ki jagah bas ek hi khuda bana dala? Yeh to badi ajeeb baat hai”

t: Waintalaqa almalao minhum ani imshoo waisbiroo AAala alihatikum inna hatha lashayon yuradu
u: Aur sardaran e qaum yeh kehte huey nikal gaye ke “ chalo aur dat-tey raho apne maboodon ki ibadat par. Yeh baat to kisi aur hi garaz se kahi ja rahi hai

t: Ma samiAAna bihatha fee almillati alakhirati in hatha illa ikhtilaqun
u: Yeh baat humne zamana e qareeb ki millat mein kisi se nahin suni. Yeh kuch nahin hai magar ek man-ghadat baat

t: Aonzila AAalayhi alththikru min baynina bal hum fee shakkin min thikree bal lamma yathooqoo AAathabi
u: Kya hamarey darmiyan bas yahi ek shaks reh gaya tha jispar Allah ka zikr nazil kardiya gaya?”Asal baat yeh hai ke yeh mere “Zikr” par shakk kar rahey hain , aur yeh saari baatein isliye kar rahey hain ke inhon ne mere azaab ka maza chakkha nahin hai

t: Am AAindahum khazainu rahmati rabbika alAAazeezi alwahhabi
u: Kya tere daata (great Bestower) aur gaalib parwardigar ki rehmat ke khazane inke kabze mein hain

t: Am lahum mulku alssamawati waalardi wama baynahuma falyartaqoo fee alasbabi
u: Kya yeh aasmaan o zameen aur inke darmiyan ki cheezon ke maalik hain? Accha to yeh aalam e asbaab ki bulandiyon par chadh kar dekhein

t: Jundun ma hunalika mahzoomun mina alahzabi
u: Yeh to jatthon (armies) mein se ek choota sa jattha (army) hai jo isi jagah shikhast(suffer defeat) khane wala hai

t: Kaththabat qablahum qawmu noohin waAAadun wafirAAawnu thoo alawtadi
u: Insey pehle Nooh ki qaum, aur Aad, aur mekhon (tent-pegs/stakes) wala Firoun

t: Wathamoodu waqawmu lootin waashabu alaykati olaika alahzabu
u: Aur Samood, aur qaum e Lut, aur aika waley jhutla chuke hain. Jatthay woh thay

t: In kullun illa kaththaba alrrusula fahaqqa AAiqabi
u: Unmein se har ek ne Rasoolon ko jhutlaya aur meri uqubat ka faisla (decree of chastisement )uspar chaspan ho kar raha

t: Wama yanthuru haolai illa sayhatan wahidatan ma laha min fawaqin
u: Yeh log bhi bas ek dhamake ke muntazir hain jiske baad koi dusra dhamaka na hoga

t: Waqaloo rabbana AAajjil lana qittana qabla yawmi alhisabi
u: Aur yeh kehte hain ke aey hamare Rubb, yaum ul hisaab(hisab ke din) se pehle hi hamara hissa humein jaldi se dey dey

t: Isbir AAala ma yaqooloona waothkur AAabdana dawooda tha alaydi innahu awwabun
u: (Aey Nabi), sabr karo un baaton par jo yeh log banate hain, aur inke saamne hamare banday Dawood ka qissa bayan karo jo badi quwaton ka maalik tha. Har maamle mein Allah ki taraf rujoo karne wala tha

t: Inna sakhkharna aljibala maAAahu yusabbihna bialAAashiyyi waalishraqi
u: Humne pahadon ko uske saath musakkhar kar rakkha tha ke subah o shaam woh uske saath tasbeeh karte thay

t: Waalttayra mahshooratan kullun lahu awwabun
u: Parindey simat aate aur sabke sab uski tasbeeh ki taraf mutawajjeh ho jatey thay

t: Washadadna mulkahu waataynahu alhikmata wafasla alkhitabi
u: Humne uski sultanat mazboot kardi thi, usko hikmat ata ki thi aur faislay-kun baat kehne ki salahiyat bakshi thi

t: Wahal ataka nabao alkhasmi ith tasawwaroo almihraba
u: Phir tumhein kuch khabar pahunchi hai un muqaddame walon ki jo deewaar chadh kar uske baala khaane(private chambers) mein ghus aaye thay

t: Ith dakhaloo AAala dawooda fafaziAAa minhum qaloo la takhaf khasmani bagha baAAduna AAala baAAdin faohkum baynana bialhaqqi wala tushtit waihdina ila sawai alssirati
u: Jab woh Dawood ke paas pahunche to woh unhein dekh kar ghabra gaya, unhon ne kaha “dariye nahin, hum do fareeq muqaddama hain jin mein se ek ne dusre par zyadati ki hai. Aap hamare darmiyan theek theek haqq ke saath faisla kardijiye, be-insafi na kijiye aur humein raah e raast bataiye

t: Inna hatha akhee lahu tisAAun watisAAoona naAAjatan waliya naAAjatun wahidatun faqala akfilneeha waAAazzanee fee alkhitabi
u: Yeh meri bhai hai ,iske paas ninanve (ninety nine) dumbiyan(ewes) hai aur mere paas sirf ek hi dumbi (ewe) hai , isne mujhse kaha ke yeh ek dumbi bhi mere hawale karde aur isne guftagu mein mujhe daba liya”

t: Qala laqad thalamaka bisuali naAAjatika ila niAAajihi wainna katheeran mina alkhulatai layabghee baAAduhum AAala baAAdin illa allatheena amanoo waAAamiloo alssalihati waqaleelun ma hum wathanna dawoodu annama fatannahu faistaghfara rabbahu wakharra rakiAAan waanaba
u: Dawood ne jawab diya: “is shaks ne apni dumbiyon (ewes) ke saath teri dumbi mila lene ka mutalaba karke yaqeenan tujhpar zulm kiya, aur waqiya yeh hai ke mil-jhul kar saath rehne waley log aksar ek dusre par zyadatiyan karte rehte hain, bas wahi log is se bachey huey hain jo iman rakhte hain aur amal e saleh karte hain, aur aisey log kam hi hain.” (Yeh baat kehte kehte) Dawood samajh gaya ke yeh to humne dar-asal iski aazmaish ki hai, chunanche usne apne Rubb se maafi maangi aur sajde mein gir gaya aur rujoo karliya

t: Faghafarna lahu thalika wainna lahu AAindana lazulfa wahusna maabin
u: Tab humne iska woh kasoor maaf kiya aur yaqeenan hamare haan uske liye taqarrub ka muqaam aur behtar anjaam hai

t: Ya dawoodu inna jaAAalnaka khaleefatan fee alardi faohkum bayna alnnasi bialhaqqi wala tattabiAAi alhawa fayudillaka AAan sabeeli Allahi inna allatheena yadilloona AAan sabeeli Allahi lahum AAathabun shadeedun bima nasoo yawma alhisabi
u: (Humne ussey kaha) “Aey dawood, humne tujhey zameen mein khalifa banaya hai, lihaza tu logon ke darmiyan haqq ke saath hukumat kar, aur khwaish e nafs ki pairwi na kar ke woh tujhey Allah ki raah se bhatka degi. Jo log Allah ki raah se bhatakte hain yaqeenan unke liye sakht saza hai ke woh yaum ul hisaab ko bhool gaye.”

t: Wama khalaqna alssamaa waalarda wama baynahuma batilan thalika thannu allatheena kafaroo fawaylun lillatheena kafaroo mina alnnari
u: Humne is aasmaan aur zameen ko, aur is duniya ko jo inke darmiyan hai , fizool paida nahin kardiya hai, yeh to un logon ka gumaan hai jinhon ne kufr kiya hai aur aisey kaafiron ke liye barbadi hai jahannum ki aag se

t: Am najAAalu allatheena amanoo waAAamiloo alssalihati kaalmufsideena fee alardi am najAAalu almuttaqeena kaalfujjari
u: Kya hum un logon ko jo iman laatey hain aur neik aamaal karte hain aur unko jo zameen mein fasad karne waley hain yaksan kardein? Kya muttaqiyon ko hum faajiron(wicked) jaisa kardein

t: Kitabun anzalnahu ilayka mubarakun liyaddabbaroo ayatihi waliyatathakkara oloo alalbabi
u: Yeh ek badi barakat wali kitaab hai jo (aey Muhammad) humne tumhari taraf nazil ki hai taa-ke yeh log iski aayat par gaur karein aur aqal o fikr rakhne wale issey sabaq lein

t: Wawahabna lidawooda sulaymana niAAma alAAabdu innahu awwabun
u: Aur Dawood ko humne Sulaiman (jaisa beta) ata kiya, behtareen banda, kasrat se apne Rubb ki taraf rujoo karne wala

t: Ith AAurida AAalayhi bialAAashiyyi alssafinatu aljiyadu
u: Kaabil e zikr hai woh mauqa jab shaam ke waqt us ke saamne khoob sidhey (well-trained) huey tez-rau(running) ghoday (horses) pesh kiye gaye

t: Faqala innee ahbabtu hubba alkhayri AAan thikri rabbee hatta tawarat bialhijabi
u: To usne kaha “maine is maal ki muhabbat apne Rubb ki yaad ki wajah se ikhtiyar ki hai” yahan tak ke jab woh ghoday (horses) nigaah se ojhal ho gaye

t: Ruddooha AAalayya fatafiqa mashan bialssooqi waalaAAnaqi
u: To (usne hukum diya ke) inhein mere paas wapas laao, phir laga unki pindliyon (legs) aur gardano (necks) par haath pherne

t: Walaqad fatanna sulaymana waalqayna AAala kursiyyihi jasadan thumma anaba
u: Aur (dekho ke) Sulaiman ko bhi humne aazmaish mein daala aur uski kursi par ek jasad (mere body/body without life) laa kar daal diya phir usne rujoo kiya

t: Qala rabbi ighfir lee wahab lee mulkan la yanbaghee liahadin min baAAdee innaka anta alwahhabu
u: Aur kaha ke “aey mere Rubb , mujhey maaf karde aur mujhey woh baadshahi de jo mere baad kisi ke liye sazawar na ho, beshak tu hi asal daata hai”

t: Fasakhkharna lahu alrreeha tajree biamrihi rukhaan haythu asaba
u: Tab humne uske liye hawa ko musakkhar kardiya jo uske hukum se narmi ke saath chalti thi jidhar woh chahta tha

t: Waalshshayateena kulla bannain waghawwasin
u: Aur shayateen ko musakkhar kardiya, har tarah ke meimaar(builders) aur gotakhor (divers)

t: Waakhareena muqarraneena fee alasfadi
u: Aur dusre jo paband e salasil thay(bound with chains)

t: Hatha AAataona faomnun aw amsik bighayri hisabin
u: (humne ussey kaha) “ yeh hamari bakshish hai, tujhey ikhtiyar hai jisey chahe de aur jissey chahe rok le, koi hisaab nahin”

t: Wainna lahu AAindana lazulfa wahusna maabin
u: Yaqeenan uske liye hamare haan taqarrub ka muqaam aur behtar anjaam hai

t: Waothkur AAabdana ayyooba ith nada rabbahu annee massaniya alshshaytanu binusbin waAAathabin
u: Aur hamare banday Ayub ka zikar karo, jab usne apne Rubb ko pukara ke shaytaan ne mujhey sakht takleef aur azaab mein daal diya hai

t: Orkud birijlika hatha mughtasalun baridun washarabun
u: (Humne usey hukum diya) apna paaon (leg) zameen par maar, yeh hai thanda pani nahane ke liya aur peene ke liye

t: Wawahabna lahu ahlahu wamithlahum maAAahum rahmatan minna wathikra liolee alalbabi
u: Humne usey uske ahal o ayaal wapas diye aur unke saath utnay hi aur, apni taraf se rehmat ke taur par, aur aqal o fikar rakhne walon ke liye dars ke taur par

t: Wakhuth biyadika dighthan faidrib bihi wala tahnath inna wajadnahu sabiran niAAma alAAabdu innahu awwabun
u: (Aur humne issey kaha) tinkon ka ek mutta lay (bundle of rushes) aur ussey maar de, apni kasam na todh, humne usey saabir paya, behtareen banda, apne Rubb ki taraf bahut rujoo karne wala

t: Waothkur AAibadana ibraheema waishaqa wayaAAqooba olee alaydee waalabsari
u: Aur hamare bandon , Ibrahim aur Ishaq aur Yaqub ka zikar karo badi quwwat e amail rakhne wale aur deedhawar (strength and vision)log thay

t: Inna akhlasnahum bikhalisatin thikra alddari
u: Humne unko ek khaalis siffat ki bina par barguzida kiya tha, aur woh daar-e-aakhirat ki yaad thi

t: Wainnahum AAindana lamina almustafayna alakhyari
u: Yaqeenan hamare haan unka shumaar chunay huey neik ashkhaas(excellent ones) mein hai

t: Waothkur ismaAAeela wailyasaAAa watha alkifli wakullun mina alakhyari
u: Aur Ismail aur Al-yasa(Elisha) aur Zulkifl ka zikr karo, yeh sab neik logon mein se thay

t: Hatha thikrun wainna lilmuttaqeena lahusna maabin
u: Yeh ek zikar tha. (Ab suno ke) muttaqi logon ke liye yaqeenan behtareen thikana hai

t: Jannati AAadnin mufattahatan lahumu alabwabu
u: Hamesha rehne wali jannatein jinke darwaze unke liye khuley hongey

t: Muttakieena feeha yadAAoona feeha bifakihatin katheeratin washarabin
u: Unmein woh takiye lagaye baithay hongey, khoob khoob fawake aur mashroobat (abundant fruit and drinks) talab kar rahey hongey

t: WaAAindahum qasiratu alttarfi atrabun
u: Aur unke paas sharmili humsin biwiyan hongi

t: Hatha ma tooAAadoona liyawmi alhisabi
u: Yeh woh chezein hain jinhein hisaab ke din ata karne ka tumse wada kiya ja raha hai

t: Inna hatha larizquna ma lahu min nafadin
u: Yeh hamara rizq hai jo kabhi khatam honaywala nahin

t: Hatha wainna lilttagheena lasharra maabin
u: Yeh to hai muttaqiyon ka anjaam aur sarkashon ke liye badhtareen (evil) thikana hai

t: Jahannama yaslawnaha fabisa almihadu
u: Jahannum jismein woh jhulse jayenge. Bahut hi buri qayamgaah

t: Hatha falyathooqoohu hameemun waghassaqun
u: Yeh hai unke liye, pas woh maza chakhein khautley (boiling) huey pani aur peep lahu (pus)

t: Waakharu min shaklihi azwajun
u: Aur isi qisam ki dusri talkhiyon ka

t: Hatha fawjun muqtahimun maAAakum la marhaban bihim innahum saloo alnnari
u: (woh jahannum ki taraf apne pairawon ko aatey dekh kar aapas mein kahenge) “Yeh ek lashkar tumhare paas ghusa chala aa raha hai, koi khushamadeed (welcome) inke liye nahin hai, yeh aag mein jhulasne waley hain”

t: Qaloo bal antum la marhaban bikum antum qaddamtumoohu lana fabisa alqararu
u: Woh unko jawab denge “ nahin balke tum hi jhulse ja rahe ho, koi khair maqdam tumhare liye nahin. Tumhi to yeh anjaam hamare aagey laye ho. Kaisi buri hai yeh jaaye qaraar”

t: Qaloo rabbana man qaddama lana hatha fazidhu AAathaban diAAfan fee alnnari
u: Phir woh kahenge “Aey hamare Rubb, jisne humein is anjaam ko pahunchane ka bandobast kiya usko dozakh ka dohra azaab de”

t: Waqaloo ma lana la nara rijalan kunna naAAudduhum mina alashrari
u: Aur woh aapas mein kahenge “kya baat hai, hum un logon ko kahin nahin dekhte jinehin hum duniya mein bura samajte thay

t: Attakhathnahum sikhriyyan am zaghat AAanhumu alabsaru
u: Hunme yunhi unka mazaaq bana liya tha, ya woh kahin nazaron se ojhal hain?”

t: Inna thalika lahaqqun takhasumu ahli alnnari
u: Beshak yeh baat sacchi hai, ehle dozakh mein yahi kuch jhagde honay waley hain

t: Qul innama ana munthirun wama min ilahin illa Allahu alwahidu alqahharu
u: (Aey Nabi) insey kaho, “ main to bas khabardar kardene wala hoon. Koi haqeeqi mabood nahin magar Allah, jo yakta hai, sab par gaalib

t: Rabbu alssamawati waalardi wama baynahuma alAAazeezu alghaffaru
u: Aasmaano aur zameen ka maalik aur un saari cheezon ka maalik jo inke darmiyan hain, zabardast aur darguzar karne wala”

t: Qul huwa nabaon AAatheemun
u: Insey kaho “ yeh ek badi khabar hai

t: Antum AAanhu muAAridoona
u: Jisko sunkar tum mooh pherte ho”

t: Ma kana liya min AAilmin bialmalai alaAAla ith yakhtasimoona
u: (Insey kaho) “Mujhey us waqt ki koi khabar na thi jab mala-e-aala (high council) mein jhagda ho raha tha

t: In yooha ilayya illa annama ana natheerun mubeenun
u: Mujhko to wahee (revelation/inspiration) ke zariye se yeh baatein sirf isliye batayi jaati hain ke main khula khula khabardar karne wala hoon”

t: Ith qala rabbuka lilmalaikati innee khaliqun basharan min teenin
u: Jab tere Rubb ne farishton se kaha “main mitti se ek bashar banane wala hoon

t: Faitha sawwaytuhu wanafakhtu feehi min roohee faqaAAoo lahu sajideena
u: Phir jab main usey puri tarah bana doon aur usmein apni rooh phoonk doon to tum uske aagey sajde mein gir jao”

t: Fasajada almalaikatu kulluhum ajmaAAoona
u: Is hukum ke mutaabiq farishtey sab ke sab sajde mein gir gaye

t: Illa ibleesa istakbara wakana mina alkafireena
u: Magar Iblis ne apni badayi ka ghamand kiya aur woh kaafiron mein se ho gaya

t: Qala ya ibleesu ma manaAAaka an tasjuda lima khalaqtu biyadayya astakbarta am kunta mina alAAaleena
u: Rubb ne farmaya “Aey Iblis, tujhey kya cheez usko sajda karne se maanay hui jisey maine apne dono haathon se banaya hai? Tu bada ban raha hai ya tu hai hi kuch unchey darje ki hastiyon mein se?”

t: Qala ana khayrun minhu khalaqtanee min narin wakhalaqtahu min teenin
u: Usne jawab diya “main ussey behtar hoon , aapne mujhko aag se paida kiya hai aur isko mitti se”

t: Qala faokhruj minha fainnaka rajeemun
u: Farmaya “ accha to yahan se nikal ja , tu mardood hai

t: Wainna AAalayka laAAnatee ila yawmi alddeeni
u: Aur tere upar yaum ul jaza tak meri laanat hai”

t: Qala rabbi faanthirnee ila yawmi yubAAathoona
u: Woh bola “ aey mere Rubb , yeh baat hai to phir mujhey us waqt tak ke liye mohlat dey dey jab yeh log dobara uthaye jayenge”

t: Qala fainnaka mina almunthareena
u: Farmaya, “accha tujhey us roz tak ki mohlat hai

t: Ila yawmi alwaqti almaAAloomi
u: Jiska waqt mujhey maloom hai”

t: Qala fabiAAizzatika laoghwiyannahum ajmaAAeena
u: Usne kaha “ teri izzat ki kasam, main in sab logon ko behka kar rahunga

t: Illa AAibadaka minhumu almukhlaseena
u: Bajuz tere un bandon ke jinhein tu nay khaalis karliya hai”

t: Qala faalhaqqu waalhaqqa aqoolu
u: Farmaya “to haqq yeh hai, aur main haqq hi kaha karta hoon

t: Laamlaanna jahannama minka wamimman tabiAAaka minhum ajmaAAeena
u: Ke main jahannum ko tujhse aur un sab logon se bhar dunga jo in Insano mein se teri pairwi karenge”

t: Qul ma asalukum AAalayhi min ajrin wama ana mina almutakallifeena
u: (Aey Nabi) insey kehdo ke main is tableeg par tumse koi ajar nahin maangta, aur na main banawati logon mein se hoon

t: In huwa illa thikrun lilAAalameena
u: Yeh to ek naseehat hai tamam jahaan walon ke liye

t: WalataAAlamunna nabaahu baAAda heenin
u: Aur thodi muddat hi guzaregi ke tumhein iska haal khud maaloom ho jayega

t: Tanzeelu alkitabi mina Allahi alAAazeezi alhakeemi
u: Is kitaab ka nuzul Allah zabardast aur dana (hikmat wala/full of Wisdom) ki taraf se hai

t: Inna anzalna ilayka alkitaba bialhaqqi faoAAbudi Allaha mukhlisan lahu alddeena
u: (Aey Muhammad) yeh kitab humne tumhari taraf barhaqq nazil ki hai, lihaza tum Allah hi ki bandagi karo deen ko usi ke liye khalis karte huey

t: Ala lillahi alddeenu alkhalisu waallatheena ittakhathoo min doonihi awliyaa ma naAAbuduhum illa liyuqarriboona ila Allahi zulfa inna Allaha yahkumu baynahum fee ma hum feehi yakhtalifoona inna Allaha la yahdee man huwa kathibun kaffarun
u: Khabardar, deen e khalis Allah ka haqq hai.Rahey woh log jinhon ne uske siwa dusre sarparst bana rakkhe hain (aur apne is fail ki taujeeh yeh karte hain ke) hum to unki ibadat sirf is liye karte hain ke woh Allah tak hamari rasayi karadein (bring us nearer to Allah).Allah yaqeenan unke darmiyan un tamaam baaton ka faisla kardega jin mein woh ikhtilaf kar rahey hain. Allah kisi aisey shaks ko hidayat nahin deta jo jhoota aur munkir e haqq ho

t: Law arada Allahu an yattakhitha waladan laistafa mimma yakhluqu ma yashao subhanahu huwa Allahu alwahidu alqahharu
u: Agar Allah kisi ko beta banana chahta to apni makhlooq mein se jisko chahta barguzida kar leta, Paak hai woh issey (ke koi uska beta ho), woh Allah hai akela aur sab par gaalib

t: Khalaqa alssamawati waalarda bialhaqqi yukawwiru allayla AAala alnnahari wayukawwiru alnnahara AAala allayli wasakhkhara alshshamsa waalqamara kullun yajree liajalin musamman ala huwa alAAazeezu alghaffaru
u: Usne aasmano aur zameen ko barhaqq paida kiya hai. Wahi din par raat aur raat par din ko lapeit-ta hai.Usi ne Suraj aur Chand ko is tarah musakkhar kar rakkha hai ke har ek ek waqt e muqarrar tak chale ja raha hai. Jaan rakkho, woh zabardast hai aur darguzar karne wala hai

t: Khalaqakum min nafsin wahidatin thumma jaAAala minha zawjaha waanzala lakum mina alanAAami thamaniyata azwajin yakhluqukum fee butooni ommahatikum khalqan min baAAdi khalqin fee thulumatin thalathin thalikumu Allahu rabbukum lahu almulku la ilaha illa huwa faanna tusrafoona
u: Usi ne tumko ek jaan se paida kiya, phir wahi hai jisne us jaan se iska joda banaya aur usi ne tumhare liye maweshiyon mein se aath (eight) nar o maada paida kiye. Woh tumhari Maaon (mothers) ke paithon mein teen teen tareekh (andherey) paradon ke andar tumhein ek ke baad ek shakal deta chala jaata hai. Yahi Allah (jiske yeh kaam hain) tumhara Rubb hai, baadshahi usi ki hai, koi mabood uske siwa nahin hai, phir tum kidhar se phiraye jaa rahe ho

t: In takfuroo fainna Allaha ghaniyyun AAankum wala yarda liAAibadihi alkufra wain tashkuroo yardahu lakum wala taziru waziratun wizra okhra thumma ila rabbikum marjiAAukum fayunabbiokum bima kuntum taAAmaloona innahu AAaleemun bithati alssudoori
u: Agar tum kufr karo to Allah tumse be niyaz hai, lekin woh apne bandon ke liye kufr ko pasand nahin karta. Aur agar tum shukar karo to usey woh tumhare liye pasand karta hai. Koi bojh uthane wala kisi dusre ka bojh na uthayega.Aakhir e kaar tum sab ko apne Rubb ki taraf palatna hai, phir woh tumhein bata dega ke tum kya karte rahe ho, woh to dilon ka haal tak jaanta hai

t: Waitha massa alinsana durrun daAAa rabbahu muneeban ilayhi thumma itha khawwalahu niAAmatan minhu nasiya ma kana yadAAoo ilayhi min qablu wajaAAala lillahi andadan liyudilla AAan sabeelihi qul tamattaAA bikufrika qaleelan innaka min ashabi alnnari
u: Insaan par jab koi aafat aati hai to woh apne Rubb ki taraf rujoo (return) karke usey pukarta hai, phir jab uska Rubb usey apni niyamat se nawaz deta hai to woh us musibat ko bhool jaata hai jispar woh pehle pukar raha tha aur dusron ko Allah ka humsar thehrata hai taa-ke uski raah se gumraah karey. (Aey Nabi) ussey kaho ke thode din apne kufr se lutf utha le, yaqeenan tu dozakh mein jaane wala hai

t: Amman huwa qanitun anaa allayli sajidan waqaiman yahtharu alakhirata wayarjoo rahmata rabbihi qul hal yastawee allatheena yaAAlamoona waallatheena la yaAAlamoona innama yatathakkaru oloo alalbabi
u: (kya is shaks ki rawish behtar hai ya us shaks ki) jo mutii-e-farmaan hai, raat ki ghadiyon mein khada rehta hai aur sajdey karta hai, aakhirat se darta aur apne Rubb ki rehmat se umeed lagata hai? In se pucho, kya jaanne waley aur na jaanne waley dono kabhi yaksan ho sakte hain? Naseehat to aqal rakhne waley hi qabool karte hain

t: Qul ya AAibadi allatheena amanoo ittaqoo rabbakum lillatheena ahsanoo fee hathihi alddunya hasanatun waardu Allahi wasiAAatun innama yuwaffa alssabiroona ajrahum bighayri hisabin
u: (Aey Nabi) kaho ke aey mere bandon jo imaan laye ho, apne Rubb se daro. Jin logon ne is duniya mein neik rawayya ikhtiyar kiya hai unke liye bhalayi hai. Aur khuda ki zameen waseeh hai, sabr karne walon ko to unka ajar be-hisaab diya jayega

t: Qul innee omirtu an aAAbuda Allaha mukhlisan lahu alddeena
u: (Aey Nabi) insey kaho, mujhey hukum diya gaya hai ke deen ko Allah ke liye khaalis karke uski bandagi karoon

t: Waomirtu lian akoona awwala almuslimeena
