t: Fain aAAradoo fama arsalnaka AAalayhim hafeethan in AAalayka illa albalaghu wainna itha athaqna alinsana minna rahmatan fariha biha wain tusibhum sayyiatun bima qaddamat aydeehim fainna alinsana kafoorun
u: Ab agar yeh log mooh moadte hain to aey Nabi humne tumko unpar nigehbaan bana kar to nahin bheja hai. Tumpar to sirf baat pahuncha dene ki zimmedari hai.Insaan ka haal yeh hai ke jab hum usey apni rehmat ka maza chakhate hain to uspar phool jata hai. Aur agar uske apne haathon ka kiya dhara kisi musibat ki shakal mein uspar ulat padta hai to sakht na shukra ban jata hai

t: Lillahi mulku alssamawati waalardi yakhluqu ma yashao yahabu liman yashao inathan wayahabu liman yashao alththukoora
u: Allah zameen aur aasmaano ki baadshahi ka maalik hai. Jo kuch chahta hai paida karta hai. Jisey chahta hai ladkiyan deta hai, jisey chahta hai ladke deta hai

t: Aw yuzawwijuhum thukranan wainathan wayajAAalu man yashao AAaqeeman innahu AAaleemun qadeerun
u: Jisey chahta hai ladke aur ladkiyan mila-jula kar deta hai aur jisey chahta hai baanjh (barren) kardeta hai. Woh sab kuch jaanta hai aur har cheez par qadir hai

t: Wama kana libasharin an yukallimahu Allahu illa wahyan aw min warai hijabin aw yursila rasoolan fayoohiya biithnihi ma yashao innahu AAaliyyun hakeemun
u: Kisi bashar (Insaan) ka yeh muqaam nahin hai ke Allah us se ru-baru baat karey, uski baat ya to wahee (isharey/ revelation) ke taur par hoti hai, ya purday ke piche se, ya phir woh koi paigaambar (farishta) bhejta hai aur woh uske hukum se jo kuch woh chahta hai, wahi karta hai. Woh bartar aur Hakeem(wise) hai

t: Wakathalika awhayna ilayka roohan min amrina ma kunta tadree ma alkitabu wala aleemanu walakin jaAAalnahu nooran nahdee bihi man nashao min AAibadina wainnaka latahdee ila siratin mustaqeemin
u: Aur isi tarah (aey Muhammad s.a.s) humne apne hukum se ek rooh tumhari tarf wahee ki hai. Tumhein kuch pata na tha ke kitaab kya hoti hai aur Imaan kya hota hai, Magar us rooh ko humne ek roshni bana diya jissey hum raah dikhate hain apne bandon mein se jisey chahte hain. Yaqeenan tum seedhey raaste ki taraf rehnumayi kar rahey ho

t: Sirati Allahi allathee lahu ma fee alssamawati wama fee alardi ala ila Allahi taseeru alomooru
u: Us khuda ke raaste ki taraf jo zameen aur aasmaano ki har cheez ka maalik hai. khabardar raho, saarey muaamlaat Allah hi ki taraf rujoo karte hain

t: Hameem
u: Haa Meem

t: Waalkitabi almubeeni
u: Kasam hai is wazeh kitaab ki

t: Inna jaAAalnahu quranan AAarabiyyan laAAallakum taAAqiloona
u: Ke humne isey arabi zubaan ka Quran banaya hai taa-ke tumlog isey samjho

t: Wainnahu fee ommi alkitabi ladayna laAAaliyyun hakeemun
u: Aur dar haqeeqat yeh ummul kitaab mein sabt(transcribed) hai, hamare haan badi buland maratba aur hikmat se labrez kitaab

t: Afanadribu AAankumu alththikra safhan an kuntum qawman musrifeena
u: Ab kya hum tumse bezaar hokar yeh dars-e-naseehat tumhare yahan bhejna chodh dein sirf isliye tum hadd se guzare huey log ho

t: Wakam arsalna min nabiyyin fee alawwaleena
u: Pehle guzri hui qaumon mein bhi baarha (baar baar) humne Nabi bheje hain

t: Wama yateehim min nabiyyin illa kanoo bihi yastahzioona
u: Kabhi aisa nahin hua ke koi Nabi unke haan (yahan) aaya ho aur unhon ne uska mazak na udaya ho

t: Faahlakna ashadda minhum batshan wamada mathalu alawwaleena
u: Phir jo log insey badarja zyada taaqatwar thay unhein humne halak kardiya. Pichli qaumon ki misalien guzar chuki hain

t: Walain saaltahum man khalaqa alssamawati waalarda layaqoolunna khalaqahunna alAAazeezu alAAaleemu
u: Agar tum in logon se pucho ke zameen aur aasmaano ko kisne paida kiya hai to yeh khud kahenge ke inhein usi zabardast ilmi hasti ne paida kiya hai

t: Allathee jaAAala lakumu alarda mahdan wajaAAala lakum feeha subulan laAAallakum tahtadoona
u: Wahi na jisne tumhare liye is zameen ko gehwara (cradle) banaya aur ismein tumhari khatir raaste bana diye taa-ke tum apni manzil e maqsood ki raah paa sako

t: Waallathee nazzala mina alssamai maan biqadarin faansharna bihi baldatan maytan kathalika tukhrajoona
u: Jisne ek khaas miqdar mein aasman se paani utara aur uske zariye se murda (dead) zameen ko jila uthaya. Isi tarah ek roz tum zameen se baramad kiye jaogey

t: Waallathee khalaqa alazwaja kullaha wajaAAala lakum mina alfulki waalanAAami ma tarkaboona
u: Wahi jisne yeh tamaam jodey (pairs) paida kiye, aur jisne tumhare liye kashtiyon (ships) aur jaanwaron ko sawari banaya taa-ke tum unki pusht (backs) par chadho

t: Litastawoo AAala thuhoorihi thumma tathkuroo niAAmata rabbikum itha istawaytum AAalayhi wataqooloo subhana allathee sakhkhara lana hatha wama kunna lahu muqrineena
u: Aur jab unpar baitho (sit) to apne Rubb ka ehsan yaad karo aur kaho ke “paak hai woh jisne hamare liye in cheezon ko musakkhar(bas mein) kardiya warna hum unhein qaabu mein laane ki taaqat na rakhte thay

t: Wainna ila rabbina lamunqaliboona
u: Aur ek roz humein apne Rubb ki taraf palatna hai”

t: WajaAAaloo lahu min AAibadihi juzan inna alinsana lakafoorun mubeenun
u: (Yeh sab kuch jaante aur maante huey bhi) in logon ne uske bandon (servants) mein se baaz ko uska juz (part) bana daala, haqeeqat yeh hai ke Insaan khula ehsan faramosh hai

t: Ami ittakhatha mimma yakhluqu banatin waasfakum bialbaneena
u: Kya Allah ne apni makhlooq mein se apne liye betiyan intikhab (chose) ki aur tumhein beiton (sons) se nawaza

t: Waitha bushshira ahaduhum bima daraba lilrrahmani mathalan thalla wajhuhu muswaddan wahuwa katheemun
u: Aur haal yeh hai ke jis aulad ko yeh log us khuda e Rehman ki taraf mansoob karte hain uski wiladat ka musda (tidings/news/khabar) jab khud in mein se kisi ko diya jata hai to uske mooh par siyahi(darkens) chaa jaati hai aur woh gham se bhar jaata hai

t: Awaman yunashshao fee alhilyati wahuwa fee alkhisami ghayru mubeenin
u: Kya Allah ke hisse mein woh aulad aayi jo zewaron (ornaments) mein paali jaati hai aur behas o hujjat mein apna mudda puri tarah wazeh bhi nahin kar sakti

t: WajaAAaloo almalaikata allatheena hum AAibadu alrrahmani inathan ashahidoo khalqahum satuktabu shahadatuhum wayusaloona
u: Unhon ne farishton ko, jo khuda e Rehman ke khaas banday hain, auratein karar de liya. Kya unke jism ki saakht inhon ne dekhi hai? Inki gawahi likh li jayegi aur inhein iske jawab-dahi karni hogi

t: Waqaloo law shaa alrrahmanu ma AAabadnahum ma lahum bithalika min AAilmin in hum illa yakhrusoona
u: Yeh kehte hain “agar khuda-e-Rehman chahta (ke hum unki ibadat na karein) to hum kabhi unko na poojte” yeh is maamle ki haqeeqat ko qatai nahin jaante, mehaz teer tukkay ladate hain (are simply conjecturing /guess work)

t: Am ataynahum kitaban min qablihi fahum bihi mustamsikoona
u: Kya humne issey pehle koi kitaab inko di thi jiski sanad [apne is malaika (farihste) parasti ke liye] yeh apne paas rakhte hon

t: Bal qaloo inna wajadna abaana AAala ommatin wainna AAala atharihim muhtadoona
u: Nahin, balke yeh kehte hain ke humne apne baap dada ko ek tarike par paya hai aur hum unhi ke nakshe qadam par chal rahe hain

t: Wakathalika ma arsalna min qablika fee qaryatin min natheerin illa qala mutrafooha inna wajadna abaana AAala ommatin wainna AAala atharihim muqtadoona
u: Isi tarah tumse pehle jis basti mein bhi humne koi nazeer(darane wala) bheja, uske khaate peete logon ne yahi kaha ke humne apne baap dada ko ek tareeqe par paya hai aur hum unhi ke naqshe qadam ki pairwi kar rahe hain

t: Qala awalaw jitukum biahda mimma wajadtum AAalayhi abaakum qaloo inna bima orsiltum bihi kafiroona
u: Har Nabi ne unsey poocha, kya tum usi dagar par cahle jaogey khwah mein us raaste se zyada saheeh raasta tumhein bataun jispar tumne apne baap dada ko paya? Unhon ne saare Rasoolon ko yahi jawab diya ke jis deen ki taraf bulane ke liye tum bheje gaye ho hum uske kaafir hain

t: Faintaqamna minhum faonthur kayfa kana AAaqibatu almukaththibeena
u: Aakhir e kaar humne unki khabar le daali aur dekh lo ke jhutlane walon ka kya anjaam hua

t: Waith qala ibraheemu liabeehi waqawmihi innanee baraon mimma taAAbudoona
u: Yaad karo woh waqt jab Ibrahim ne apne baap aur apni qaum se kaha tha ke “tum jinki bandagi karte ho mera unsey koi taaq nahin

t: Illa allathee fataranee fainnahu sayahdeeni
u: Mera talluq sirf ussey hai jisne mujhe paida kiya, wahi meri rehnumayi karega”

t: WajaAAalaha kalimatan baqiyatan fee AAaqibihi laAAallahum yarjiAAoona
u: Aur Ibrahim yahi kalima apne peechey apni aulad mein chodh gaya taa-ke woh iski taraf ruju karein

t: Bal mattaAAtu haolai waabaahum hatta jaahumu alhaqqu warasoolun mubeenun
u: (Is ke bawajood jab yeh log dusron ki bandagi karne lagey to maine inko mita nahin diya) balke main inhein aur inke baap dada ko mata-e-hayat (sustenance) deta raha yahan tak ke inke paas haqq, aur khol khol kar bayan karne wala Rasool aa gaya

t: Walamma jaahumu alhaqqu qaloo hatha sihrun wainna bihi kafiroona
u: Magar jab woh haqq inke paas aaya to inhon ne keh diya yeh to jaadu hai aur hum isko maanne se inkar karte hain

t: Waqaloo lawla nuzzila hatha alquranu AAala rajulin mina alqaryatayni AAatheemun
u: Kehte hain, yeh Quran dono sheharon ke baday aadmiyon mein se kisi par kyoun na nazil kiya gaya

t: Ahum yaqsimoona rahmata rabbika nahnu qasamna baynahum maAAeeshatahum fee alhayati alddunya warafaAAna baAAdahum fawqa baAAdin darajatin liyattakhitha baAAduhum baAAdan sukhriyyan warahmatu rabbika khayrun mimma yajmaAAoona
u: Kya tere Rubb ki rehmat yeh log takseem karte hain? Duniya ki zindagi mein inki guzar basar ke zaraye to humne inke darmiyan takseem kiye hain, Aur in mein se kuch logon ko kuch dusre logon par humne badarja-ha fauqiyat di hai taa-ke yeh ek dusre se khidmat lein aur tere Rubb ki rehmat us daulat se zyada keemati hai jo (inke rahees) samait rahe hain

t: Walawla an yakoona alnnasu ommatan wahidatan lajaAAalna liman yakfuru bialrrahmani libuyootihim suqufan min fiddatin wamaAAarija AAalayha yathharoona
u: Agar yeh andesha na hota ke saare log ek hi tareeqe ke ho jayenge to hum khuda e Rehman se kufr karne walon ke gharon ki chatein (canopy), aur unki seedhiyan (ladders) jinse woh apne baala khaano par chadte hain

t: Walibuyootihim abwaban wasururan AAalayha yattakioona
u: Aur unke darwaze , aur unke takhat jinpar woh takiye (pillows) laga kar baithte hain

t: Wazukhrufan wain kullu thalika lamma mataAAu alhayati alddunya waalakhiratu AAinda rabbika lilmuttaqeena
u: Sab chandi aur soney (gold) ke banwa detay .Yeh to mehaz hayat e duniya ki mataah hain.Aur aakhirat tere Rubb ke haan sirf muttaqeen ke liye hai

t: Waman yaAAshu AAan thikri alrrahmani nuqayyid lahu shaytanan fahuwa lahu qareenun
u: Jo shaks Rehman ke zikar se tagaful (gaflat) barat-ta hai, hum ispar ek shaytan musallat kar detay hain aur woh uska rafiq ban jata hai

t: Wainnahum layasuddoonahum AAani alssabeeli wayahsaboona annahum muhtadoona
u: Yeh shayateen aisay logon ko raah e raast par aane se rokte hain, aur woh apni jagah yeh samajhte hain ke hum theek jaa rahe hain

t: Hatta itha jaana qala ya layta baynee wabaynaka buAAda almashriqayni fabisa alqareenu
u: Aakhir e kaar jab yeh shaks hamare haan pahuchega to apne shaytan se kahega “kaash mere aur tere darmiyan mashriq o magrib ka boadh (doori/ distance) hota, tu to badhtareen saathi nikla”

t: Walan yanfaAAakumu alyawma ith thalamtum annakum fee alAAathabi mushtarikoona
u: Us waqt in logon se kaha jayega ke jab tum zulm kar chuke to aaj yeh baat tumhare liye kuch bhi nafeh nahin hai ke tum aur tumahre shayateen azaab mein mushtarik hain

t: Afaanta tusmiAAu alssumma aw tahdee alAAumya waman kana fee dalalin mubeenin
u: Ab kya aey Nabi tum behron (deaf) ko sunaoge? Ya andhon (blind) aur sareeh gumrahi mein padey huey logon ko raah dihoge

t: Faimma nathhabanna bika fainna minhum muntaqimoona
u: Ab to humein inko saza deni hai khwah tumhein duniya se utha lein

t: Aw nuriyannaka allathee waAAadnahum fainna AAalayhim muqtadiroona
u: Ya tumko aankhon se inka woh anjaam dikha dein jiska humne issey waada kiya hai. Humein inpar poori qudrat haasil hai

t: Faistamsik biallathee oohiya ilayka innaka AAala siratin mustaqeemin
u: Tum bahar-haal us kitaab ko mazbooti se thamay raho jo wahi ke zariye se tumhare paas bheji gayi hai, yaqeenan tum seedhey raaste par ho

t: Wainnahu lathikrun laka waliqawmika wasawfa tusaloona
u: Haqeeqat yeh hai ke yeh kitaab tumahre liye aur tumhari qaum ke liye ek bahut bada sharaf hai aur anqareeb tum logon ko iski jawab-dahi karni hogi

t: Waisal man arsalna min qablika min rusulina ajaAAalna min dooni alrrahmani alihatan yuAAbadoona
u: Tumse pehle humne jitne Rasool bheje thay un sab se pooch dekho, kya humne khuda e Rehman ke siwa kuch dusre maabood bhi muqarrar kiye thay ke unki bandagi ki jaaye

t: Walaqad arsalna moosa biayatina ila firAAawna wamalaihi faqala innee rasoolu rabbi alAAalameena
u: Humne Moosa ko apni nishaniyon ke saath Firoun aur uske ayaan-e-sultanat ke paas bheja, aur usne jaa kar kaha ke main Rubb ul aalamin ka Rasool hoon

t: Falamma jaahum biayatina itha hum minha yadhakoona
u: Phir jab usne hamari nishaniyan unke saamne pesh ki to woh thatte (laughter) maarne lagey

t: Wama nureehim min ayatin illa hiya akbaru min okhtiha waakhathnahum bialAAathabi laAAallahum yarjiAAoona
u: Hum ek par ek aisi nishani unko dikhate chale gaye jo pehli se badh chadh kar thi, aur humne unko azaab mein dhar liya taa-ke woh apni rawish se baaz aayein

t: Waqaloo ya ayyuha alsahiru odAAu lana rabbaka bima AAahida AAindaka innana lamuhtadoona
u: Har azaab ke mauqe par woh kehte, Aey saahir (Jaadugar/magician), apne Rubb ki taraf se jo mansab tujhe haasil hai uski bina par hamare liye ussey duaa kar, hum zaroor raah-e-raast par aa jayenge

t: Falamma kashafna AAanhumu alAAathaba itha hum yankuthoona
u: Magar joonh hi ke hum unpar se azaab hata detay woh apni baat se phir jaatey thay

t: Wanada firAAawnu fee qawmihi qala ya qawmi alaysa lee mulku misra wahathihi alanharu tajree min tahtee afala tubsiroona
u: Ek roz Firoun ne apni qaum ke darmiyan pukar kar kaha, “logon, kya misr (egypt) ki baadshahi meri nahin hai, aur yeh nehrein (streams) mere nichey nahin beh rahi hain? Kya tum logon ko nazar nahin aata

t: Am ana khayrun min hatha allathee huwa maheenun wala yakadu yubeenu
u: Mein behtar hoon ya yeh shaks jo zaleel o haqeer hai aur apni baat bhi khol kar bayan nahin kar sakta

t: Falawla olqiya AAalayhi aswiratun min thahabin aw jaa maAAahu almalaikatu muqtarineena
u: Kyun na ispar soney (gold) ke kangan (bangles) utare gaye? Ya farishton ka ek dasta iski ardali mein na aaya?”

t: Faistakhaffa qawmahu faataAAoohu innahum kanoo qawman fasiqeena
u: Usne apni qaum ko halka samjha aur unhon ne uski itaat ki, dar haqeeqat woh thay hi faasiq log

t: Falamma asafoona intaqamna minhum faaghraqnahum ajmaAAeena
u: Aakhir e kaar jab unhon ne humein gazabnaak kardiya to humne unse inteqam liya aur unko ikattha garq (drown) kiya

t: FajaAAalnahum salafan wamathalan lilakhireena
u: Aur baad walon ke liye pesh-ro aur namoona ibrat banakar rakh diya

t: Walamma duriba ibnu maryama mathalan itha qawmuka minhu yasiddoona
u: Aur jonhi ke ibne Maryam (Jesus) ki misal di gayi, tumhari qaum ke logon ne uspar gul macha diya (chilla utthey/ raised a clamour)

t: Waqaloo aalihatuna khayrun am huwa ma daraboohu laka illa jadalan bal hum qawmun khasimoona
u: Aur lagey kehne ke hamare maabood acche hain ya woh? Yeh misaal woh tumhare saamne mehaz kach-behasi (argument/ contentiousness) ke liye laaye hain, haqeeat yeh hai ke yeh hain hi jhagdalu log

t: In huwa illa AAabdun anAAamna AAalayhi wajaAAalnahu mathalan libanee israeela
u: Ibne Maryam (Jesus) iske siwa kuch na tha ek banda tha jispar humne inaam kiya aur bani israel ke liye apni qudrat ka ek namuna bana diya

t: Walaw nashao lajaAAalna minkum malaikatan fee alardi yakhlufoona
u: Hum chahein to tumse farishte paida kardein jo zameen mein tumhare janasheen(successors) hon

t: Wainnahu laAAilmun lilssaAAati fala tamtarunna biha waittabiAAooni hatha siratun mustaqeemun
u: Aur woh dar-asal qayamat ki ek nishani hai, pas tum usmein shakk na karo meri baat maan lo, yahi seedha raasta hai

t: Wala yasuddannakumu alshshaytanu innahu lakum AAaduwwun mubeenun
u: Aisa na ho shaytan tumko ussey roak de ke woh tumhara khula dushman hai

t: Walamma jaa AAeesa bialbayyinati qala qad jitukum bialhikmati waliobayyina lakum baAAda allathee takhtalifoona feehi faittaqoo Allaha waateeAAooni
u: Aur jab Isa (Jesus) sareeh nishaniyan liye huey aaya tha to usne kaha tha ke “main tum logon ke paas hikmat lekar aaya hoon, aur isliye aaya hoon ke tumpar baaz un baaton ki haqeeqat khol doon jin mein tum ikhtilaf kar rahey ho, lihaza tum Allah se daro aur meri itaat karo

t: Inna Allaha huwa rabbee warabbukum faoAAbudoohu hatha siratun mustaqeemun
u: Haqeeqat yeh hai ke Allah hi mera Rubb bhi hai aur tumhara Rubb bhi.Usi ki tum ibadat karo, yahi seedha raasta hai”

t: Faikhtalafa alahzabu min baynihim fawaylun lillatheena thalamoo min AAathabi yawmin aleemin
u: Magar (uski is saaf taleem ke bawajood) girohon (factions) ne aapas mein ikhtilaf kiya, pas tabahi hai un logon ke liye jinhon ne zulm kiya ek dardnaak din ke azaab se

t: Hal yanthuroona illa alssaAAata an tatiyahum baghtatan wahum la yashAAuroona
u: Kya yeh log ab bas isi cheez ke muntazir hain ke achanak inpar qiyamat aa jaye aur inhein khabar bhi na ho

t: Alakhillao yawmaithin baAAduhum libaAAdin AAaduwwun illa almuttaqeena
u: Woh din jab aayega to muttaqin ko chodh kar baaki sab dost ek dursre ke dushman ho jayenge

t: Ya AAibadi la khawfun AAalaykumu alyawma wala antum tahzanoona
u: Us roz un logon se jo hamari aayat par imaan laaye thay aur mutii-e-farmaan bankar rahey thay

t: Allatheena amanoo biayatina wakanoo muslimeena
u: Kaha jayega ke “aey mere bandon (servents), aaj tumhare liye koi khauff nahin aur na tumhein koi gham lahiq hoga

t: Odkhuloo aljannata antum waazwajukum tuhbaroona
u: Dakhil ho jao jannat mein tum aur tumhari biwiyan, tumhein khush kardiya jaayega”

t: Yutafu AAalayhim bisihafin min thahabin waakwabin wafeeha ma tashtaheehi alanfusu watalaththu alaAAyunu waantum feeha khalidoona
u: Unke aagay soonay (golden) ke thal (Platters) aur sagar gardish karaye jayenge aur har mann bhaati aur nigaahon ko lazzat dene wali cheez wahan maujood hogi. Unse kaha jayega, “tum ab yahan hamesha rahoge

t: Watilka aljannatu allatee oorithtumooha bima kuntum taAAmaloona
u: Tum is jannat ke waaris apne un aamal ki wajah se huey ho jo tum duniya mein karte rahe

t: Lakum feeha fakihatun katheeratun minha takuloona
u: Tumhare liye yahan bakasrat fawake(abundant fruits) maujood hain jinhein tum khaogey”

t: Inna almujrimeena fee AAathabi jahannama khalidoona
u: Rahe mujreem , to woh hamesha jahannum ke azaab mein mubtala rahenge

t: La yufattaru AAanhum wahum feehi mublisoona
u: Kabhi unke azaab mein kami na hogi, aur woh us mein mayous padey hongey

t: Wama thalamnahum walakin kanoo humu alththalimeena
u: Unpar humne zulm nahin kiya balke woh khud hi apne upar zulm karte rahey

t: Wanadaw ya maliku liyaqdi AAalayna rabbuka qala innakum makithoona
u: Woh pukarenge, “aey maalik, tera Rubb hamara kaam hi tamam ka de to accha hai” woh jawab dega “tum yun hi padey rahogey

t: Laqad jinakum bialhaqqi walakinna aktharakum lilhaqqi karihoona
u: Hum tumhare paas haqq lekar aaye thay magar tum mein se aksar ko haqq hi nagawaar tha”

t: Am abramoo amran fainna mubrimoona
u: Kya in logon ne koi iqdam (plot) karne ka faisla karliya hai? Accha to hum bhi phir ek faisla kiye letey hain

t: Am yahsaboona anna la nasmaAAu sirrahum wanajwahum bala warusuluna ladayhim yaktuboona
u: Kya inhon ne yeh samajh rakkha hai ke hum inki raaz ki baatein aur inki sargoshiyan sunte nahin hain? Hum sab kuch sun rahey hain aur hamare farishtey inke paas hi likh rahe hain

t: Qul in kana lilrrahmani waladun faana awwalu alAAabideena
u: Inse kaho, agar waqai Rehman ki koi aulad hoti to sabse pehle Ibadat karne wala main hota”

t: Subhana rabbi alssamawati waalardi rabbi alAAarshi AAamma yasifoona
u: Paak hai aasmaano aur zameen ka farma rawan, Arsh ka maalik, un saari baaton se jo yeh log us ki taraf mansoob karte hain

t: Fatharhum yakhoodoo wayalAAaboo hatta yulaqoo yawmahumu allathee yooAAadoona
u: Accha, inhein apne baatil khayalat mein garq aur apne khel mein munhamik rehne do, yahan tak ke yeh apna woh din dekh lein jiska inhein khauff dilaya jaa raha hai

t: Wahuwa allathee fee alssamai ilahun wafee alardi ilahun wahuwa alhakeemu alAAaleemu
u: Wahi ek aasman mein bhi khuda hai aur zameen mein bhi khuda, aur wahi hakeem o Aleem hai

t: Watabaraka allathee lahu mulku alssamawati waalardi wama baynahuma waAAindahu AAilmu alssaAAati wailayhi turjaAAoona
u: Bahut baala-o-bartar hai woh jiske qabze mein zameen aur aasmaano aur har us cheez ki baadshahi hai jo zameen o aasman ke darmiyan payi jaati hai. Aur wahi qayamat ki ghadi ka ilm rakhta hai, aur usi ki taraf tum sab paltaye jaane waale ho

t: Wala yamliku allatheena yadAAoona min doonihi alshshafaAAata illa man shahida bialhaqqi wahum yaAAlamoona
u: Usko chodh kar yeh log jinhein pukarte hain woh kisi shafaat ka ikhtiyar nahin rakhte, illa yeh ke koi ilm ki bina par haqq ki shahadat de

t: Walain saaltahum man khalaqahum layaqoolunna Allahu faanna yufakoona
u: Aur agar tum insey pucho ke inhein kisne paida kiya hai to yeh khud kahenge ke Allah ne. Phir kahan se yeh dhoka kha rahe hain

t: Waqeelihi yarabbi inna haolai qawmun la yuminoona
u: Kasam hai Rasool ke is qaul ki ke aey Rubb, yeh woh log hain jo maan kar nahin detay

t: Faisfah AAanhum waqul salamun fasawfa yaAAlamoona
u: Accha, aey nabi insey darguzar karo aur kehdo ke salaam hai tumhein, anqareeb inhein maaloom ho jayega

t: Hameem
u: Haa Meem

t: Waalkitabi almubeeni
u: Kasam hai is kitaab e Mubeen ki

t: Inna anzalnahu fee laylatin mubarakatin inna kunna munthireena
u: Ke humne isey ek badi khair o barakat wali raat mein nazil kiya hai, kyunke hum logon ko mutanabbeh (warning) karne ka irada rakhte thay

t: Feeha yufraqu kullu amrin hakeemin
u: Yeh woh raat thi jismein har maamle ka hakeemana faisla

t: Amran min AAindina inna kunna mursileena
u: Hamare hukum se sadir kiya jata hai. Hum ek Rasool bhejne waley thay

t: Rahmatan min rabbika innahu huwa alssameeAAu alAAaleemu
u: Tere Rubb ki rehmat ke taur par.Yaqeenan wahi sab kuch sunne aur jaanne wala hai

t: Rabbi alssamawati waalardi wama baynahuma in kuntum mooqineena
u: Aasmano aur zameen ka Rubb aur har us cheez ka Rubb jo Aasman o zameen ke darmiyan hai agar tum log waqaii yakeen rakhne waley ho

t: La ilaha illa huwa yuhyee wayumeetu rabbukum warabbu abaikumu alawwaleena
u: Koi maabood uske siwa nahin hai. Wahi zindagi ata karta hai aur wahi maut deta hai.Tumhara Rubb aur tumhare un aslaaf (forefathers) ka Rubb jo pehle guzar chuke hain

t: Bal hum fee shakkin yalAAaboona
u: (Magar fil-waqeh in logon ko yaqeen nahin hai) balke yeh apne shakk mein paday khel rahey hain

t: Fairtaqib yawma tatee alssamao bidukhanin mubeenin
u: Accha intezar karo us din ka jab aasman sareeh dhuwan (smoke) liye huey aayega

t: Yaghsha alnnasa hatha AAathabun aleemun
u: Aur woh logon par chaa jayega, yeh hai dardnaak saza

t: Rabbana ikshif AAanna alAAathaba inna muminoona
u: (Ab kehte hain ke) “ parwardigar , humpar se yeh azaab taal de, hum imaan laatey hain”

t: Anna lahumu alththikra waqad jaahum rasoolun mubeenun
u: Inki gaflat kahan dur hoti hai? Inka haal to yeh hai ke in ke paas Rasool e mubeen aa gaya

t: Thumma tawallaw AAanhu waqaloo muAAallamun majnoonun
u: Phir bhi yeh uski taraf multafit na huey aur kaha ke “ yeh to sikhaya padaya bawla hai (well-tutored madman)”

t: Inna kashifoo alAAathabi qaleelan innakum AAaidoona
u: Hum zara azaab hataye detay hain, tum log phir wahi kuch karoge jo pehle kar rahe thay

t: Yawma nabtishu albatshata alkubra inna muntaqimoona
u: Jis roz hum badi zarb (assault) lagayenge woh din hoga jab hum tumse intiqaam lenge

t: Walaqad fatanna qablahum qawma firAAawna wajaahum rasoolun kareemun
u: Hum insey pehle Firaun ki qaum ko isi aazmaish mein daal chuke hain. Unke paas ek nihayat shareef Rasool aaya

t: An addoo ilayya AAibada Allahi innee lakum rasoolun ameenun
u: Aur usne kaha “Allah ke bandon ko mere hawale karo, main tumhare liye ek amanat-daar Rasool hoon

t: Waan la taAAloo AAala Allahi innee ateekum bisultanin mubeenin
u: Allah ke muqable mein sarkashi na karo. Main tumhare saamne (apni maamuriyat ki) sareeh sanad (clear authority) pesh karta hoon

t: Wainnee AAuthtu birabbee warabbikum an tarjumooni
u: Aur main apne Rubb aur tumhare Rubb ki panaah le chuka hoon issey ke tum mujhpar hamla-awar (attack) ho

t: Wain lam tuminoo lee faiAAtazilooni
u: Agar tum meri baat nahin maante to mujhpar haath daalne se baaz raho”

t: FadaAAa rabbahu anna haolai qawmun mujrimoona
u: Aakhir e kaar usne apne Rubb ko pukara ke yeh log mujrim hain

t: Faasri biAAibadee laylan innakum muttabaAAoona
u: (Jawab diya gaya) accha to raat-o-raat mere bandon (servants) ko lekar chal padh. Tum logon ka peecha kiya jayega

t: Waotruki albahra rahwan innahum jundun mughraqoona
u: Samandar ko uske haal par khula chodh de.Yeh saara lashkar garq (drown) honay wala hai

t: Kam tarakoo min jannatin waAAuyoonin
u: Kitne hi baag aur chasme

t: WazurooAAin wamaqamin kareemin
u: Aur kheit (gardens) aur shaandaar mahal thay jo woh chodh gaye

t: WanaAAmatin kanoo feeha fakiheena
u: Kitne hi aish ke sar-o-samaan, jin mein woh mazey kar rahey thay unke pichey dharay reh gaye

t: Kathalika waawrathnaha qawman akhareena
u: Yeh hua unka anjaam, aur humne dusron ko in cheezon ka waris bana diya

t: Fama bakat AAalayhimu alssamao waalardu wama kanoo munthareena
u: Phir na aasman unpar roya na zameen, aur zara si mohalat bhi unko na di gayi

t: Walaqad najjayna banee israeela mina alAAathabi almuheeni
u: Is taraah bani Israel ko humne sakht zillat ke azaab

t: Min firAAawna innahu kana AAaliyan mina almusrifeena
u: Firoun se najaat di jo hadd se guzar janey walon mein fil waqeh badey unchey darje ka aadmi tha

t: Walaqadi ikhtarnahum AAala AAilmin AAala alAAalameena
u: Aur unki halat jaante huye, unko duniya ki dursi qaumon par tarjeeh di

t: Waataynahum mina alayati ma feehi balaon mubeenun
u: Aur unhein aisi nishaniya dikhayi jin mein sareeh aazmaish thi

t: Inna haolai layaqooloona
u: Yeh log kehte hain

t: In hiya illa mawtatuna aloola wama nahnu bimunshareena
u: “hamari pehli maut ke siwa aur kuch nahin uske baad hum dobara uthaye jaane wale nahin hai

t: Fatoo biabaina in kuntum sadiqeena
u: Agar tum sacchey ho to utha lao hamare baap dada ko”

t: Ahum khayrun am qawmu tubbaAAin waallatheena min qablihim ahlaknahum innahum kanoo mujrimeena
u: Yeh behtar hai ya tubbah ki qaum aur ussey pehle ke log? Humne unko isi bina par tabah kiya ke woh mujrim ho gaye thay

t: Wama khalaqna alssamawati waalarda wama baynahuma laAAibeena
u: Yeh Aasman o zameen aur inke darmiyan ki cheezein humne kuch khel ke taur par nahin bana di hai

t: Ma khalaqnahuma illa bialhaqqi walakinna aktharahum la yaAAlamoona
u: Inko humne bar-haqq paida kiya hai, magar aksar log jaante hain hai

t: Inna yawma alfasli meeqatuhum ajmaAAeena
u: In sabke uthaye janey ke liye the-shuda waqt faisle ka din hai

t: Yawma la yughnee mawlan AAan mawlan shayan wala hum yunsaroona
u: Woh din jab koi azeez kareeb apne kisi azeez kareeb ke kuch bhi kaam nahin aayega. Aur na kahin se unhein koi madad pahunchegi

t: Illa man rahima Allahu innahu huwa alAAazeezu alrraheemu
u: Siwaye iske ke Allah hi kisi par reham karey, woh zabardast aur Raheem hai

t: Inna shajarata alzzaqqoomi
u: Zakkhum ka darakht (tree)

t: TaAAamu alatheemi
u: Gunahgaar ka kha-ja (khana /food) hoga

t: Kaalmuhli yaghlee fee albutooni
u: Tail (oil) ki tiljhat (dregs) jaisa, pait (bellies) mein is tarah josh khayega

t: Kaghalyi alhameemi
u: Jaise khaulta (boiling) hua pani josh khata hai

t: Khuthoohu faiAAtiloohu ila sawai aljaheemi
u: Pakado isey aur raged-te (dragging) huey le jao isko jahannum ke beechon beech

t: Thumma subboo fawqa rasihi min AAathabi alhameemi
u: Aur undhail (pour) do iske sar par khaulte (boiling) paani ka azaab

t: Thuq innaka anta alAAazeezu alkareemu
u: Chakkh iska maza, bada zabardast izzatdaar aadmi hai tu

t: Inna hatha ma kuntum bihi tamtaroona
u: Yeh wahi cheez hai jiske aane mein tumlog shakk rakhte thay”

t: Inna almuttaqeena fee maqamin ameenin
u: Khuda tars log aman ki jagah mein hongey

t: Fee jannatin waAAuyoonin
u: Baaghon (gardens) aur chashmo mein

t: Yalbasoona min sundusin waistabraqin mutaqabileena
u: Hareer-o-deeba (silk and brocade) ke libas pehne, aamne saamne baithey honge

t: Kathalika wazawwajnahum bihoorin AAeenin
u: Yeh hogi inki shaan aur hum gori gori aah-o-chashm auratein unse biyah denge

t: YadAAoona feeha bikulli fakihatin amineena
u: Wahan woh itminaan se har tarah ki lazeez cheezein talab karenge

t: La yathooqoona feeha almawta illa almawtata aloola wawaqahum AAathaba aljaheemi
u: Wahan maut ka maza woh kabhi na chakhenge . Bas duniya mein jo maut aa chuki so aa chuki aur Allah apne fazal se

t: Fadlan min rabbika thalika huwa alfawzu alAAatheemu
u: Unko jahannum ke azaab se bacha dega yahi badi kamiyabi hai

t: Fainnama yassarnahu bilisanika laAAallahum yatathakkaroona
u: Aey Nabi (s.a.s) humne is kitaab ko tumhari zubaan mein sahal (easy / aasaan) bana diya hai taake yeh log nasihat hasil karein

t: Fairtaqib innahum murtaqiboona
u: Ab tum bhi intezar karo, yeh bhi muntazir (intezar kar rahey) hain

t: Hameem
u: Haa Meem

t: Tanzeelu alkitabi mina Allahi alAAazeezi alhakeemi
u: Is kitaab ka nuzul Allah ki taraf se hai jo zabardast aur Hakeem hai

t: Inna fee alssamawati waalardi laayatin lilmumineena
u: Haqeeqat yeh hai ke aasmaano aur zameen mein beshumaar nishaniyan hain iman laney walon ke liye

t: Wafee khalqikum wama yabuththu min dabbatin ayatun liqawmin yooqinoona
u: Aur tumhari apni paidaish mein, aur un haiwanaat(janwaron) mein jinko Allah (zameen mein) phayla raha hai, badi nishaniyan hain un logon ke liye jo yaqeen laney waley hain

t: Waikhtilafi allayli waalnnahari wama anzala Allahu mina alssamai min rizqin faahya bihi alarda baAAda mawtiha watasreefi alrriyahi ayatun liqawmin yaAAqiloona
u: Aur shab-o-roz (night and day) ke farq o ikhtilaf mein, aur us rizq mein jisey Allah aasmaan se nazil farmata hai phir uske zariye se murda zameen ko jila uthata hai, aur hawaon ki gardish mein bahut nishaniyan hain un logon ke liye jo aqal se kaam letey hain

t: Tilka ayatu Allahi natlooha AAalayka bialhaqqi fabiayyi hadeethin baAAda Allahi waayatihi yuminoona
u: Yeh Allah ki nishaniyan hain jinhein hum tumhare saamne theek theek bayan kar rahey hain. Ab aakhir Allah aur uski aayat ke baad aur kaunsi baat hai jispar yeh log imaan layenge

t: Waylun likulli affakin atheemin
u: Tabahi hai har us jhoote badh amal shaks ke liye

t: YasmaAAu ayati Allahi tutla AAalayhi thumma yusirru mustakbiran kaan lam yasmaAAha fabashshirhu biAAathabin aleemin
u: Jiske saamne Allah ki aayat padi jaati hain, aur woh unko sunta hai, phir puray istakbar ke saath apne kufr par is tarah ada rehta hai goya usne unko suna hi nahin. Aise shaks ko dardnaak azaab ka musda suna do

t: Waitha AAalima min ayatina shayan ittakhathaha huzuwan olaika lahum AAathabun muheenun
u: Hamari aayat mein se koi baat jab uske ilm mein aati hai to woh unka mazaak bana leta hain. Aisey sab logon ke liye zillat ka azaab hai

t: Min waraihim jahannamu wala yughnee AAanhum ma kasaboo shayan wala ma ittakhathoo min dooni Allahi awliyaa walahum AAathabun AAatheemun
u: Unke aage jahannum hai. Jo kuch bhi unhone duniya mein kamaya hai usmein se koi cheez unke kisi kaam na aayegi. Na unke woh sarparast hi unke liye kuch kar sakenge jinhein Allah ko chodh kar unhon ne apna wali bana rakkha hai. Unke liye bada azaab hai

t: Hatha hudan waallatheena kafaroo biayati rabbihim lahum AAathabun min rijzin aleemin
u: Yeh Quran sarasar hidayat hai, aur un logon ke liye balaa ka dardnaak azaab hai jinhon ne apne Rubb ki aayat ko maan-ne se inkar kiya

t: Allahu allathee sakhkhara lakumu albahra litajriya alfulku feehi biamrihi walitabtaghoo min fadlihi walaAAallakum tashkuroona
u: Woh Allah hi to hai jisne tumhare liye samandar ko musakkhar kiya taa-ke uske hukum se kashtiyan usmein chalein aur tum uska fazal talash karo aur shukar guzar ho

t: Wasakhkhara lakum ma fee alssamawati wama fee alardi jameeAAan minhu inna fee thalika laayatin liqawmin yatafakkaroona
u: Usne zameen aur aasmaano ki saari hi cheezon ko tumhare liye musakkhar kardiya, sab kuch apne paas se. Ismein badi nishaniyan hai un logon ke lye jo gaur o fikr karne wale hain

t: Qul lillatheena amanoo yaghfiroo lillatheena la yarjoona ayyama Allahi liyajziya qawman bima kanoo yaksiboona
u: (Aey Nabi) imaan laney walon se kehdo ke jo log Allah ki taraf se bure din aane ka koi andesha nahin rakhte, unki harakaton par darguzar se kaam lein taa-ke Allah khud ek giroh ko uski kamayi ka badla de

t: Man AAamila salihan falinafsihi waman asaa faAAalayha thumma ila rabbikum turjaAAoona
u: Jo koi neik amal karega apne hi liye karega, aur jo burai karega woh aap hi uska khumyaza (consequence) bhugtega. Phir jaana to sabko apne Rubb hi ki taraf hai

t: Walaqad atayna banee israeela alkitaba waalhukma waalnnubuwwata warazaqnahum mina alttayyibati wafaddalnahum AAala alAAalameena
u: Issey pehle bani Israel ko humne kitaab aur hukum aur nabuwat ata ki thi, unko humne umda samaan e zeist se nawaza, duniya bhar ke logon par unhein fazilat ata ki

t: Waataynahum bayyinatin mina alamri fama ikhtalafoo illa min baAAdi ma jaahumu alAAilmu baghyan baynahum inna rabbaka yaqdee baynahum yawma alqiyamati feema kanoo feehi yakhtalifoona
u: Aur deen ke maamle mein unhein wazeh hidayat de di.Phir jo ikhtilaf unke darmiyan runama hua woh (nawaqifiyat ki wajah se nahin balke) ilm aa jaaney ke baad hua aur us bina par hua ke woh aapas mein ek dusre par zyadati karna chahte thay. Allah qayamat ke roz un maamlaat ka faisla farmadega jinmein woh ikhtilaf karte rahey hain

t: Thumma jaAAalnaka AAala shareeAAatin mina alamri faittabiAAha wala tattabiAA ahwaa allatheena la yaAAlamoona
u: Iske baad aey Nabi humne tumko din ke maamley mein ek saaf shah-raah(shariyat) par qayam kiya hai. Lihaza tum usi par chalo aur un logon ki khwahishat ka ittiba na karo jo ilm nahin rakhte

t: Innahum lan yughnoo AAanka mina Allahi shayan wainna alththalimeena baAAduhum awliyao baAAdin waAllahu waliyyu almuttaqeena
u: Allah ke muqable mein woh tumhare kuch bhi kaam nahin aa sakte. Zaalim log ek dusre ke saathi hain, aur muttaaqiyon ka saathi Allah hai

t: Hatha basairu lilnnasi wahudan warahmatun liqawmin yooqinoona
u: Yeh basirat ki roshiniyan hain sab logon ke liye aur hidayat aur rehmat un logon ke liye jo yaqeen layein

t: Am hasiba allatheena ijtarahoo alssayyiati an najAAalahum kaallatheena amanoo waAAamiloo alssalihati sawaan mahyahum wamamatuhum saa ma yahkumoona
u: Kya woh log jinhon ne buraiyon ka irtiqaab kiya hai yeh samjhe baithay hain ke hum unhein aur imaan laney walon aur neik amal karne walon ko ek jaisa kardenge ke inka jeena aur marna yaksan ho jaye? Bahut burey hukum hain jo yeh log lagate hain

t: Wakhalaqa Allahu alssamawati waalarda bialhaqqi walitujza kullu nafsin bima kasabat wahum la yuthlamoona
u: Allah ne to Aasmaano aur zameen ko barhaqq paida kiya hai aur is liye kiya hai ke har mutannafis ko uski kamayi ka badla diya jaye. Logon par zulm hargiz na kiya jayega

t: Afaraayta mani ittakhatha ilahahu hawahu waadallahu Allahu AAala AAilmin wakhatama AAala samAAihi waqalbihi wajaAAala AAala basarihi ghishawatan faman yahdeehi min baAAdi Allahi afala tathakkaroona
u: Phir kya tumne kabhi us shaks ke haal par bhi gaur kiya jisne apni khwahish e nafs ko apna khuda bana liya aur Allah ne ilm ke bawajood usey gumrahi mein phenk diya aur uske dil aur kaano (ears) par mohar laga di aur uski aankhon par purdah daal diya? Allah ke baad ab aur kaun hai jo usey hidayat de? Kya tum log koi sabaq nahin letay

t: Waqaloo ma hiya illa hayatuna alddunya namootu wanahya wama yuhlikuna illa alddahru wama lahum bithalika min AAilmin in hum illa yathunnoona
u: Yeh log kehte hain ke “zindagi bas yahi hamari duniya ki zindagi hai, yahin hamara marna aur jeena hai aur gardish-e-ayyam ( passage of time) ke siwa koi cheez nahin ho humein halaak karti ho.” Dar haqeeqat is maamle mein inke paas koi ilm nahin hai yeh mehaz gumaan ki bina par yeh baatein karte hain

t: Waitha tutla AAalayhim ayatuna bayyinatin ma kana hujjatahum illa an qaloo itoo biabaina in kuntum sadiqeena
u: Aur jab hamari wazeh aayat unhein sunayi jaati hain to inke paas koi hujjat iske siwa nahin hoti ke utha lao hamare baap dada ko agar tum sacche ho

t: Quli Allahu yuhyeekum thumma yumeetukum thumma yajmaAAukum ila yawmi alqiyamati la rayba feehi walakinna akthara alnnasi la yaAAlamoona
u: Aey Nabi insey kaho Allah hi tumhein zindagi bakashta hai, phir wahi tumhein maut deta hai , phir wahi tumko us qayamat ke din jamaa karega jiske aane mein koi shakk nahin. Magar aksar log jaante nahin hain

t: Walillahi mulku alssamawati waalardi wayawma taqoomu alssaAAatu yawmaithin yakhsaru almubtiloona
u: Zameen aur aasmaano ki badshahi Allah hi ki hai, aur jis roz qayamat ki ghadi aa khadi hogi us din baatil parast khasarey (nuksan) mein padh jayenge

t: Watara kulla ommatin jathiyatan kullu ommatin tudAAa ila kitabiha alyawma tujzawna ma kuntum taAAmaloona
u: Us waqt tum har girooh ko ghuthano (knees) ke bal gira dekhoge. Har girooh ko pukara jayega ke aaye aur apna naame aamal dekhe. Unse kaha jayega: “aaj tum logon ko un aamal ka badla diya jayega jo tum karte rahe thay

t: Hatha kitabuna yantiqu AAalaykum bialhaqqi inna kunna nastansikhu ma kuntum taAAmaloona
u: Yeh hamara tayyar karaya hua aamal naama hai jo tumhare upar theek theek shahadat de raha hai, jo kuch bhi tum karte thay usey hum likhwate ja rahe thay”

t: Faamma allatheena amanoo waAAamiloo alssalihati fayudkhiluhum rabbuhum fee rahmatihi thalika huwa alfawzu almubeenu
u: Phir jo log imaan laaye thay aur neik aamal karte rahey thay unhein unka Rubb apni rehmat mein dakhil karega. Aur yahi sareeh kaamiyabi hai

t: Waamma allatheena kafaroo afalam takun ayatee tutla AAalaykum faistakbartum wakuntum qawman mujrimeena
u: Aur jin logon ne kufr kiya tha unsey kaha jayega “kya meri aayat tumko nahin sunayi jaati thin? Magar tumne takabbur kiya aur mujrim bankar rahey

t: Waitha qeela inna waAAda Allahi haqqun waalssaAAatu la rayba feeha qultum ma nadree ma alssaAAatu in nathunnu illa thannan wama nahnu bimustayqineena
u: Aur jab kaha jaata tha ke Allah ka waada bar- haqq hai aur qayamat ke aane mein koi shakk nahin, to tum kehte thay ke hum nahin jaante qayamat kya hoti hai, hum to bas ek gumaan sa rakhte hain , yaqeen hum ko nahin hai”

t: Wabada lahum sayyiatu ma AAamiloo wahaqa bihim ma kanoo bihi yastahzioona
u: Us waqt unpar unke aamal ki buraiyan khul jayengi aur woh usi cheez ke pher mein aa jayenge jiska woh mazaak udaya karte thay

t: Waqeela alyawma nansakum kama naseetum liqaa yawmikum hatha wamawakumu alnnaru wama lakum min nasireena
u: Aur insey kehdiya jayega ke “Aaj hum bhi usi tarah tumhein bhulaye detay hain jis tarah tum is din ki mulaqaat ko bhool gaye thay.Tumhara thikana ab dozakh hai aur koi tumhari madad karne wala nahin hai

t: Thalikum biannakumu ittakhathtum ayati Allahi huzuwan wagharratkumu alhayatu alddunya faalyawma la yukhrajoona minha wala hum yustaAAtaboona
u: Yeh tumhara anjaam is liye hua hai ke tumne Allah ki aayat ka mazaak bana liya tha aur tumhein duniya ki zindagi ne dhoke mein daal diya tha. Lihaza aaj na yeh log dozakh se nikale jayenge aur na inse kaha jayega ke maafi maang kar apne Rubb ko raazi karo”

t: Falillahi alhamdu rabbi alssamawati warabbi alardi rabbi alAAalameena
u: Pas taarif Allah hi ke liye hai jo zameen aur aasmaano ka maalik aur saare jahan waalon ka parwardigar hai

t: Walahu alkibriyao fee alssamawati waalardi wahuwa alAAazeezu alhakeemu
u: Zameen aur aasmaano mein badayi usi ke liye hai aur wahi zabardast (most mighty) aur daana(most wise) hai

t: Hameem
u: Haa meem

t: Tanzeelu alkitabi mina Allahi alAAazeezi alhakeemi
u: Is kitaab ka nuzul Allah zabardast aur dana ki taraf se hai

t: Ma khalaqna alssamawati waalarda wama baynahuma illa bialhaqqi waajalin musamman waallatheena kafaroo AAamma onthiroo muAAridoona
u: Humne zameen aur aasmaano ko aur un saari cheezon ko jo unke darmiyan hain bar-haqq aur ek muddat e khaas ke taayun ke saath paida kiya hai. Magar yeh kaafir log us haqeeqat se mooh moade hue hain jisse unko khabardar kiya gaya hai

t: Qul araaytum ma tadAAoona min dooni Allahi aroonee matha khalaqoo mina alardi am lahum shirkun fee alssamawati eetoonee bikitabin min qabli hatha aw atharatin min AAilmin in kuntum sadiqeena
u: Aey Nabi, inse kaho, “kabhi tumne aankhein khol kar dekha bhi ke woh hastiyan hain kya jinhein tum khuda ko chodh kar pukarte ho? Zara mujhey dikhao to sahih ke zameen mein unhon ne kya paida kiya hai, ya aasmano ki takhleeq o tadbeer mein unka kya hissa hai. Issey pehle aayi hui kitaab ya ilm ka koi baqiyya (in aqaid ke sabot mein) tumhare paas ho to wahi le aao agar tum sacche ho”

t: Waman adallu mimman yadAAoo min dooni Allahi man la yastajeebu lahu ila yawmi alqiyamati wahum AAan duAAaihim ghafiloona
u: Aakhir us shaks se zyada behka hua insaan aur kaun hoga jo Allah ko chodh kar unko pukare jo qayamat tak usey jawab nahin de sakte, balke issey bhi bekhabar hain ke pukarne waley unko pukar rahey hain

t: Waitha hushira alnnasu kanoo lahum aAAdaan wakanoo biAAibadatihim kafireena
u: Aur jab tamam Insan jamaa kiye jayenge us waqt woh apne pukarne walon ke dushman aur unki ibadat ke munkir honge

t: Waitha tutla AAalayhim ayatuna bayyinatin qala allatheena kafaroo lilhaqqi lamma jaahum hatha sihrun mubeenun
u: In logon ko jab hamari saaf saaf aayat sunayi jaati hain aur haqq inke saamne aa jata hai to yeh kafir log uske mutaaliq kehte hain ke yeh to khula jaadu hai

t: Am yaqooloona iftarahu qul ini iftaraytuhu fala tamlikoona lee mina Allahi shayan huwa aAAlamu bima tufeedoona feehi kafa bihi shaheedan baynee wabaynakum wahuwa alghafooru alrraheemu
u: Kya unka kehna yeh hai ke Rasool ne isey khud ghadh (fabricated) liya hai? Inse kaho “ agar maine isey khud ghadh (fabricated) liya hai to tum mujhey khuda ki pakad se kuch bhi na bacha sakogey. Jo baatein tum banate ho Allah unko khoob jaanta hai, mere aur tumhare darmiyaan wahi gawahi dene ke liye kaafi hai, aur woh bada darguzar karne wala aur Raheem hai”

t: Qul ma kuntu bidAAan mina alrrusuli wama adree ma yufAAalu bee wala bikum in attabiAAu illa ma yooha ilayya wama ana illa natheerun mubeenun
u: Inse kaho “main koi nirala Rasool to nahin hoon, main nahin jaanta ke kal tumhare saath kya hona hai aur mere saath kya. Main to sirf us wahee (revelation) ki pairwi karta hoon jo mere paas bheji jaati hai aur main ek saaf saaf khabardar kardene wale ke siwa kuch nahin hoon”

t: Qul araaytum in kana min AAindi Allahi wakafartum bihi washahida shahidun min banee israeela AAala mithlihi faamana waistakbartum inna Allaha la yahdee alqawma alththalimeena
u: Aey Nabi, inse kaho “ kabhi tumne socha bhi ke agar yeh kalaam Allah hi ki taraf se hua aur tum ne iska inkar kardiya ( to tumhara kya anjaam hoga)?Aur is jaise ek kalaam par to bani Israel ka ek gawah shahadat bhi de chukka hai. Woh imaan le aaya aur tum apne ghamand (arrogant) mein padey rahey. Aise zaalimon ko Allah hidayat nahin diya karta”

t: Waqala allatheena kafaroo lillatheena amanoo law kana khayran ma sabaqoona ilayhi waith lam yahtadoo bihi fasayaqooloona hatha ifkun qadeemun
u: Jin logon ne maan-ne se inkar kardiya hai woh imaan laney walon ke mutaaliq kehte hain “ke agar is kitaab ko maan lena koi accha kaam hota to yeh log is maamle mein humse sabaqat na leja sakte thay”. Chunke inhon ne usse hidayat na paayi is liye ab yeh zaroor kahenge ke yeh to purana jhoot hai

t: Wamin qablihi kitabu moosa imaman warahmatan wahatha kitabun musaddiqun lisanan AAarabiyyan liyunthira allatheena thalamoo wabushra lilmuhsineena
u: Halaanke isse pehle Moosa ki kitaab rehnuma aur rehmat bankar aa chuki hai, aur yeh kitaab uski tasdeeq karne wali zubaan-e-arabi mein aayi hai taake zaalimon ko mutanabbe (warn) karde aur neik rawish ikhtiyar karne walon ko basharat de de

t: Inna allatheena qaloo rabbuna Allahu thumma istaqamoo fala khawfun AAalayhim wala hum yahzanoona
u: Yakeenan jin logon ne kehdiya ke Allah hi hamara Rubb hai, phir us par jamm gaye, unke liye na koi khauff hai aur na woh ghamgheen hongey

t: Olaika ashabu aljannati khalideena feeha jazaan bima kanoo yaAAmaloona
u: Aise sab log Jannat mein jaane waley hain. Jahan woh hamesha rahenge apne un aamal ke badle jo woh duniya mein karte rahey hain

t: Wawassayna alinsana biwalidayhi ihsanan hamalathu ommuhu kurhan wawadaAAathu kurhan wahamluhu wafisaluhu thalathoona shahran hatta itha balagha ashuddahu wabalagha arbaAAeena sanatan qala rabbi awziAAnee an ashkura niAAmataka allatee anAAamta AAalayya waAAala walidayya waan aAAmala salihan tardahu waaslih lee fee thurriyyatee innee tubtu ilayka wainnee mina almuslimeena
u: Humne Insan ko hidayat ki ke woh apne walidain ke saath neik bartaao karey. Uski maa ne mushakkat utha kar usey pait mein rakkha aur mushakkat utha kar hi usko jana(delivered). Aur uske hamal aur doodh chudane mein tees (thirty) mahine lag gaye. Yahan tak ke jab woh apni puri taaqat ko pahuncha aur chaalis(forty) saal ka ho gaya to usne kaha “Aey mere Rubb mujhey taufiq de ke main teri un niyamaton ka shukar ada karoon jo tu ne mujhey aur mere walidain ko ata famayi, aur aisa neik amal karoon jis se tu raazi ho, aur meri aulad ko bhi neik bana kar mujhey sukh de, mein tere huzoor tawbah karta hoon aur taabe farmaan (muslim)bandon mein se hoon”

t: Olaika allatheena nataqabbalu AAanhum ahsana ma AAamiloo wanatajawazu AAan sayyiatihim fee ashabi aljannati waAAda alssidqi allathee kanoo yooAAadoona
u: Is tarah ke logon se hum unke behtreen aamal ko qabool karte hain aur unki buraiyon se darguzar kar jaate hain. Yeh jannati logon mein shamil hongey us sacche waade ke mutaabiq jo insey kya jaata raha hai

t: Waallathee qala liwalidayhi offin lakuma ataAAidaninee an okhraja waqad khalati alquroonu min qablee wahuma yastagheethani Allaha waylaka amin inna waAAda Allahi haqqun fayaqoolu ma hatha illa asateeru alawwaleena
u: Aur jis shaks ne apne waldain se kaha “ Uff, tang kar diya tumne” kya tum mujhe yeh khauff dilate ho ke main marne ke baad phir qabar se nikala jaunga halanke mujh se pehle bahut si nasalein(generations) guzar chuki hain ( unmein se to koi uth kar na aaya)”Maa aur baap Allah ki duhayi dekar kehte hain “ arey badnaseeb ,maan ja , Allah ka waada saccha hai”. Magar woh kehta hai “ yeh sab agle waqton ki farsuda(fables) kahaniyan hai”

t: Olaika allatheena haqqa AAalayhimu alqawlu fee umamin qad khalat min qablihim mina aljinni waalinsi innahum kanoo khasireena
u: Yeh woh log hain jinpar azaab ka faisla chaspan ho chuka hai. Insey pehle Jinno aur Insano ke jo toley(communities) (isi qumash ke) ho guzre hain unhi mein yeh bhi ja shamil hongey. Beshak yeh ghatey(loss) mein reh janey wale log hain

t: Walikullin darajatun mimma AAamiloo waliyuwaffiyahum aAAmalahum wahum la yuthlamoona
u: Dono girohon mein se har ek ke darje unke aamal ke lihaz se hain taa-ke Allah unke kiye ka pura pura badla unko de. Unpar zulm hargiz na kiya jaaye

t: Wayawma yuAAradu allatheena kafaroo AAala alnnari athhabtum tayyibatikum fee hayatikumu alddunya waistamtaAAtum biha faalyawma tujzawna AAathaba alhooni bima kuntum tastakbiroona fee alardi bighayri alhaqqi wabima kuntum tafsuqoona
u: Phir jab yeh kaafir aag ke saame laa khade kiye jayenge to unse kaha jayega: “ tum apne hissay ki niyamatein apni duniya ki zindagi mein khatam kar chuke aur unka lutf tumne utha liya, ab jo takabbur tum zameen mein kisi haqq ke bagair karte rahe aur jo nafarmaniyan tumne ki unke padash mein aaj tumko zillat ka azaab diya jayega”

t: Waothkur akha AAadin ith anthara qawmahu bialahqafi waqad khalati alnnuthuru min bayni yadayhi wamin khalfihi alla taAAbudoo illa Allaha innee akhafu AAalaykum AAathaba yawmin AAatheemin
u: Zara inhein Aad ke bhai (Hud) ka qissa sunao jabke usne ahqaf mein apni qaum ko khabardar kiya tha aur aise khabardar karne waley ussey pehle bhi guzar chuke thay aur uske baad bhi aate rahey ke “ Allah ke siwa kisi ki bandagi na karo , mujhe tumhare haqq mein ek baday haulnaak din ke azaab ka andesha hai”

t: Qaloo ajitana litafikana AAan alihatina fatina bima taAAiduna in kunta mina alssadiqeena
u: Unhon ne kaha “ kya tu isliye aaya hai ke humein behka kar hamare maboodon se bargashta kar de? Accha to le aa apna woh azaab jissey tu humein darata hai agar waqai tu saccha hai”

t: Qala innama alAAilmu AAinda Allahi waoballighukum ma orsiltu bihi walakinnee arakum qawman tajhaloona
u: Usne kaha ke “iska ilm to Allah ko hai, main sirf woh paighaam tumhein pahuncha raha hoon jisey dekar mujhey bheja gaya hai. Magar main dekh raha hoon ke tumlog jahalat barat rahey ho”

t: Falamma raawhu AAaridan mustaqbila awdiyatihim qaloo hatha AAaridun mumtiruna bal huwa ma istaAAjaltum bihi reehun feeha AAathabun aleemun
u: Phir jab unhon ne us azaab ko apni waadiyon (valleys) ki taraf aate dekha to kehne lagey “yeh badal hai jo humko sairaab kardega”. balke yeh wahi cheez hai jiske liye tum jaldi macha rahe thay, yeh hawa ka toofaan hai jismein dardnaak azaab chala aa raha hai

t: Tudammiru kulla shayin biamri rabbiha faasbahoo la yura illa masakinuhum kathalika najzee alqawma almujrimeena
u: Apne Rubb ke hukum se har cheez ko tabaah kar dalega”. Aakhir e kaar unka haal yeh hua ke unke rehne ke jaghon ke siwa wahan kuch nazar na aata tha. Is tarah hum mujrimon ko badla diya karte hain

t: Walaqad makkannahum feema in makkannakum feehi wajaAAalna lahum samAAan waabsaran waafidatan fama aghna AAanhum samAAuhum wala absaruhum wala afidatuhum min shayin ith kanoo yajhadoona biayati Allahi wahaqa bihim ma kanoo bihi yastahzioona
u: Unko humne woh kuch diya tha jo tum logon ko nahin diya hai. Unko humne kaan, aankehin aur dil sab kuch de rakkhe thay, magar na woh kaan unke kisi kaam aaye, na aankhein, na dil, kyunke woh Allah ki aayat ka inkar karte thay, aur usi cheez ke phair mein woh aa gaye jiska woh mazaak udate thay

t: Walaqad ahlakna ma hawlakum mina alqura wasarrafna alayati laAAallahum yarjiAAoona
u: Tumhare gird o pesh ke ilakon mein bahut se bastiyon ko hum halaak kar chuke hain. Humne apni aayat bhej kar baar baar tarah tarah se unko samjhaya, shayad ke woh baaz aa jayein

t: Falawla nasarahumu allatheena ittakhathoo min dooni Allahi qurbanan alihatan bal dalloo AAanhum wathalika ifkuhum wama kanoo yaftaroona
u: Phir kyun na un hastiyon ne unki madad ki jinhein Allah ko chodh kar unhon ne taqarrub-e-ilallah ka zariya samajhte huey maabood bana liya tha? Balke woh to unsey khoye gaye. Aur yeh tha unke jhoot aur un banawati aqeedon ka anjaam jo unhon ne ghadh rakkhe thay

t: Waith sarafna ilayka nafaran mina aljinni yastamiAAoona alqurana falamma hadaroohu qaloo ansitoo falamma qudiya wallaw ila qawmihim munthireena
u: (Aur woh waqiya bhi qabil e zikar hai) jab hum Jinno ke ek girooh ko tumhari taraf le aaye thay taa-ke Quran sunein. Jab woh us jagaah pahunche (jahan tum Quraan padh rahe thay) to unhon ne aapas mein kaha khamosh ho jao, phir jab woh padha ja chukka to woh khabardar karne walay ban kar apni qaum ki taraf palte(returned)

t: Qaloo ya qawmana inna samiAAna kitaban onzila min baAAdi moosa musaddiqan lima bayna yadayhi yahdee ila alhaqqi waila tareeqin mustaqeemin
u: Unhon ne jaa kar kaha “aey hamari qaum ke logon, humne ek kitaab suni hai jo Moosa ke baad naazil ki gayi hai, tasdeeq(confirm) karne wali hai apne se pehle aayi hui kitaabon ki, rehnumayi karti hai haqq aur raah-e-raast ki taraf

t: Ya qawmana ajeeboo daAAiya Allahi waaminoo bihi yaghfir lakum min thunoobikum wayujirkum min AAathabin aleemin
u: Aey hamari qaum ke logon, Allah ki taraf bulane waley ki dawat qabool karlo aur ispar imaan le aao, Allah tumhare gunaahon se darguzar famayega aur tumhein azaab e aleem se bacha dega”

t: Waman la yujib daAAiya Allahi falaysa bimuAAjizin fee alardi walaysa lahu min doonihi awliyaa olaika fee dalalin mubeenin
u: Aur jo koi Allah ke daai (one who calls to Allah) ki baat na maane woh na zameen mein khud koi bal boota rakhta hai ke Allah ko zach(frustrate) karde, aur na uske koi aise haami-o-sarparast (protector) hain ke Allah se usko bacha lein. Aisey log khuli gumraahi mein padey huey hain

t: Awalam yaraw anna Allaha allathee khalaqa alssamawati waalarda walam yaAAya bikhalqihinna biqadirin AAala an yuhyiya almawta bala innahu AAala kulli shayin qadeerun
u: Aur kya in logon ko yeh sujhayi nahin deta ke jis khuda ne yeh zameen aur aasmaan paida kiye hain aur inko banate huey jo na thaka, woh zaroor ispar qadir hai ke murdon (dead) ko jila uthaye? Kyun nahin, yaqeenan woh har cheez ki qudrat rakhta hai

t: Wayawma yuAAradu allatheena kafaroo AAala alnnari alaysa hatha bialhaqqi qaloo bala warabbina qala fathooqoo alAAathaba bima kuntum takfuroona
u: Jis roz yeh kaafir aag ke saamne laye jayenge , us waqt unsey pucha jayega “ kya yeh haqq nahin hai?” yeh kahenge “ haan, hamare Rubb ki kasam (yeh waqai haqq hai)” Allah farmayega “ accha to ab azaab ka mazaa chakkho apne us inkar ki padash mein jo tum karte rahe thay”

t: Faisbir kama sabara oloo alAAazmi mina alrrusuli wala tastaAAjil lahum kaannahum yawma yarawna ma yooAAadoona lam yalbathoo illa saAAatan min naharin balaghun fahal yuhlaku illa alqawmu alfasiqoona
u: Pas aey Nabi, sabr karo jis tarhan ulul azm (strong will) Rasoolon ne sabr kiya hai, aur inke maamle mein jaldi na karo. Jis roz yeh log us cheez ko dekh lenge jiska inhein khauff dilaya ja raha hai to inhein yun maloon hoga ke jaise duniya mein din ki ek ghadi bhar se zyada nahin rahey thay. Baat pahuncha di gayi, ab kya nafarmaan logon ke siwa aur koi halak hoga

t: Allatheena kafaroo wasaddoo AAan sabeeli Allahi adalla aAAmalahum
u: Jin logon ne kufr kiya aur Allah ke raaste se roka Allah ne unke aamal ko raigaan (waste /vain) kardiya

t: Waallatheena amanoo waAAamiloo alssalihati waamanoo bima nuzzila AAala muhammadin wahuwa alhaqqu min rabbihim kaffara AAanhum sayyiatihim waaslaha balahum
u: Aur jo log imaan laye aur jinhon ne neik aamal kiye aur us cheez ko maan liya jo Muhammad par nazil hui hai aur hai woh sarasar haqq unke Rubb ki taraf se Allah ne unki burayian (evil deeds) unse dur kardi aur unka haal durust kardiya

t: Thalika bianna allatheena kafaroo ittabaAAoo albatila waanna allatheena amanoo ittabaAAoo alhaqqa min rabbihim kathalika yadribu Allahu lilnnasi amthalahum
u: Yeh is liye ke kufr karne walon ne baatil (falsehood) ki pairwi ki aur imaan lane walon ne us haqq ki pairwi ki jo unke Rubb ki taraf se aaya hai. Is tarhaan Allah logon ko unki theek theek haisiyat bataye deta hai

t: Faitha laqeetumu allatheena kafaroo fadarba alrriqabi hatta itha athkhantumoohum fashuddoo alwathaqa faimma mannan baAAdu waimma fidaan hatta tadaAAa alharbu awzaraha thalika walaw yashao Allahu laintasara minhum walakin liyabluwa baAAdakum bibaAAdin waallatheena qutiloo fee sabeeli Allahi falan yudilla aAAmalahum
u: Pas jab in kafiron se tumhari muth-bhaid (battle) ho to pehla kaam gardanein (necks) maarna hai, yahan tak ke jab tum unko acchi tarah kuchal do tab qaidiyon (captives) ko mazboot baandho. Iske baad (tumhein ikhtiyar hai) ehsan karo ya fidiye (ransom) ka muaamla karlo, taa-aanke ladayi apne hatiyar daal de. Yeh hai tumhare karne ka kaam. Allah chahta to khud hi unse nimat leta, magar (yeh tareeqa us ne is liye ikhtiyar kiya hai) taa-ke tum logon ko ek dusre ke zariye se aazmaye aur jo log Allah ki raah mein maarey jayenge Allah unke aamal ko hargiz zaya na karega

t: Sayahdeehim wayuslihu balahum
u: Woh unki rehnumayi farmayega, unka haal durust kardega

t: Wayudkhiluhumu aljannata AAarrafaha lahum
u: Aur unko us jannat mein daakhil karega jissey woh unko waqif kara chuka hai

t: Ya ayyuha allatheena amanoo in tansuroo Allaha yansurkum wayuthabbit aqdamakum
u: Aey logon jo imaan laye ho, agar tum Allah ki madad karoge to woh tumhari madad karega aur tumhare qadam mazboot jamaa dega

t: Waallatheena kafaroo fataAAsan lahum waadalla aAAmalahum
u: Rahe woh log jinhon ne kufr kiya hai, to unke liye halakat hai aur Allah ne unke aamal ko bhatka diya hai

t: Thalika biannahum karihoo ma anzala Allahu faahbata aAAmalahum
u: Kyunke unhon ne us cheez ko napasand kiya jisey Allah ne naazil kiya hai, lihaza Allah ne unke aamal zaya (waste) kardiye

t: Afalam yaseeroo fee alardi fayanthuroo kayfa kana AAaqibatu allatheena min qablihim dammara Allahu AAalayhim walilkafireena amthaluha
u: Kya woh zameen mein chale phire na thay ke un logon ka anjaam dekhte jo unse pehle guzar chuke hain? Allah ne unka sab kuch unpar ulat diya, aur aise hi nataij in kaafiron ke liye muqaddar hain

t: Thalika bianna Allaha mawla allatheena amanoo waanna alkafireena la mawla lahum
u: Yeh is liye ke imaan laane walon ka haami o nasir (Protector) Allah hai aur kaafiron ka haami o nasir (Protector) koi nahin

t: Inna Allaha yudkhilu allatheena amanoo waAAamiloo alssalihati jannatin tajree min tahtiha alanharu waallatheena kafaroo yatamattaAAoona wayakuloona kama takulu alanAAamu waalnnaru mathwan lahum
u: Iman laney walon aur neik amal karne walon ko Allah un jannaton mein daakhil karega jinke nichey nehrein behti hain, aur kufr karne waale bas duniya ki chandh roza zindagi ke mazey loot rahey hain, janwaron ki tarah kha pee rahey hain, aur unka aakhri thikana jahannum hai

t: Wakaayyin min qaryatin hiya ashaddu quwwatan min qaryatika allatee akhrajatka ahlaknahum fala nasira lahum
u: Aey Nabi (s.a.s) kitni hi bastiyan aisi guzar chuki hain jo tumhare us basti se bahut zyada zoarawar thin jisne tumhein nikal diya hai? Unhein humne is tarhaan halaak kardiya ke koi unka bachane wala na tha

t: Afaman kana AAala bayyinatin min rabbihi kaman zuyyina lahu sooo AAamalihi waittabaAAoo ahwaahum
u: Bhala kahin aisa ho sakta hai ke jo apne Rubb ki taraf se ek saaf o sareeh hidayat par ho, woh un logon ki tarah ho jaye jinke liye unka bura amal khushnuma bana diya gaya hai aur woh apni khwahishat ke pairo ban gaye hain

t: Mathalu aljannati allatee wuAAida almuttaqoona feeha anharun min main ghayri asinin waanharun min labanin lam yataghayyar taAAmuhu waanharun min khamrin laththatin lilshsharibeena waanharun min AAasalin musaffan walahum feeha min kulli alththamarati wamaghfiratun min rabbihim kaman huwa khalidun fee alnnari wasuqoo maan hameeman faqattaAAa amAAaahum
u: Parhezgar-on ke liye jis jannat ka waada kiya gaya hai uski shaan to yeh hai ke usmein nehrein beh rahi hongi nithre (incorruptible /unpolluted) huye pani ki, nehrein beh rahi hongi aisey doodh ki jiske mazay(taste) mein zara farq na aaya hoga, nehrein beh rahi hongi aisi sharaab ki jo peene walon ke liye lazeez (delicious) hongi, nehrein beh rahi hongi saaf shafaaf shehad (honey) ki. Usmein unke liye har taraah ke phal hongay aur unke Rubb ki taraf se bakshish. (kya woh shaks jiske hissey mein yeh jannat aane wali hai) un logon ki taraah ho sakta hai jo jahannam mein hamesha rahenge aur jinhein aisa garam(hot) pani pilaya jayega jo unke aantein (bowels) tak kaat dega

t: Waminhum man yastamiAAu ilayka hatta itha kharajoo min AAindika qaloo lillatheena ootoo alAAilma matha qala anifan olaika allatheena tabaAAa Allahu AAala quloobihim waittabaAAoo ahwaahum
u: In mein se kuch log aise hain jo kaan laga kar tumhari baat sunte hain aur phir jab tumhare paas se nikalte hain un logon se jinhein ilm ki niyamat bakshi gayi hai puchte hain ke abhi abhi inhon ne kya kaha tha?yeh woh log hain jinke dilon par Allah ne thappa (seal) laga diya hai aur yeh apni apni khwaishat ke pairo bane huey hain

t: Waallatheena ihtadaw zadahum hudan waatahum taqwahum
u: Rahe woh log jinhon ne hidayat payi hai, Allah unko aur zyada hidayat deta hai aur unhein unke hisse ka taqwa ata farmata hai

t: Fahal yanthuroona illa alssaAAata an tatiyahum baghtatan faqad jaa ashratuha faanna lahum itha jaathum thikrahum
u: Ab kya yeh log bas qayamat hi ke muntazir hain ke woh achanak inpar aa jaye? Uski alamaat to aa chuki hain jab woh khud aa jayegi to inke liye nasihat kabool karne ka kaunsa mauqa baaqi reh jayega

t: FaiAAlam annahu la ilaha illa Allahu waistaghfir lithanbika walilmumineena waalmuminati waAllahu yaAAlamu mutaqallabakum wamathwakum
u: Pas aey Nabi, khoob jaan lo ke Allah ke siwa koi ibadat ka mustahiq nahin hai, aur maafi maango apne kasoor ke liye bhi aur momin mardon aur auraton ke liye bhi. Allah tumhari sargarmiyon ko bhi jaanta hai aur tumhare thikane se bhi waqif hai

t: Wayaqoolu allatheena amanoo lawla nuzzilat sooratun faitha onzilat sooratun muhkamatun wathukira feeha alqitalu raayta allatheena fee quloobihim maradun yanthuroona ilayka nathara almaghshiyyi AAalayhi mina almawti faawla lahum
u: Jo log iman laye hain woh keh rahe thay ke koi surat kyun nahin nazil ki jaati (jis mein jung ka hukum diya jaye) magar jab ek mohkam surat nazil kardi gayi jismein jung ka zikr tha to tumne dekha ke jinke dilon mein bimari thi woh tumhari taraf is tarah dekh rahey hain jaise kisi par maut chaa gayi ho. Afsos unke haal par

t: TaAAatun waqawlun maAAroofun faitha AAazama alamru falaw sadaqoo Allaha lakana khayran lahum
u: (Unki zubaan par hai) itaat ka ikrar aur acchi acchi batein. Magar jab qataii hukum de diya gaya us waqt woh Allah se apne ahad mein sacche nikalte to unhi ke liye accha tha

t: Fahal AAasaytum in tawallaytum an tufsidoo fee alardi watuqattiAAoo arhamakum
u: Ab kya tum logon se iske siwa kuch aur tawaqqu ki ja sakti hai ke agar tum ulte mooh phir gaye to zameen mein phir fasad barpa karoge aur aapas mein ek dusre ke galay (throats) kaatoge

t: Olaika allatheena laAAanahumu Allahu faasammahum waaAAma absarahum
u: Yeh log hain jinpar Allah ne laanat ki aur inko andha (blind) aur behra bana diya

t: Afala yatadabbaroona alqurana am AAala quloobin aqfaluha
u: Kya un logon ne Quran par gaur nahin kiya, ya dilon par unke qufal (locks) chade huey hain

t: Inna allatheena irtaddoo AAala adbarihim min baAAdi ma tabayyana lahumu alhuda alshshaytanu sawwala lahum waamla lahum
u: Haqeeqat yeh hai ke jo log hidayat wazeh ho jaane ke baad ussey phir gaye unke liye shaytan ne is rawish ko sahal bana diya hai aur jhuti tawaqquat ka silsila unke liye daraaz kar rakkha hai

t: Thalika biannahum qaloo lillatheena karihoo ma nazzala Allahu sanuteeAAukum fee baAAdi alamri waAllahu yaAAlamu israrahum
u: Is liye unhon ne Allah ke nazil karda deen ko napasand karne walon se kehdiya ke baaz maamlaat mein hum tumhari manenge.Allah unki yeh khufiya baatein khoob jaanta hai

t: Fakayfa itha tawaffathumu almalaikatu yadriboona wujoohahum waadbarahum
u: Phir us waqt kya haal hoga jab farishtey inki roohein qabz karenge aur inke mooh aur peethon (backs) par maarte huey inhein le jayenge

t: Thalika biannahumu ittabaAAoo ma askhata Allaha wakarihoo ridwanahu faahbata aAAmalahum
u: Yeh isi liye to hoga ke inhon ne us tariqe ki pairwi ki jo Allah ko naraaz karne wala hai aur us ki raza ka raasta ikhtiyar karna pasand na kiya. Isi bina par usne inke sab aamaal zaya kar diye

t: Am hasiba allatheena fee quloobihim maradun an lan yukhrija Allahu adghanahum
u: Kya woh log jinke dilon mein bimari hai yeh samjhe baithe hain ke Allah unke dilon ke khot (keena) zahir nahin karega

t: Walaw nashao laaraynakahum falaAAaraftahum biseemahum walataAArifannahum fee lahni alqawli waAllahu yaAAlamu aAAmalakum
u: Hum chahein to unhein tumko aankhon se dikha dein aur unke chehron se tum unko pehchaan lo magar unke andaaz e kalaam se to tum unko jaan hi logay.Allah tum sab ke aamal se khoob waqif hai

t: Walanabluwannakum hatta naAAlama almujahideena minkum waalssabireena wanabluwa akhbarakum
u: Hum zaroor tum logon ko aazmaish mein dalenge taake tumhare halaat ki jaanch karein aur dekh lein ke tum mein mujahid aur sabit qadam kaun hain

t: Inna allatheena kafaroo wasaddoo AAan sabeeli Allahi washaqqoo alrrasoola min baAAdi ma tabayyana lahumu alhuda lan yaduroo Allaha shayan wasayuhbitu aAAmalahum
u: Jin logon ne kufr kiya aur Allah ki raah se roaka aur Rasool se jhagda kiya jabke unpar raah e raast wazeh ho chuki thi, dar haqeeqat woh Allah ka koi nuksan bhi nahin kar sakte, balke Allah hi unka sab kiya karaya gaarat (null / fruitless) kardega

t: Ya ayyuha allatheena amanoo ateeAAoo Allaha waateeAAoo alrrasoola wala tubtiloo aAAmalakum
u: Aey logon jo iman laye ho, Tum Allah ki itaat karo aur Rasool ki itaat karo aur apne aamal ko barbaad na karlo

t: Inna allatheena kafaroo wasaddoo AAan sabeeli Allahi thumma matoo wahum kuffarun falan yaghfira Allahu lahum
u: Kufr karne walon aur raah e khuda se roakne walon aur marte dum tak kufr par jamey rehne walon ko to Allah hargiz maaf na karega

t: Fala tahinoo watadAAoo ila alssalmi waantumu alaAAlawna waAllahu maAAakum walan yatirakum aAAmalakum
u: Pas tum bodeyh (faint-hearted) na bano aur sulah ki darkhwast na karo. Tum hi ghalib rehne wale ho. Allah tumhare saath hai aur tumhare aamal ko woh hargiz zaya na karega

t: Innama alhayatu alddunya laAAibun walahwun wain tuminoo watattaqoo yutikum ojoorakum wala yasalkum amwalakum
u: Yeh duniya ki zindagi to ek khel aur tamasha hai agar tum imaan rakkho aur taqwe ki rawish par chalte raho to Allah tumhare ajar tumko dega aur woh tumhare maal tumse na maange ga

t: In yasalkumooha fayuhfikum tabkhaloo wayukhrij adghanakum
u: Agar kahin woh tumhare maal tumse maang le aur sab ke sab tumse talab karle to tum bukhal (kanjoosi /niggardly /miserly) karoge aur woh tumhare khot (failings) ubhar layega

t: Haantum haolai tudAAawna litunfiqoo fee sabeeli Allahi faminkum man yabkhalu waman yabkhal fainnama yabkhalu AAan nafsihi waAllahu alghaniyyu waantumu alfuqarao wain tatawallaw yastabdil qawman ghayrakum thumma la yakoonoo amthalakum
u: Dekho, tum logon ko dawat di jaa rahi hai ke Allah ki raah mein maal kharch karo ispar tum mein se kuch log hain jo bukhal (niggardly / kanjoosi) kar rahe hain. Halaanke jo bukhal (niggardly) karta hai woh dar haqeeqat apne aap hi se bukhal kar raha hai. Allah to Gani (all-Sufficient) hai, tumhi uske mohtaj ho. Agar tum mooh moadoge to Allah tumhari jagah kisi aur qaum ko le aayega aur woh tum jaise na hongey

t: Inna fatahna laka fathan mubeenan
u: Aey Nabi, humne tumko khuli fatah ata kardi

t: Liyaghfira laka Allahu ma taqaddama min thanbika wama taakhkhara wayutimma niAAmatahu AAalayka wayahdiyaka siratan mustaqeeman
u: Taa-ke Allah tumhari agli pichli har kotahi se dargurzar farmaye, aur tumpar apni niyamat ki takmeel(poori) karde, aur tumhein seedha rasta dikhaye

t: Wayansuraka Allahu nasran AAazeezan
u: Aur tumko zabardast nusrat bakhshe

t: Huwa allathee anzala alssakeenata fee quloobi almumineena liyazdadoo eemanan maAAa eemanihim walillahi junoodu alssamawati waalardi wakana Allahu AAaleeman hakeeman
u: Wahi hai jisne momino ke dilon mein sakinat ((Tranquility) nazil farmayi taa-ke apne imaan ke saath woh ek iman aur bada lein. Zameen aur aasmano ke sab lashkar Allah ke kabza-e-qudrat mein hain, aur woh Aleem o Hakeem hai

t: Liyudkhila almumineena waalmuminati jannatin tajree min tahtiha alanharu khalideena feeha wayukaffira AAanhum sayyiatihim wakana thalika AAinda Allahi fawzan AAatheeman
u: (Usne yeh kaam is liye kiya hai) taa-ke momin mardon aur auraton ko hamesha rehne ke liye aisi jannaton mein daakhil farmaye jinke nichey nehrein beh rahi hongi aur unki buraiyan unse dur karde. Allah ke nazdeek yeh badi kamiyabi hai

t: WayuAAaththiba almunafiqeena waalmunafiqati waalmushrikeena waalmushrikati alththanneena biAllahi thanna alssawi AAalayhim dairatu alssawi waghadiba Allahu AAalayhim walaAAanahum waaAAadda lahum jahannama wasaat maseeran
u: Aur un munafiq mardon aur auraton aur mushrik mardon aur auraton ko saza de jo Allah ke mutaliq burey gumaan rakhte hain. Burayi ke phair mein woh khud hi aa gaye hain, Allah ka gazab unpar hua aur usne unpar laanat ki aur unke liye jahannum muhayya kardi jo bahut hi bura thikana hai

t: Walillahi junoodu alssamawati waalardi wakana Allahu AAazeezan hakeeman
u: Zameen aur aasamano ke lashkar Allah hi ke qabza-e-qudrat mein hain aur woh zabardast aur hakeem(wise) hai

t: Inna arsalnaka shahidan wamubashshiran wanatheeran
u: Aey Nabi hunme tumko shahadat(witness) dene wala basharat(good news) dene wala aur khabardar kardene wala bana kar bheja hai

t: Lituminoo biAllahi warasoolihi watuAAazziroohu watuwaqqiroohu watusabbihoohu bukratan waaseelan
u: Taa-ke aey logon , tum Allah aur uske Rasool par imaan lao aur uska saath do, uski taazim-o-tauqeer(support him, and revere ) karo aur subah o shaam uski tasbeeh karte raho

t: Inna allatheena yubayiAAoonaka innama yubayiAAoona Allaha yadu Allahi fawqa aydeehim faman nakatha fainnama yankuthu AAala nafsihi waman awfa bima AAahada AAalayhu Allaha fasayuteehi ajran AAatheeman
u: Aey Nabi, jo log tumse bayt kar rahe thay(pledge allegiance to you) woh dar asal Allah se bayt kar rahey thay. Unke haath par Allah ka haath tha. Ab jo is ahad ko todeyga uski ahad shikani ka wabal uski apni hi zaat par hoga, aur jo us ahad ko wafa karega jo usne Allah se kiya hai, Allah ankqareeb usko bada ajar ata farmayega

t: Sayaqoolu laka almukhallafoona mina alaAArabi shaghalatna amwaluna waahloona faistaghfir lana yaqooloona bialsinatihim ma laysa fee quloobihim qul faman yamliku lakum mina Allahi shayan in arada bikum darran aw arada bikum nafAAan bal kana Allahu bima taAAmaloona khabeeran
u: Aey Nabi, badwi (bedouns) arabon mein se jo log pichey chodh diye gaye thay ab woh aa kar zaroor tumse kahenge ke humein apne amwal aur baal bacchon ki fikr ne mashgul kar rakkha tha. Aap hamare liye magfirat ki dua famayein. Yeh log apni zubaano se woh baatein kehte hain jo unke dilon mein nahin hoti. Unse kehna “acha, yahi baat hai to kaun tumhare maamle mein Allah ke faisle ko rok dene ka kuch bhi ikhtiyar rakhta hai agar woh tumhein koi nuksan pahunchana chahey ya nafa bakshna chahe? Tumhare aamal se to Allah hi ba-khabar hai

t: Bal thanantum an lan yanqaliba alrrasoolu waalmuminoona ila ahleehim abadan wazuyyina thalika fee quloobikum wathanantum thanna alssawi wakuntum qawman booran
u: (Magar asal baat woh nahin hai jo tum keh rahey ho) balke tumne yun samjha ke Rasool aur mominin apne ghar walon mein hargiz palat kar na aa sakenge aur yeh khayal tumhare dilon ko bahut bhala laga. Aur tumne bahut burey guman kiye aur tum sakht badh batin (immensely evil) log ho”

t: Waman lam yumin biAllahi warasoolihi fainna aAAtadna lilkafireena saAAeeran
u: Allah aur uske Rasool par jo log imaan na rakhte hon aisey kaafiron ke liye humne bhadakti aag muhaiyya kar rakkhi hai

t: Walillahi mulku alssamawati waalardi yaghfiru liman yashao wayuAAaththibu man yashao wakana Allahu ghafooran raheeman
u: Aasmano aur zameen ki badshahi ka maalik Allah hi hai. Jisey chahe maaf karey aur jisey chahe saza de. Aur woh Gafoor o Raheem hai

t: Sayaqoolu almukhallafoona itha intalaqtum ila maghanima litakhuthooha tharoona nattabiAAkum yureedoona an yubaddiloo kalama Allahi qul lan tattabiAAoona kathalikum qala Allahu min qablu fasayaqooloona bal tahsudoonana bal kanoo la yafqahoona illa qaleelan
u: Jab tum maal-e-ganimat hasil karne ke liye jane lagoge to yeh pichey chodey jane waley log tumse zaroor kahenge ke humein bhi apne saath chalne do. Yeh chahte hain ke Allah ke farmaan ko badal dein. Inse saaf keh dena ke “Tum hargiz hamare saath nahin chal sakte. Allah pehle hi yeh farma chuka hai” yeh kahenge ke “nahin, balke tumlog humse hasad kar rahey ho” (halanke baat hasad ki nahin hai) balke yeh log sahih baat ko kam hi samajhte hain

t: Qul lilmukhallafeena mina alaAArabi satudAAawna ila qawmin olee basin shadeedin tuqatiloonahum aw yuslimoona fain tuteeAAoo yutikumu Allahu ajran hasanan wain tatawallaw kama tawallaytum min qablu yuAAaththibkum AAathaban aleeman
u: In pichey chodey janey waley badwi(bedouin) arabon se kehna ke “ankareeb tumhein aisey logon se ladne ke liye bulaya jayega jo badey zoarawar hain. Tumko unse jung karni hogi ya woh mutii (surrender) ho jayenge. Us waqt agar tumne hukum e jihad ki itaat ki to Allah tumhein accha ajar dega. Aur agar tum phir usi tarah mooh moad gaye jis tarah pehle moad chuke ho to Allah tumko dardnaak saza dega

t: Laysa AAala alaAAma harajun wala AAala alaAAraji harajun wala AAala almareedi harajun waman yutiAAi Allaha warasoolahu yudkhilhu jannatin tajree min tahtiha alanharu waman yatawalla yuAAaththibhu AAathaban aleeman
u: Agar andha aur langda aur mareez jihad ke liye na aaye to koi haraj nahin. Jo koi Allah aur uske Rasool ki itaat karega Allah usey un jannaton mein dakhil karega jinke nichey nehrein beh rahi hongi, aur jo mooh pherega usey woh dardnaak azaab dega”

t: Laqad radiya Allahu AAani almumineena ith yubayiAAoonaka tahta alshshajarati faAAalima ma fee quloobihim faanzala alsakeenata AAalayhim waathabahum fathan qareeban
u: Allah momino se khush ho gaya jab woh darakht ke nichey tumse bayt (swore allegiance) kar rahey thay. Unke dilon ka haal usko maloom tha. Is liye usne unpar sakinat(inner peace) nazil farmayi, unko inaam mein qareebi fatah bakshi

t: Wamaghanima katheeratan yakhuthoonaha wakana Allahu AAazeezan hakeeman
u: Aur bahut sa maal-e-ganimat unhein ata kar diya jisey woh (anqareeb) hasil karenge. Allah zabardast aur hakeem(wise) hai

t: WaAAadakumu Allahu maghanima katheeratan takhuthoonaha faAAajjala lakum hathihi wakaffa aydiya alnnasi AAankum walitakoona ayatan lilmumineena wayahdiyakum siratan mustaqeeman
u: Allah tumse ba-kasrat amwal-e-ganimat ka wada karta hai jinhein tum hasil karoge. Fauri taur par to yeh fatah usne tumhein ata kardi aur logon ke haath tumhare khilaf uthne se roak diye, taa-ke yeh momino ke liye ek nishani ban jaye aur Allah seedhe raaste ki taraf tumhein hidayat bakshe

t: Waokhra lam taqdiroo AAalayha qad ahata Allahu biha wakana Allahu AAala kulli shayin qadeeran
u: Iske alawa dusre aur ganimaton ka bhi woh tumse waada karta hai jinpar tum abhi tak qadir nahin huey ho aur Allah ne inko gher rakkha hai, Allah har cheez par qadir hai

t: Walaw qatalakumu allatheena kafaroo lawallawoo aladbara thumma la yajidoona waliyyan wala naseeran
u: Yeh kafir log agar is waqt tumse ladd gaye hotey to yaqeenan peeth pher jaatey aur koi haami o madadgaar na paate

t: Sunnata Allahi allatee qad khalat min qablu walan tajida lisunnati Allahi tabdeelan
u: Yeh Allah ki sunnat hai jo pehle se chali aa rahi hai aur tum Allah ki sunnat mein koi tabdili na paogey

t: Wahuwa allathee kaffa aydiyahum AAankum waaydiyakum AAanhum bibatni makkata min baAAdi an athfarakum AAalayhim wakana Allahu bima taAAmaloona baseeran
u: Wahi hai jisne Makkah ki wadi mein unke haath tumse aur tumhare haath unse roak diye, halanke woh unpar tumhein galaba ata kar chuka tha aur jo kuch tum kar rahey thay Allah usey dekh raha tha

t: Humu allatheena kafaroo wasaddookum AAani almasjidi alharami waalhadya maAAkoofan an yablugha mahillahu walawla rijalun muminoona wanisaon muminatun lam taAAlamoohum an tataoohum fatuseebakum minhum maAAarratun bighayri AAilmin liyudkhila Allahu fee rahmatihi man yashao law tazayyaloo laAAaththabna allatheena kafaroo minhum AAathaban aleeman
u: Whai log to hain jinhon ne kufr kiya aur tumko masjid e haram se roka aur haadi(qurbani) ke Unton (camels) ko unki qurbani ki jagah na pahunchne diya. Agar (Makkah mein) aisey momin Mard o aurat maujood na hotay jinhein tum nahin jante, aur yeh khatra na hota ke nadanastagi mein tum unhein pamaal kardoge aur ussey tumpar haraf aayega (to jung na roaki jati. roaki woh is liye gayi) taa-ke Allah apni rehmat mein jisko chahe daakhil karle. Woh momin alag ho gaye hotey to (ehle Makkah mein se) jo kafir thay unko hum zaroor sakht saza dete

t: Ith jaAAala allatheena kafaroo fee quloobihimu alhamiyyata hamiyyata aljahiliyyati faanzala Allahu sakeenatahu AAala rasoolihi waAAala almumineena waalzamahum kalimata alttaqwa wakanoo ahaqqa biha waahlaha wakana Allahu bikulli shayin AAaleeman
u: (Yahi wajah hai ke) jab in kafiron ne apne dilon mei jaahilana hamiyat bitha li to Allah ne apne Rasool aur momino par sakinat nazil farmayi aur momino ko taqwa ki baat ka paband rakkha, ke wahi uske zyada haqdar aur uske ahel thay. Allah har cheez ka ilm rakhta hai

t: Laqad sadaqa Allahu rasoolahu alrruya bialhaqqi latadkhulunna almasjida alharama in shaa Allahu amineena muhalliqeena ruoosakum wamuqassireena la takhafoona faAAalima ma lam taAAlamoo fajaAAala min dooni thalika fathan qareeban
u: Fil waqeh Allah ne apne Rasool ko saccha khwab dikhaya tha jo theek theek haqq ke mutabiq tha. Insha Allah tum zaroor masjid e haram mein purey aman ke saath dakhil hongey, apne sar mundwa-ogey (shave) aur baal tarashwa-ogey aur tumhein koi khauff na hoga. Woh us baat ko janta tha jisey tum na jante thay is liye woh khwab pura honay se pehle usne yeh qareebi fatah tumko ata farmadi

t: Huwa allathee arsala rasoolahu bialhuda wadeeni alhaqqi liyuthhirahu AAala alddeeni kullihi wakafa biAllahi shaheedan
u: Woh Allah hi hai jisne apne Rasool ko hidayat aur deen e haqq ke saath bheja hai taa-ke usko purey jins-e-din par gaalib karde (prevail over every religion) aur is haqeeqat par Allah ki gawahi kaafi hai

t: Muhammadun rasoolu Allahi waallatheena maAAahu ashiddao AAala alkuffari ruhamao baynahum tarahum rukkaAAan sujjadan yabtaghoona fadlan mina Allahi waridwanan seemahum fee wujoohihim min athari alssujoodi thalika mathaluhum fee alttawrati wamathaluhum fee alinjeeli kazarAAin akhraja shatahu faazarahu faistaghlatha faistawa AAala sooqihi yuAAjibu alzzurraAAa liyagheetha bihimu alkuffara waAAada Allahu allatheena amanoo waAAamiloo alssalihati minhum maghfiratan waajran AAatheeman
u: Muhammad Allah ke Rasool hain, aur jo log unke saath hain woh kuffar par sakht aur aapas mein raheem hain. Tum jab dekhoge unhein ruku va sujood aur Allah ke fazl aur uski khushnudi ki talab mein mashgul paogey. Sujood ke asarat unke chehron par maujood hain jinse woh alag pehchane jatey hain. Yeh hai unki sifat Taurat mein. Aur Injeel mein unki misal yun di gayi hai ke goya ek kheti hai jisne pehle kopal nikali, phir us ko taqviyat di, phir woh gadhrayi, phir apne tanay (stem) par khadi ho gayi. Kaasht (sowers) karne walon ko woh khush karti hai taa-ke kuffar inke phalne phoolne par jalein (enraged). Is giroh ke log jo imaan laye hain aur jinhon ne neik amal kiye hain Allah ne unse magfirat aur bade ajar ka waada farmaya hai

t: Ya ayyuha allatheena amanoo la tuqaddimoo bayna yadayi Allahi warasoolihi waittaqoo Allaha inna Allaha sameeAAun AAaleemun
u: Aey logon jo imaan laye ho, Allah aur uske Rasool ke aagey pesh qadmi na karo aur Allah se daro, Allah sab kuch sunne aur jaanne wala hai

t: Ya ayyuha allatheena amanoo la tarfaAAoo aswatakum fawqa sawti alnnabiyyi wala tajharoo lahu bialqawli kajahri baAAdikum libaAAdin an tahbata aAAmalukum waantum la tashAAuroona
u: Aey logon jo imaan laaye ho, apni aawaz Nabi ki awaaz se buland na karo, aur na Nabi ke saath unchi aawaz se baat kiya karo jis tarah tum aapas mein ek dusre se karte ho, kahin aisa na ho ke tumhara kiya karaya sab gharat ho jaye( deeds become vain) aur tumhein khabar bhi na ho

t: Inna allatheena yaghuddoona aswatahum AAinda rasooli Allahi olaika allatheena imtahana Allahu quloobahum lilttaqwa lahum maghfiratun waajrun AAatheemun
u: Jo log Rasool-e-khuda ke huzoor baat karte huey apni aawaz pastt rakhte hain woh dar haqeeqat wahi log hai jinke dilon ko Allah ne takwa ke liye jaanch liya hai. Unke liye magfirat hai aur ajr-e- azeem

t: Inna allatheena yunadoonaka min warai alhujurati aktharuhum la yaAAqiloona
u: Aey Nabi, jo log tumhein hujron(apartments) ke bahar se pukarte hain unmein se aksar be-aqal hain

t: Walaw annahum sabaroo hatta takhruja ilayhim lakana khayran lahum waAllahu ghafoorun raheemun
u: Agar woh tumhare baramad honay tak sabr karte to unhi ke liye behtar tha, Allah darguzar karne wala aur Raheem hai
